source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Logaman Gloria Steinema čiegos reportáša das makkár lea leat Playboy Bunny... gárvin oasi I ja vuoivuo🤔
Vaikko diehten bures ađai Playboy lea... KORPORAŠUVDNA jor... ii lean mus mihkkege dieđuid das man olu sin olles infrastruktuvra duođas bálvalii luohkkávealaheami ealáskahttima hui fasttes vugiin, seammás go olgguldasat čájehit iežaset "fiidnás" ja nu "ehtalašgutsá" molssaeaktun veardiduvvon dasto, Hustleriin

Báljestan muhtun šearbmagovaid maŋŋelaš, muhto dás dakkár čoahkkáigeassu, Bunnyt (gáfe/báre bálvaleaddjit), bágjehuvvo:
- dohkkehit dakkár bálkkaid mat ledje unnit ($200-150 unnit, mii vástida otná $2.5K) go mii lei almmuhuvvon
- addit 50% buot tiippain eret
- addit iežaset goargguid "Násteborriide" (bivnnuhaččaide/elihtii) jos jerrojuvvui
- vuollánit raddječoalme- ja varraiskosii muhto eai ožžon ieža válljet doaktára
- siviilapolitija beales bearráigeahččojuvvot
- dahkat mii fal vejolaš čiekŋudit iežaset boanddaid/gálgariid

Buot dán ovttastahttá dât guovddáš ášši:
- Bunnyide lei ÁRTEGIT GILDON (ráŋggáštupmi lei bálkáhuvvan eret) deaivvadit eará bargiiguin dahje áššehasaiguin... MUHTO ovttastallan ja deaivvadeapmi "Násteborriiguin" lei lohppii addojuvvon, ja vel ávžžuhuvvui. Oainnátgo gosa dát doalvu?

Ođđa bargiide addojuvvui "Bunny-báibbal" maid galge lohkat mii sisttisdoalai buot dakkár fasttes njuolggádusaid ja rávvagiid.
Namuhan dás vel muhtun áššiid:
- Bunnyid bargonávccat árvvoštallojuvvojit dakkár "merihtavuogádagain" (JUO, justa nu čállojuvvon!) dan sadjái go čállojuvvošii gárgudeapmi. Ii lean várra dakkár hirbma ipmaš, ahte merihta ii árvvoštallon dušše buorre bargoárvvu vuođul muhto dasto vel hui dárkilis gáibádusaiguin olgguldas hámi ja láhttema dáfus.
- doppe lei dakkár movttiidahttinvuogádat mii bálkkašii Bunnyid geat vuvde eanemus alkohola ja gálvvuid

- dohkkehit dakkár bálkkaid mat ledje unnit (200-150 dollara unnit, mii vástida otná 2 500 dollara) go mii lei almmuhuvvon
- addit 50% buot tiippain eret
- addit iežaset goargguid "Násteborriide" (bivnnuhaččaide/elihtii) jos jerrojuvvui
- vuollánit raddječoalme- ja varraiskosii muhto eai ožžon ieža válljet doaktára
- siviilapolitija beales bearráigeahččojuvvot
- dahkat mii fal vejolaš čiekŋudit iežaset boanddaid/gálgariid

Buot dán ovttastahttá dát guovddáš ášši:
Bunnyide lei ÁRTEGIT GILDON (ráŋggáštupmi lei bálkáhuvvan eret) deaivvadit eará bargiiguin dahje áššehasaiguin... MUHTO ovttastallan ja deaivvadeapmi "Násteborriiguin" lei lohppii addojuvvon, ja vel ávžžuhuvvui. Oainnátgo gosa dát doalvu?

Ođđa bargiide addojuvvui "Bunny-báibbal" maid galge lohkat mii sisttisdoalai buot dakkár fasttes njuolggádusaid ja rávvagiid.
Namuhan vel unnan eará áššiid:
- Bunnyid bargonávccat árvvoštallojuvvojedje dakkár "merihtavuogádagain" (JUO, justa nu čállojuvvon!) dan sadjái go čállojuvvošii gárgudeapmi. Ii lean várra dakkár hirbma ipmaš, ahte merihta ii árvvoštallon dušše buorre bargoárvvu vuođul muhto dasto vel hui dárkilis gáibádusaiguin olgguldas hámi ja láhttema dáfus.
- doppe lei dakkár movttiidahttinvuogádat mii bálkkašii Bunnyid geat vuvde eanemus alkohola ja gálvvuid

source_doc:
Look, just.
We'll take Roth as a guide.
It's fine.
What?
No, no.
Bad idea.
He's the same age as these kids.
That is a bad idea.
Stop it!
It's the only idea.
Listen to me.
You know, we've helped a ton of kids out here.
They need us.
So we'll just bring Roth on this one trip, and then I can work all this other stuff out.
All right?
Please.
Could use a little growing up anyway.
Hello?
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Gehča, dušše.
Mii váldit Roth ofelažžan.
Hivás lea.
Mii?
Ii, ii.
Heajos jurdda.
Son lea seamma boaris go dát mánát.
Dát lea heajos jurdda.
Heaitte!
Dát lea áidna jurdda.
Gula mu.
Don dieđát, mii leat veahkehan mielddis mánáid dáppe.
Sii dárbbahit min.
Nuba mii dušše váldit Roth mielde dán mátkái, ja de mun sáhtán čoavdit buot dán eará.
Hivás go?
Ándagassii.
Sutnje ge ii dárbu badjánit unnan.
Hallo?

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Dán eahkeda #MMRPG-as! Mu selgi lea viimmat dakkár ahte sáhtán fas jođihit spealu, ja dasto min sáŋggarat joatkihit dan jávkan nieiddaža, Cammie, ohcama. Vega, dál dán Digital Dragon, hehkkeha golbma herkiid geat ledje njuolgan su spealloráju sisa gaskaija, muhto okta sis dovda su gávpoga sáŋgárin ja soai geargaba hupmat liekkusvuođain videospealuid birra. Dađibahábut dat somás boddu gaskkalduvvá go juoga dahje oktage gáhtto spealloráju dáhki ala... 1/?

Vega vuolgá dutkat ášši ja gávdná Dr. Vespera su fasttes gogglodahpogis, maid preassa lea gásttašan "Gargoyle Manan", ovttas harpijalágán ámoriin, gean Vesper gohčoda iežas "unni oahppon". Vesper muitala ahte soai leaba boahtán oahpásmuvvat ja bovdet Vega searvat dán olmmoš-ealli-joavkkuideaset, maid jođiha "The Madame", Dr. Diana Laughton, Laughton Instituhtas. 2/?

Vega geahččala vuordit vai oažžu herkiid olggos speallorájus ja riepmula eará Mythics-joavkku veahkkin, ja dasto iežas speallá beroštit dán "ođđa bearrašii" searvamis. Vesper ja Harpy (guhte ii huma oktage sáni dán bodda) jođiheaba Vega hápmana skipii, gos Laughton Instituhta orru čohkkemin iežaset dávviriid... jáhkkimis danin go sii dihte ahte leat geassimin áici sihke Agent Carteris ja A.R.G.E.N.T.-as ja earáin. 3/?

Vega geahččala vuordit vai oažžu herkiid olggos speallosális ja riepmula eará Mythics-joavkku veahkkin, ja dasto iežas speallá beroštit dán "ođđa bearrašii" searvamis. Vesper ja Harpy (guhte ii huma oktage sáni dán bodda) jođiheaba Vega hápmana skipii, gos Laughton Instituhta orru čohkkemin iežaset dávviriid... jáhkkimis danin go sii dihte ahte leat geassimin áici sihke Agent Carteris ja A.R.G.E.N.T.-as ja earáin. 3/?

The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Ahte dus lei giehtabierga mainna sáhtii dahkat čuovgačájálmasa.
Muhto easkka maŋŋel konseartta don fertiit, fertiit máhcahit giehtabiergasiid.
Gallis dáppe máhcahedje giehtabiergasiid?
Heahpat, ames nu?

```json
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_4": "You can change up your ads throughout the month to keep things fresh.",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.description": "Rather than selling impressions or clicks, we’ve divided our ad space into equally sized slots:",
```

instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is from software data. Translate the content of json, without translating keys and placeholders (i.e. copy them rather than translate them). Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Produce a valid json output that matches the input format. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
```json
{
  "landing_page.why_join_company.free.description": "Mii eat hehtte du gulahallamis olbmuiguin ja stoahkamis. Olbmot sáhttet doarjut mii dakkár doaimmaiguin mat leat buorit leat.",
  "landing_page.testimonials.description": "Duháhiid mielas miellahtut leat gávdnan ustitvuođa, searvvušvuođa, ráhkisvuođa ja ollu eará minguin. Dá leat dušše muhtun singa muitalusain:",
  "advertise.page_title": "Almmuh_ {{website_name}} siiddus",
  "advertise.why_advertise.title": "Manne almmuhit minguin?",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.description": "Dá leat dušše muhtun sivat:",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_2": "Sullii 100 000 ođđa miellahtu searvva minguin juohke mánu, nu ahte mánat ođđa oastit juohke beaivve.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_3": "Dus lea beassi stivrejupmái nu ahte dieđát mot du almmuhusat doibmet 24/7.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_4": "Sáhtát rievdadit iežat almmuhusaid mánu čoda vai doallat áššiid varasin.",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.description": "Dan sadjái go vuovdit čájehemiid dahje deaddilemiid, mii leat juohkán min almmuhussajiid ovttasturrosaš sjihtuide:",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.item_3": "Almmuhusat leat mánu 1. beaivvi rájes gitta mánu maŋimuš beivvi rádjái",
  "advertise.cost.content.description": "Sajis álginhaddi lea $500 USD mánus. Jos háliidat eanet go ovtta saji mánus, juohke lassisadji álgá $400 USD mánus.",
  "advertise.cost.content.note": "Ođasmahte maŋimustá mánu 15. beaivve vai sihkkarastát iežat sajiid boahtte mánnui.",
  "advertise.contact_us.content.description": "Jos dus leat gažaldagat dahje háliidat almmuhit min neavttasiidduin, sádde de e-poastta dása:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.title": "Almmuhusgova gáibádusat",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.aspect_ratio": "Gova sturrodatnjuolggadus:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.display_size": "Čájehansturrodat:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.title": "Almmuhusteksta gáibádusat",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.specs.lines_label": "Surgit:",
  "advertise.aside.help_note": "Eai go leat almmuhusat? Mii sáhttit veahkehit du dainna. Dušše váldde {{link_tag_start}}oktavuođa minguin{{link_tag_end}}.",
  "advertise.sample_ads.title": "Almmuhusmállet",
  "advertise.sample_ads.cta_label": "čájet buot",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.heading": "Bures boahtin ruoktot",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.subheading": "Ráhkat iežat lihkostuvvamii.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.pace.heading": "Mana iežat leahtto mielde",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.consent.description": "Oažžut eanemus ávkki dán heivvolašvuođas go doahttalat olbmuid rájiid.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.love.description": "Ráhkisvuođa dán masa gávnnat hástaleaddji ja miellagiddevaš. Mađi eanet ráhkistat, dađi buoret sáhttit ávžžuhit áššiid maid dárbbahat.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.scene.heading": "Gávnna iežat báikkálaš dilit"
}
```

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@afewbugs Mun ge lean oaidnán dán. Mun balan ahte ođđa miellahtut eai soaitte gávdnat dákkár joavkkuid albma máilmmis dál, go eai báljo šat geavahuvvo boaresáigásaš sosiála mediat. Ovdamearkka dihte soapmasis ledje guokte sihkkela mat ledje beassan boastut ja maid son hálidii addit eret, muhto ii ožžon oktage beroštit Facebook bokte. Muhtun jagiid áigi dat eai livčče bisttán logi minuhta ge ovdal go giinu livčče váldán daid. Mus lea nubbi dain ja lean gáđaš go in sáhttán váldit dán nuppi ge. Seammá lea dálki- ja bázasčorgen-joavkkuiguin ja searvegárdimiiguin.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mus lihkostuvvá buorebut sáddet áššiid eret Facebook Marketplace bokte dál go Gumtree bokte, ja in gierdda eBay dakkár áššiide mat leat beare stuorrát boasttas sáddet. Vissasit dat maid sorjá das gos don orut, eandalígi sihkkeliiguin!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea maid okta dain váldofáktoriin mii doalla mu Facebookas. Ovdal ledjen álo dan oaivilis ahte dat lea ustitvuođa doalaheapmái, muhto in oainne báljo mange binná postemiid iežan ustibiin šat, nu ahte dál dat lea eanaš marketplace, báikkálaš joavkkut ja dat go eanaš báikkálaš fitnodagat ja juoba girjerádjosat ge čájehit iežaset rabasáiggiid, erenoamáš dáhpáhusaid jna. dušše Facebookas
hypo_1:
@afewbugs Mun ge lean oaidnán dán, ja vuorustat ahte ođđa miellahtut eai soaitte gávdnat dákkár joavkkuid dál go boaresáigásaš sosiála mediat eai geavahuvvo šat nu olu. Ovdamearkka dihte muhtun hálidii addit nuvttá guokte sihkkela mat gáibide divvuma, muhto ii oktage beroštan Facebookas. Muhtun jagi áigi dat livčče manašan logi minuhtas. Mus lea nubbi dain ja baha mielda go in sáhttán váldit nubbinge. Seammá lea bázasčorgen-joavkkuiguin ja searvegárdimiiguin.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mus lea dál buoret lihkku gávpeallat rávvagiid Facebook Marketplace bokte go Gumtreein, ja in nagot jurddašitge eBay dakkár dávviriidda mat leat beare stuorrát boasttas sáddet. Soaitá maid leat das duohken gos orut, eandalígi sihkkeliiguin!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea munnje maid okta stuorra sivva manne lean Facebookas. Ovdal jurddašin ahte dat lea ustitvuođaid doalaheapmái, muhto in oainne báljo mange binná iežan ustibiid postemiid šat. Nu ahte dál dat lea eanaš marketplace, báikkálaš joavkkut ja dat go eanaš báikkálaš fitnodagat ja juoba girjerádjosat ge čájehit rabasáiggiid, dáhpáhusaid jna. dušše Facebookas

Ovdamearkka dihte muhtun geahččalii addit guokte sihkkela mat gáibide divvuma, muhto ii ožžon mange málle beroštumi Facebookas. Muhtun jagi áigi dat eai livčče bistán logi minuhtage ovdal go muhtun livčče váldán daid. Mus lea nubbi dain ja baha mielda go in sáhttán váldit nuppi ge. Seammá lea bázasčorgen-joavkkuiguin ja searvegárdimiiguin.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mus lihkostuvvá dávviriid vuovdin buorebut Facebook Marketplace bokte dál go Gumtreas, ja in nagot jurddašitge eBay dakkár áššiide mat leat menddo stuorrát boasttas sáddet. Soaitá maid leat das duohken gos orut, eandalígi sihkkeliiguin!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea munnje maid okta stuorra sivva manne lean Facebookas. Ovdal jurddašin ahte dat lea ustitvuođaid doalaheapmái, muhto in oainne báljo maidege iežan ustibiid postemiid šat. Nu ahte dál dat lea eanaš marketplace, báikkálaš joavkkut ja dat go eanaš báikkálaš fitnodagat ja juoba girjerádju ge čájehit rabasáiggiid, dáhpáhusaid jna. dušše Facebookas

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mus lei juste hui somas #niehku mas mun šaddein ustitšan Lee Chaeyeonijn. Mun juste álgen ságastallat suinna ja de fáhkka ledjen idjadit su luhtte (nugo dalle go fránskkalaččat rievidedje mu juovllaid áigge) ja son muitala munnje ahte mun galgán mannat badjelii ja "shuffle up a little bit" (su eŋgelasgiella lei dábálaččat earenoamáš buorre) mainna son oaivvildii "tidy up a little bit" (čorget veaháš) čájehan dihte su ednii ahte moai letne gárvásat borrat.
Son boahtá badjelii "čorget" iežas lanja ja álgá gieđaiguin čájehit maid son oaivvilda ...
1/

(son lei álo nu ilus oaidnit mu dán niegus) danne go mun ledjen nuolamin biktasiid "čorgema" sadjái.
Dasto son čájeha dán unna bábirbihtáža ja dadjá ahte son lea guođđán munnje nammačállosa, muhto dasto son háliida ruovttoluotta dán unna koartta maid mun ráhkadedjen nuppi luohkás "50 Spikes" birra, mii lei Sonic-kopia, muhto diehttelasat eambbo sákkiiguin. (Dát koarta gávdno duohtavuođas dálge btw). Mun álggán čilget sutnje mii dat lea, ja jos son duođas háliida dan (son háliidii), de mun goitge dárbbašin gova mas son doallá dan gieđas.
2/

Oasit danne go mun váillahivččen dan, muhto maiddái danne go eará láhkai ii oktage jáhkáše munnje ahte son lei háliidan dán ášši mus.
Easka dalle mun áitejin ahte moai eat lean vel ožžon nubbi nuppi telefonnummiriid.
3/3

Mun juste álgen ságastallat suinna ja de fáhkka ledjen idjadit su luhtte (nugo dalle go fránskkalaččat rievidedje mu juovllaid áigge) ja son muitala munnje ahte mun galgán mannat badjelii ja "shuffle up a little bit" (su eŋgelasgiella lei dábálaččat earenoamáš buorre) mainna son oaivvildii "tidy up a little bit" (čorget veaháš) čájehan dihte iežas ednii ahte moai letne gárvásat borrat.
Son boahtá badjelii "čorget" iežas lanja ja álgá gieđaiguin čájehit maid son oaivvilda ...
1/

(son lei álo nu ilus oaidnit mu dán niegus) danne go mun ledjen nuolamin biktasiid "čorgema" sadjái.
Dasto son čájeha dán unna bábirbihtáža ja dadjá ahte son lea guođđán munnje nammačállosa, muhto dasto son háliida ruovttoluotta dán unna koartta maid mun ráhkadedjen nuppi luohkás "50 Spikes" birra, mii lei Sonic-kopia, muhto diehttelasat eambbo sákkiiguin. (Dát koarta gávdno duohtavuođas dálge btw). Mun álggán čilget sutnje mii dat lea, ja jos son duođas háliida dan (son háliidii), de mun goitge dárbbašin gova mas son doallá dan gieđas.
2/

Oasit danne go mun váillahivččen dan, muhto maiddái danne go eará láhkai ii oktage jáhkáše munnje ahte son lei háliidan dán ášši mus.
Easka dalle mun áitejin ahte moai eat lean vel ožžon nubbi nuppi telefonnummiriid.
3/3

The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Áddjá, mun in dieđe maid mun dán dás dagan.

Oalle fiinnis, ahte?

Mii leat geargan buohcciid čohkkemiin dán beaivve.

Nu ahte sihkkarit dárbbašan veahá áiggi.

```json
[
  "Powerful and easy to use. No set-up or transaction fees. And no credit card required. Set up your free account once, and keep it as long as you like. Exactly what “free” is supposed to be.",
  "Join the 1.6 million small businesses that have trusted the Mambalo E‑commerce platform to sell online.",
  "Set up your Mambalo store once to easily sync and sell across a website, social media, marketplaces like Amazon, and live in-person. Get started with one, or try them all.",
  "№1 Fastest implementation e-commerce platform in 2019.",
  "Get expert technical support whenever you need it.",
  "Mambalo App Store",
  "Grow your online store with new tools and apps from our Mambalo partners.",
  "№1 Fastest implementation e-commerce platform in 2019.",
  "Turn social sharing into social selling. Easily add and sell products on your Facebook and Instagram feeds to let shoppers browse and make purchases from inside their favorite social media channels.",
  "Sell on marketplaces",
  "Get a piece of the $200B pie with marketplace integrations for eBay and Amazon. Sell seamlessly across the most popular marketplaces right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Sell online, in-store, and on-the-go",
  "Accept payments in-store and on the go with Square and 52 other point-of-sale systems. And best of all, inventory levels are automatically updated in your Mambalo account so all your stores stay perfectly in sync.",
  "Take your small business global with built-in international payment tools and translation support for 50 languages — and counting.",
  "No credit card required.",
  "Manage anywhere from the Mambalo mobile app",
  "Shipping that works for you",
  "Security you can trust",
  "Create, manage, and track advertisements, all from your Mambalo dashboard. Create low-cost advertisements that drive the right shoppers to your store in minutes. No experience required. You provide the dream, we’ll handle the techy stuff.",
  "* That’s it! Track results in your Mambalo dashboard",
  "Shop designer sunglasses for women, men and kids. Wearel online store. Choose among the most stylish sunglasses at an affordable price."
]
```
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Fámolaš ja álkki geavahit. Eai málit- dahje gávpeortnetmávssut. Ja eai gáibiduvvo kreditiidkoarttat. Ráhkat nuvttá raččat oktii, ja seaillut dan nu guhká go hálidat. Juste nugo ”nuvttá” galgáge leat.",
  "Searvva daidda 1,6 miljon smávvafitnodagaide mat leat luohttán Mambalo neavvun gávppašeapmái neahtas.",
  "Ráhkat iežat Mambalo-gávppi oktii vai álkit sinkroniseret ja vuovddát neahttasiiddus, sosiála mediain, márkanbáikkiin nugo Amazon, ja njuolga báikki nalde. Álge ovttain, dahje geahččal visot.",
  "Njuonni 1 jođaneamos málit-gávpeortnet jagi 2019.",
  "Ožžo áššedovdi teknihkalaš doarjaga go makkár nu áigge go dárbbahat.",
  "Mambalo App Store",
  "Hápmet iežat neahttagávppi ođđa reaidduiguin ja appaiguin min Mambalo-guoimmis.",
  "Njuonni 1 jođaneamos málit-gávpeortnet jagi 2019.",
  "Riepma sosiála juohkima sosiála vuovdimin. Álkit lasiha ja vuovdde buktagiid iežat Facebook ja Instagram feeds vai gávppašeaddjit sáhttet bláđet ja oastit iežaset eanemus lijkkojuvvon sosiála media kanálain.",
  "Vuovdde márkanbáikkiin",
  "Ožžo oasi $200B márkanbáikki ovttastahttimiiguin eBay ja Amazon várás. Vuovdde hálbbit eanemus bivnnuhis márkanbáikkiin njuolga iežat Mambalo-dashboardis.",
  "Vuovdde neahtas, gávppis ja mátkkis",
  "Vuostáiváldde mávssuid gávppis ja mátkkis Square ja 52 eará poastavuovdinortnegiiguin. Ja mii buoremus, vuorkádásit automáhtalaččat ođasmuvvojit iežat Mambalo-kontos nu ahte visot iežat gávppit biddjojit áibbas ovttas.",
  "Váldde iežat smávvafitnodaga máilmmi viidosažžan built-in riikkaidgaskasaš máksinreaidduiguin ja jorgalandoarjagiin 50 gielaide — ja lasihit ain.",
  "Kreditkoarta ii gáibiduvvo.",
  "Háleš gokko nu Mambalo mobilappas",
  "Sádden mii doaibmá dutnje",
  "Dorvvolašvuohta masa sáhtát luohttit",
  "Ráhkat, hálddaš ja čuovo máidnosiid, visot iežat Mambalo-dashboardis. Ráhkat hálbbes máidnosiid mat fáktejit rivtes gávppašeddjiid iežat gávpái minuvttain. Eai gáibiduvvo hárjánumit. Don buktat nieguid, mii gieđahallat teknihkalaš áššiid.",
  "* Dat lea visot! Čuovo bohtosiid iežat Mambalo-dashboardis",
  "Gávvna designerbeaivvášlásaiguin nissonolbmuide, almmáiolbmuide ja mánáide. Wearel neahttagávpi. Vállje eanemus hámolaš beaivvášlásaiguin hálbbes hattiin."
]
```

```json
  "Ráhkat, hálddaš ja čuovo máidnosiid, visot iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanela bokte. Ráhkat hálbbes máidnosiid mat fáktejit rivtes gávppašeddjiid iežat gávpái moadde minuvttas. Eai gáibiduvvo hárjánumit. Don buktat nieguid, mii gieđahallat teknihkalaš áššiid.",
  "* Dat lea visot! Čuovo bohtosiid iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanelas",
  "Oastte designer-beaivvášlásaiguin nissonolbmuide, almmáiolbmuide ja mánáide. Wearel-neahttagávpi. Vállje eanemus hámolaš beaivvášlásaiguin hálbbes hattiin."
]
```

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ruovttueana joavku válddi jođu 26. minuhtas go beakkán Diaz čájehii iežas skárejeaddjieasttu, ja dasto Real Madrid -spealli bijai iežas joavkku johtui.

Achraf Hakimi čornerbáččastaga oaivvildii Ayoub El Kaabi ula guvlui, ja Diaz bágastii spálla sisa lagis.

Son lea dál skáren Maroko juohke viđa spealus ja viiddida iežas olahusa eanemus ulaiguin maid marokolaš lea skáren ovtta Áfriki-meštarrvuođaid loahpalaš spealuin, muhto guđii šiljula maŋŋit garrasit baddjejuvvon reasttain, mii boahtá leat mureha áššin hárjeheaddjái Walid Regraguiai.

Dilálašvuođat ledje váddásat goappešat belaide, muhto Abde Ezzalzouli oaivvildii spálla fárppalaga badjel nuppi Hakimi čornerbáččastagas, muhto maŋit guđii oaivebáhcima dilálašvuođa Saibarii mii šattai duššás.

Kamerun lei lihkohis go ii ožžon rángáštusčaskástaga go Mbeumo biddjojuvvui boksas, muhto mauritánialaš duopmar Dahane Beida čájehii ahte speallu galgá joatkit, ja Georges-Kevin Nkoudou oaivvildii spálla ula guorrii maŋit ulačuolbmas Indomitable Lions -joavkku buoremus dille spealus.

Maroko dagai 2-0-dilálašvuođa moadde minuhta maŋŋel go Saibari biddjojuvvui bearráigeahču haga maŋit ulačuolbmas, ja sus lei áigi muddet spálla ja časkit dan vuollegis nuppi čuolbma sisa.

Ismael Saibari attii Marokoi vuoigŋanlatnja Kameruna vuostá (REUTERS)

Bearjadaga nuppi njealjádasfinaalas Iliman Ndiaye skárijii áidna ula, go Senegal sihkkarastti iežas Afcon-lievvafinaala sajádaga goalmmát háve maŋimus njealji turneain, go vuittii 10-olbmo Mali joavkku 1-0.

Ndiaye skárijii 27 minuhta maŋŋel, ávkkástallamin ula-gáhttejeaddji boasttuvuođain vai bijai Senegala ovddas garrasit derby-spealus iežaset oarje-áfriki ránnjá vuostá.

Mali biddjojuvvui 10 olbmo nala nuppi jahkebealis maŋŋel go kapteina Yves Bissouma oaččui nuppi gáttáldaga juste ovdal jahkebealebottu.

Son oaččui vuosttaš gáttáldaga 25. minuhtas ja sáddejuvvui eret maŋŋel dárbbašmeahttun fasttesvuođa Idrissa Gana Gueye vuostá.

Mali lei 10 olbmo nala maŋimus spealu 26. minuhtas Tunisia vuostá, muhto nagodeaddje dasto gierdat rángáštusčaskástagaiguin, muhto dán háve ii lean máhccun čábbásit spealli Senegala joavkku vuostá.
hypo_1:
Lágideaddjit válde jođu 26. minuhtas go ollu ulaid skáren Diaz čájehii skáreneasttustis, ja Real Madrid-spealli bijai joavkku ovdalis.

Ayoub El Kaabi oaivvildii Achraf Hakimi čornerbáhcima ula guvlui, ja Diaz bágastii spálla sisa lahka ula.

Son lea dál skáren Maroko juohke viđa spealus ja nu son viiddida iežas olahusa eanemus ulaiguin maid marokolaš lea skáren ovtta Áfriki-meštarrvuođaid loahpaspealuin. Son guđii dattetge šiljula maŋŋit garrasit baddjejuvvon reasttain, mii boahtá leat mureha áššin hárjeheaddjái Walid Regraguiai.

Dilálašvuođat ledje váddásat goappešat belaide, muhto Abde Ezzalzouli oaivvildii spálla fárppalaga badjel nuppi Hakimi čornerbáččastagas, ja maŋit fálai oaivebáhcindile Saibarii, mii ii dattetge lihkosmuvvan.

Kamerun lei lihkohis go ii ožžon rángáštusčaskástaga, go Mbeumo biddjojuvvui boksas muhto mauritánialaš duopmar Dahane Beida čájehii spealu joatkit. Georges-Kevin Nkoudou oaivvildii spálla maŋit ulačuolbmas ula guorrii, mii lei Indomitable Lions -joavkku buoremus dille olles spealus.

Maroko dagai 2-0 moadde minuhta maŋŋel ja mearridii dasto spealu, go Saibari biddjojuvvui bearráigeahču haga maŋit ulačuolbmas, ja sus lei áigi váldit spálla vuollásažžan ja časkit dan vuollegis nuppi čuolbma sisa ulii.

Ismael Saibari attii Marokoi vuoigŋanlatnja Kameruna vuostá (REUTERS)

Bearjadaga nuppi njealjádasfinaalas Iliman Ndiaye skárijii áidna ula, go Senegal sihkkarastti iežaset sajádaga Afcon-lievvafinaalas goalmmát háve maŋimus njealji turneain go vuittii 10-olbmo Mali joavkku 1-0.

Ndiaye skárijii 27 minuhta maŋŋel, ávkkástallamin ula-gáhttejeaddji boasttuvuođain ja bijai Senegala ovdalis garrasit derby-spealus oarje-áfrikalaš ránnjájoavkku vuostá.

Mali biddjojuvvui 10 olbmo nala nuppi jahkebeallái maŋŋel go kapteina Yves Bissouma sáddejuvvui eret nuppi gáttáldaga geažil juste ovdal jahkebealebottu.

Son oaččui vuosttaš gáttáldaga 25. minuhtas ja sáddejuvvui eret maŋŋel dárbbašmeahttun fasttesvuođa Idrissa Gana Gueye vuostá.

Mali lei 10 olbmo nala 26. minuhtas iežaset ovddit spealus Tunisia vuostá, muhto nagodedje dasto beassat viidáseappot rángáštusčaskástagaiguin. Dán háve dattetge ii lean máhccun čabbáseappot spealli Senegala joavkku vuostá.

Ismael Saibari attii Marokoi vuoigŋanlatnja Kameruna vuostá (REUTERS)

Bearjadaga nuppi njealjádasfinaalas Iliman Ndiaye skárijii áidna ula, go Senegal sihkkarastti iežaset sajádaga Afcon-lievvafinaalas goalmmát háve maŋimus njealji turneain go vuittii 10-olbmo Mali joavkku 1-0.

Ndiaye skárijii 27 minuhta maŋŋel, ávkkástallamin ula-gáhttejeaddji boasttuvuođain ja bijai Senegala ovdalis garrasit derby-spealus oarje-áfrikalaš ránnjájoavkku vuostá.

Mali biddjojuvvui 10 olbmo nala nuppi jahkebeallái maŋŋel go kapteina Yves Bissouma sáddejuvvui eret nuppi gáttáldaga geažil juste ovdal jahkebealebottu.

Son oaččui vuosttaš gáttáldaga 25. minuhtas ja sáddejuvvui eret maŋŋel dárbbašmeahttun fasttesvuođa Idrissa Gana Gueye vuostá.

Mali lei 10 olbmo nala 26. minuhtas iežaset ovddit spealus Tunisia vuostá, muhto nagodedje dasto beassat viidáseappot rángáštusčaskástagaiguin. Dán háve dattetge ii lean máhccun čabbáseappot spealli Senegala joavkku vuostá.
hypo_3:
Lágideaddjit válde jođu 26. minuhtas go njunnoš časki Diaz čájehii skáreneasttustis, ja Real Madrid-spealli bijai joavkku ovdalis.

Achraf Hakimi čornerbáhcima oaivvildii ula guvlui Ayoub El Kaabi, ja Diaz stivrii spálla sisa lahka ula.

Son lea dál skáren Maroko juohke viđa spealus ja nu son viiddida iežas olahusa eanemus ulaiguin maid marokolaš lea skáren ovtta Áfriki-meštarrvuođaid loahpaspealuin. Son guđii dattetge šiljula maŋŋit garrasit baddjejuvvon reasttain, mii boahtá leat mureha áššin hárjeheaddjái Walid Regraguiai.

Dilálašvuođat ledje váddásat goappešat belaide, muhto Abde Ezzalzouli oaivvildii spálla fárppalaga badjel nuppi Hakimi čornerbáččastagas, ja maŋit fálai oaivebáhcindile Saibarii, mii ii dattetge lihkosmuvvan.

Kamerun lei lihkohis go ii ožžon rángáštusčaskástaga, go Mbeumo biddjojuvvui boksas muhto mauritánialaš duopmar Dahane Beida čájehii spealu joatkit. Georges-Kevin Nkoudou oaivvildii spálla maŋit ulačuolbmas ula guorrii, mii lei Indomitable Lions -joavkku buoremus dille olles spealus.

Maroko dagai 2-0 moadde minuhta maŋŋel ja mearridii dasto spealu, go Saibari biddjojuvvui bearráigeahču haga maŋit ulačuolbmas, ja sus lei áigi váldit spálla vuollásažžan ja časkit dan vuollegis nuppi čuolbma sisa ulii.

Dreyfus.
What does that look?
Libby is dead, which means I don't have a wife.
You don't have lamb chops.
Oh, gosh, she spoiled you rotten.
Dreyfus.
Hey, doctor.
Weston.
Hi, Emily.
Baby.
How are you?
Midterms over?
Uh, but that's a relief.
So it's sunny up there in New York, huh?
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Dreyfus.
Mo dat orru?
Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat eamit.
Dus eai leat lálbmaspáitobiktasat.
Voi mánaš, son lea billistan du áibbas.
Dreyfus.
Hei, doavttir.
Weston.
Hei, Emily.
Áhkkaš.
Mo manná?
Leatgo gaskadálvvi eksámenat oasit dál oalát gárvásat?
Uh, muhto dat lea geahpádus.
Nu ahte doppe New Yorkas lea beaivvádat, nugo?

source_doc:
It looks amazing.
It's a little slime pizza pie.
Look how much it stretches.
All right, so that's mystery slime.
Oh, I've got one more secret.
I'm just gonna tell Milo, though.
That's a good one.
Can I tell him?
No.
All right.
See you guys later.
Bye.
We challenge you.
To watch zombies on Disney Channel.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@rechelon uvdomealli lea gohčodit dan oalle hálbái… in hálit dajahit ahte in oro Berlinas, muhto jáhkán ahte olbmuin juohke sajis lei sullii seammá reakšuvdna, namalassii “nieidat dakkár boahnjit go barget juoidá mii guođđá nu olu eahpeosolaš olbmuid rávnnji haga ja gieđahallat dan dego vealtameahttun liigevahágin”. Lean oaidnán olu olbmuid jurddašeamen ahte dat lei beallemuttu dego false flag vai gurutbealli livččii čájehan heitot. Ii fal politiijaid beroštit, sii leat várra jalla lihkolaččat dál (unohis ášši go jurddaša) go sis lea dál sivas dárkkistit ja gieldit gurutbeale birrasa.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Juo, oaivvildan ahte orru leamen nu ahte leat vel sullii guhtta anticivs geat leat bajásšaddan meme-konttoiguin ja geat leat dál gurutbealde go biras ii doarjon sin, muhto leat earenoamáš gurutbealde go boares anticivs geat dovde ahte dát joavku badjelgeahčai sin, eai leat doarjon sin.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Lean fuolastuvvan ahte mii oaidnit iešjustifiserenspirála gos moadde anticivs moarásmuvvet nu garrasit lihkadussii go dat ii doarjon sin hirmus buori suoládanfalleheami siviliserejuvvon máilmmi vuostá, ahte sii gahččiidit ITS-dási pasihis jagi dahje guovtti siste go leat okto ja moaris.
hypo_1:
@rechelon hirbmat unpopulára lea unnimusat daddjojuvvon… in oro Berlinas, muhto jáhkán ahte olbmuin juohke sajis lei sullii seammá reakšuvdna, mii lea ahte “fálli dán dálkkasčolbmaide go barget juoidá mii guođđá nu olu eahpeosolaš olbmuid rávnnji haga, ja gieđahallat dan dego vealtameahttun liigevahágin”. Lean oaidnán olu olbmuid guorrasit dasa ahte dat lei feaila leavga vai gurutbealli livččii čájehan heitot. Politiijat han eai beroštur, sii leat várra jalla lihkolaččat dál (unohis jurdda) go sis lea dál sivas dárkkistit ja gieldit gurutbeale birrasa.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Juo, oaivvildan ahte orru leamen nu ahte leat vel sullii guhtta anticiv-olbmo geat leat bajásšaddan meme-konttoiguin ja geat leat eahpesvuođas go biras ii čiežan singuin, muhto leat earenoamáš eahpesvuođas go boares anticiv-olbmot geat dovde ahte dat joavku badjelgeahčai sin, eai leat doarjon sin.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Lean fuolastuvvan ahte mii oaidnit iešjustifiserenspirála gos moadde anticiv-olbmo moarásmuvvet nu garrasit lihkadussii go dat ii doarjon sin hirmus buori falleheami siviliserejuvvon máilmmi vuostá, ahte sii gahččiidit ITS-dási fasttesvuhtii jagi dahje guovtti siste go leat okto ja moaris.

instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. hypo_0:
Mu mielas dát livččii nu vuorjas gievkkanis.
Dan namma lea bora du eana-muorjjiid.
Heive maid veahá mu biktasii?
Juoga nuppalágán maid.
Ja dat mii lea dain, dattetge.
Muhto govven dušše vai muitán.
Loki geahččalii goitge oažžut dan eana-muorje-veršuvnna, go mu mielas dat lea maŋimuš mii lea bázán.
Logán goit, juos boađán ruovttoluotta ja dat ii leat dás, de dat ii lean sihkkarit oaivvilduvvon munnje.

Veaháš nugo nu maid.

Maybe they have, like, a breakfast sandwich or something?
Yes, for sure.
But I've heard that they're good.
Excited.
Their coffee shop by day, brewery by night.
Oh, this is the place.
Oh, yeah.
It's gonna be a good vibe.
It's so cute in here.
I was, it was gonna be louder here, but.
Do you have calls to take today?

The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mun aiddo oidnen Kendall Coyne Schofield biktasiiguin liegganeami áigge... speallágo son odne??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS dás MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Vaikko mii dat lei maid Heise dagai mii gopmitii Fleet-spelli gasku jienas, de dat Fleet-spealli mávssi dan DUHPPALIT 10 sekondu maŋŋelaš. Ohhoh. 😬🫣
Nuppe dáfus háliidan ahte Fleet molvári PWHL-debyhta manná bures, eará dáfus fas háliidan ahte Frost vuoitá.
Kendall Coyne Schofield lei NU MOARET mállo-ovddas dainna unna soabbe-gilvvuin maŋŋel Fleet nuppi mália. Lean nu movttet go son lea fas dainna ráfehisvuođainis jienas. Son lea fasttes feastá!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Orru leamen ahte Klees molssui fas iežas dábálaš vuosttaš gárvui ja Kendall ja sii maiddái fertejedje oažžut dan f*ck mália ja sii ožžo dan duođai buorre f*ck mália! JOO

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
JOO! SII ĐIĐĐE DAN F*CK SPEALU TASSAIDES!
Iiiiiii, Fleet lea fas njunnošis.
Dás lea duođai goargŋun ja njiedjan dát speallu!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Vuoih, Fleet *ain* bágge Heise. Voi voi. Dat lea guokte Fleet-ráŋggáštusa dan ovtta gasku-jiena gahčahallama ovddas maid Heise dagai mii ii ožžon ráŋggáštusa.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Lea nu nu somá oaidnit Kendall Coyne Schofield fas mállo-ovddas, go nissonat geat leat oaivve-goargŋilasa alit go son hoigot su, muhto son hoigá fárrolaga ruovttoluotta ja dahká spealuid.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Geahččit eai leat sinkkarat dan vuođul maid oinniimet, ahte Curl ánssášii duppal unna-ráŋggáštusa roavva spealu ovddas.
Geahččit eai leat duhtavaččat dán loahpalaš cuiggodan láhkahis daddjoneapmái Fleet vuostá 71-spealli bávččagahttimis.
In jáhke ahte oačžuimet ovttage málločaskástaga dan maŋimuš eanetlohko-spealus.
Boston suodjalus lea dušše menddo buorre. Sii eai atte midjiide makkárge rahpaseami.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Vaikko mii dat lei maid Heise dagai mii gopmitii Fleet-spealli jorruide gasku jiena, de dat Fleet-spealli mávssi dan DUHPPALIT ruovttoluotta 10 sekondu maŋŋelaš. Ohhoh. 😬🫣
Nuppe dáfus háliidan ahte Fleet molvári PWHL-debyhta manná bures, muhto eará dáfus fas háliidan ahte Frost vuoitá.
Kendall Coyne Schofield lei NU MOARET mállo-ovddas dainna unna soabbe-gilvvuin maŋŋel Fleet nuppi mália. Lean nu movttet go su ráfehisvuohta lea fas jiena alde. Son lea duođai fasttes feastá!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Orru leamen ahte Klees molssui fas iežas dábálaš vuosttaš gárvui ja Kendall ja earát fertejedje oažžut dan f*ck mália ja sii ožžo dan duođai buorre f*ck mália! JOO

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
JOO! SII ĐIĐĐE DAN SPEALU TASSAIDES!
Voi eeeeeei, Fleet lea fas njunnošis.
Dás lea duođai goargŋun ja njiedjan dát speallu!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Vuoih, Fleet lea *ain* Heise maŋis. Voi voi. Dat lea guokte Fleet-ráŋggáštusa dan ovtta gasku-jiena gahčahallama ovddas maid Heise dagai mii ii ožžon ráŋggáštusa.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Lea nu nu somá oaidnit Kendall Coyne Schofield fas mállo-ovddas, go nissonat geat leat oaivve-goargŋilasa alit go son hoigot su, muhto son hoigá fárrolaga ruovttoluotta ja dahká spealuid.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Geahččit eai leat sinkkarat dan vuođul maid oinniimet, ahte Curl ánssášii duppal unna-ráŋggáštusa roavva spealu ovddas.
Geahččit eai leat duhtavaččat dán loahpalaš cuiggodan láhkahis daddjoneapmái Fleet vuostá 71-spealli bávččagahttimis.
In jáhke ahte oačžuimet ovttage málločaskástaga dan maŋimuš eanetlohko-spealus.
Boston suodjalus lea dušše menddo buorre. Sii eai atte midjiide makkárge rahpaseami.

Na, divtte dan dál juste dego gahččat iežas ala ná, muhto divtte dan golgat vulos vai dat duddjo gállaid go dat jorrá.
Mun hálidan ahte dat golget nubbi nubbái, eaige dušše viidánit.
Dieđatgo maid mun oaivvildan?
Nu dat lea maid mun dál dán muttus dagan.
Mun liikon dása.
Váldot dán.
Dása mii dál mannat.

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Heangitteappot muitaluvvon, oidnen juste muhtuma váidaleamen dan birra go spealut rávvejit speallat álkkes dásis go eaktuhuvvá.
Mun maid vašuhan dán.
Mun liikon go lea álkkes dássi. Dorjo, mu mielas spealut livčče galgan diktit du veahá verrodallat, nu guhká go gilvvuin leat ovttamielalaš njuolggadusat dan birra.
Muhto juohke speallu mii lea ávžžuhan mu álkkes sisa, lea dakkaviđe bálaccesson eret. Mus leat doarvái spealut speallat, ja jos háliidat mu válmmeštit jođáneappot, lihku, lean válmmas jođáneappot.

Dán dihte lea dálá Mario-spealuid – dálá-láganid goitge – nu veadjemeahttun speallat munnje.
"Jámihit go golbma geardde Mario? Dá lea golle-superbivttas mii dahká du immortálan go leat nu heittot! Jos it háliid dieid, de váruhit alit deaddilemes eará go "álggah spealu jo fas ii ii eai eará mieldde dušše álggah dási".
Dán dihte heiten maid geahččaleames speallat Phantom Pain. Go jámii, de fálai munnje vuonccáháhta ja dálai "jo", gieđat-gieđat vajálduhtten dadjat "vuošša gáfe".

Ipmirdan ahte dat lea speallit-bisuhan-ášši, muhto dat lea nu badjelgeahčči.
Automáhtalaš váttisvuođadási mudden maid fasttoha mu, go mun lean ráhkkaneamen hástalussá ja de speallu fasttioda ja vuolidit dan spealu badjelmearálaš álkkes dásis go lean "vákšon".
Mun jáman dahje juoidá, manan fas geahččalit, muhto ii, dál lea hástalus eret. Lihkostuvve! Divtte spealu jávkat! Ale mureh, dat hástalusat ledje earáide. Muhtumii gii lea buoret.
In muhte leango goassege geargan spealuin mas lea automáhtalaš váttisvuođadási mudden.

Jáhkán ahte dat vuođđomuttu earru mu ja sin ulbmeljoavkku gaskkas lea ahte mun liikon gávdnat vuogi dahkat juoidá, muhto sin ulbmeljoavku – goitge sin mielas – liiko váldit log flume Disneyworld dajahusas.
Veahá gođđat, veahá čázit, muhto ale mureh, bearaš, áhčči Walt lea du doarjjan. Don leat oadjebas, it mieldde ge dárbbaš lihkahit, dušše čohkkát doppe ja moddját, gáju mii čáhci-čáhci.
Jos háliidivččen dan, de manan čohkkát beanapárkii ja bajit beatnaga.

But if you don't say it, and if you stand firm in what you believe in your faith, you're going to lose it all.
And I just remember starting off and, oh, it was like it was just yesterday.
And I remember saying, you know, it's great that Americans, you know, you can choose one or the other.
And it was like the Lord just smacked me right in the face and was like, who are you and what do you believe?
You know what you believe.

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Campanīle
Diktaráidu #poetry
i.
Romalaš girku gávpotbákti,
golleruossa mii joksá balvvaid:
gila dárustuvvá, rábasta veaikešuoŋa,
lávlu murku čađa,
dan alla jietna lea ávžžuhus
oskolaččaide geat leat guhká gáidán.
Ii šat oskku áhkkárvuohta:
máŋga lasket mii lea luoitán.
Dan geađgetoardna gáhttet fákta
litna skábma-arvvi čađa,
almit luoitaleaba sin dárustusa
dáhkegeađggiid ala fas.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Gii geasii gila bátti?
Oktonas muŋka iežas kloastaris
mas ii oktage leat šat ovttamielas.
Son, gordni girku oastaris —
liikká ii oktage latnja ane su seaŋgga,
ii makkárge doavdi lihkahuvvon su gápmagiiguin,
su namma ii goasge daddjon,
eai dološ girjjit maid son geavahii.
Gila báddi heaŋgá, gollan, ráhkanan,
girku sáhpániid bálkkaid nálon.
Lea guhká go dat lihkahuvvui,
gieđaid geassun daid vuolde.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
Iđitbájan rávká sálmmaid
ja vuoigŋá lávlagiid
liktehit veaikegila njuovčča,
mun vástidan diskaŋttas —
muhto in iežan jienain.
Biegga njiellá mu rávkama,
skilla iežas bassi jienaid
iežas stoanddu gieđaiguin.
✋🏼🧵

almit luoitaleame sin dárustusa
dáhkegeađggiid ala fas.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Gii giesii gila bátti?
Oktonas muŋka iežas kloastaris
mas ii oktage leat šat ovttamielas.
Son, gordni girku oastaris —
liikká ii oktage latnja ane su seaŋgga,
ii makkárge doavdi lihkahuvvon su gápmagiiguin,
su namma ii goasge daddjon,
eai dološ girjjit maid son geavahii.
Gila báddi heaŋgá, gollan, ráhkanan,
girku sáhpániid bálkkaid nálon.
Lea guhká go dat lihkahuvvui,
gieđaid geassun daid vuolde.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
Idjabiegga savkala sálmmaid
ja vuoigŋá lávlagiid šuoŋaid
liktehit veaikegila njuovčča,
mun vástidan diskaŋttas —
muhto in iežan jienain.
Biegga njiellá mu rávkama,
skilla iežas bassi jienaid
iežas stoanddu gieđaiguin.
✋🏼🧵

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Set up and manage a Facebook Store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Easily add, promote, and sell products, or manage all your Facebook advertising in just a few clicks — right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Convert window shoppers to paying customers with Facebook remarketing. With a few clicks, we’ll create hyper-targeted ads to remind your customers about products they considered but didn’t buy.",
  "Sell everywhere",
  "Set up and manage a Facebook store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Worried about the extra management? Mambalo automatically syncs your product information from your online store with Facebook, so any changes you make will instantly appear in your Facebook ecommerce store. Do it once and forget it.",
  "Advertising your Facebook store — made easy",
  "The Facebook Pixel makes advertising on Facebook much more effective. Easily market to your ideal audiences based on the actions they have taken in your online store and track their conversions. Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
  "Remarket. To everyone who visits your site, or just to people who visit specific pages or take specific actions.",
  "Streamlined shipping and taxes: Integrates with major carriers such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, and many others internationally to automatically calculate shipping rates.",
  "WordPress e-commerce Capabilities: Add your online store to WordPress and showcase the same products, prices, and descriptions on your Facebook store as your WordPress storefront or any other site builder like Weebly, Wix, and Adobe Muse.",
  "E-commerce mobile apps: With Mambalo’s free iOS and Android apps, you can manage sales, track inventory, and accept online payments wherever you are.",
  "PCI DSS validated level 1 service: Provides 55+ payment options and secure HTTPS checkout capabilities to ensure you comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements.",
  "Is it possible to migrate my store from WooCommerce to Facebook with Mambalo?",
  "I am still confused and need extra help with the Mambalo Facebook commerce app. What should I do?",
  "Don't forget about our Knowledge Base, either. If you want to learn about Mambalo basics, how to manage your Mambalo Facebook store, and other Mambalo Facebook commerce app topics, our Knowledge Base may prove to be a great resource.",
  "The Mambalo team is happy to help you too. Feel free to send us a message at any time, and we will respond as soon as possible.",
  "Google Smart Shopping takes your products beyond Google search to help you advertise across Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, and the Google Display Network.",
  "Maximize sales without the guesswork",
]
```

Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Ásahis ja hálddaš Facebook-gávppi njuolga iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanela bokte. Vajálduhte sosiála juohkima. Don leat gárvvis sosiála vuovdimii.",
  "Lasihis, promove gálvvuid ja vuovdde daid álkidit, dahje hálddaš visot iežat Facebook-máinnosteami dušše mottiin coahkkalemiin – njuolga iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanela bokte.",
  "Nuorgas raba dálkkádatmáidnosiid Facebook-uđđasit-márkanastimiin. Mottiin coahkkalemiin mii ráhkadit dárkilis máidnosiid mat muittuhit du gávppašeddjiide gálvvuid birra maid sii ledje smiehttamin, muhto eai lean vel oastán.",
  "Vuovdde juohke sajis",
  "Ásahis ja hálddaš Facebook-gávppi njuolga iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanela bokte. Vajálduhte sosiála juohkima. Don leat gárvvis sosiála vuovdimii.",
  "Eaktatgo eanet hálddašeami? Mambalo synkronisere automáhtalaččat du gálvodieđuid iežat neasstagávppis Facebookii, nu aihki juohke rievdadus mii dahkko boahtá njuolga oinnos iežat Facebook-e-gávppis. Daga dan oktii ja vajálduhte.",
  "Máhca Facebook-gávppi máinnosteami — álkisin",
  "Facebook-piksel dahká máinnosteami Facebookas ollu beaktileabbon. Márkanaste álkidit iežat eanemus gávppašeddjiide daid daguid vuođul maid sii leat dahkan du neasstagávppis ja čuovo sin konversuvnnaid. Don eai dušše dieđe geasa don máinnostat, muhto dus lea maiddái buoret áddejupmi das movt du máidnosat doaibmájit. Visot oktiibuot, don sáhtát dahkat iežat dieđuid nannoseabbon, mii buktá buoret ruhtadieđu du máinnosruđaide.",
  "Uđđasitmárkanaste. Juohkeoktii gii galleda du siiddu, dahje dušše olbmuide geat galledit dihto siidduid dahje dahket dihto daguid.",
  "Njuovžilis sáhtat ja vearut: Integrerejuvvon stuorra sáhttafálliiguin dego USPS, UPS, FedEx ja máŋggain earáiguin riikkaidgaskasaččat automáhtalaš sáhttahattiid rehkenastimii.",
  "WordPress e-gávpigoansttat: Lasit iežat neasstagávppi WordPressii ja čájet seammá gálvvuid, hattiid ja čilgehusaid iežat Facebook-gávppis dego WordPress-gávpeuvssas dahje eará siidoráhkadanprográmmas dego Weebly, Wix ja Adobe Muse.",
  "E-gávpismárkan mobiila-appat: Mambalo nuvttá iOS ja Android-appain don sáhtát hálddašit vuovdimiid, čuovvut lageriid ja vuostáiváldit neasstaluhtidemiid juohke sajis gos don leat.",
  "PCI DSS validerejuvvon dási 1 bálvalus: Fállá 55+ máksinválljema ja sihkaris HTTPS-máksinvuogi sihkkarastindihte ahte don čuovvut PCI DSS Dási 1 gáibádusaid.",
  "Leago vejolaš fárrehit iežat gávppi WooCommerceas Facebookii Mambaloin?",
  "Mun lean ain eahpesihkar ja dárbbašan eanet veahki Mambalo Facebook e-gávpe-appain. Maid mun galggan dahkat?",
  "Ale vajálduhte mii Máhttovuođu maiddái. Jos don háliidat oahppat Mambalo vuođđodieđuid, movt hálddašit iežat Mambalo Facebook-gávppi ja eará Mambalo Facebook-e-gávpe-app-fáttáid, de min Máhttovuođđu sáhttá leat stuorra veahkkin.",
  "Mambalo-tiima veahkeha maiddái miehtamielain. Sáhtát mii sáddet sáni milloin nu, ja mii vástidit nu jođánit go vejolaš.",
  "Google Smart Shopping doalvu du gálvvuid viidáseappot go Google-ohcamii veahkehandihte máinnostit Shopping, YouTube, Gmail ja Google Display Network bokte.",
  "Maksimere vuovdimiid almmá eahpesihkarvuođa haga"
]
```
hypo_1:
```json
[
  "Ásahis ja hálddaš Facebook-gávppi njuolga iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanela bokte. Vajálduhte sosiála juohkima. Don leat gárvvis sosiála vuovdimii.",
  "Lasit, promove ja vuovdde buktagiid álkidit, dahje hálddaš visot iežat Facebook-máinnosteami dušše mottiin coahkkalemiin — njuolga iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanela bokte.",
  "Rievdat glásagávppašeddjiid máksi kundarin Facebook-uđđasitmárkanastimiin. Mottiin coahkkalemiin mii ráhkadit dárkilit čuozihuvvon máidnosiid, mat muittuhit iežat kundariidda buktagiid birra maid sii ledje smiehttamin, muhto eai lean oastán.",
  "Vuovdde juohke sajis",
  "Ásahis ja hálddaš Facebook-gávppi njuolga iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanela bokte. Vajálduhte sosiála juohkima. Don leat gárvvis sosiála vuovdimii.",
  "Vuorrbatgo liige hálddašeami birra? Mambalo synkronisere automáhtalaččat du buktandieđuid iežat neasstagávppis Facebookii, nu ahte juohke rievdadus mii dahkko boahtá njuolga oinnos du Facebook-e-gávpái. Daga dan oktii ja vajálduhte.",
  "Facebook-gávppi máinnosteapmi — dahkkon álkisin",
  "Facebook-piksel dahká máinnosteami Facebookas ollu beaktileabbon. Márkanaste álkidit iežat idealalaš vuostáiválditjovkui daid daguid vuođul maid sii leat dahkan du neasstagávppis, ja čuovo sin konversuvnnaid. Don eai dušše dieđe dárkilit geasa don máinnostat, muhto dus lea maiddái buoret áddejupmi das movt du máidnosat doaibmájit. Visot oktiibuot, don sáhtát dahkat iežat dieđuid nannoseabbon, mii buktá buoret ruhtadieđu du máinnosruđaide.",
  "Uđđasitmárkanaste. Juohkeoktii gii galleda du siiddu, dahje dušše olbmuide geat galledit dihto siidduid dahje dahket dihto daguid.",
  "Smidis sáhttu ja vearut: Integrerejuvvon stuorámus sáhttafálliiguin dego USPS, UPS, FedEx ja máŋggain earáiguin riikkaidgaskasaččat, vai automáhtalaččat rehkenastá sáhttomávssuid.",
  "WordPress e-gávpigoansttat: Lasit iežat neasstagávppi WordPressii ja čájet seammá buktagiid, hattiid ja čilgehusaid iežat Facebook-gávppis dego WordPress-gávpeuvssas dahje eará siidoráhkadusprográmmas dego Weebly, Wix ja Adobe Muse.",
  "E-gávpismárkan mobiila-appat: Mambalo nuvttá iOS- ja Android-appaiguin don sáhtát hálddašit vuovdimiid, čuovvut lageriid ja vuostáiváldit neasstaluhtidemiid juohke sajis gos don leat.",
  "PCI DSS validerejuvvon dási 1 bálvalus: Fállá 55+ máksinválljema ja sihkaris HTTPS-máksinvuogi sihkkarastindihte ahte don čuovvut PCI DSS Dási 1 gáibádusaid.",
  "Leago vejolaš fárrehit iežat gávppi WooCommerceas Facebookii Mambaloin?",
  "Mun lean ain eahpesihkar ja dárbbašan eanet veahki Mambalo Facebook e-gávpe-appain. Maid mun galggan dahkat?",
  "Ale vajálduhte min Máhttovuođu ge. Jos don háliidat oahppat Mambalo vuođđodieđuid, movt hálddašit iežat Mambalo Facebook-gávppi ja eará Mambalo Facebook-e-gávpe-app-fáttáid, de min Máhttovuođđu sáhttá leat stuorra veahkkin.",
  "Mambalo-tiima veahkeha maiddái miehtamielain. Sáhtát mii sáddet sáni milloin nu, ja mii vástidit nu jođánit go vejolaš.",
  "Google Smart Shopping doalvu du buktagiid viidáseappot go Google-ohcamii veahkehandihte máinnostit Shopping, YouTube, Gmail ja Google Display Network bokte.",
  "Maksimere vuovdimiid almmá eahpesihkarvuođa haga"
]
```

```json
  "Rievdat glásagávppašeddjiid máksi kundarin Facebook-uđđasitmárkanastimiin. Mottiin coahkkalemiin mii ráhkadit dárkilit čuozihuvvon máidnosiid, mat muittuhit iežat kundariidda buktagiid birra maid sii ledje smiehttamin, muhto eai lean oastán.",
  "Vuovdde juohke sajis",
  "Ásahis ja hálddaš Facebook-gávppi njuolga iežat Mambalo-stivrenpanela bokte. Vajálduhte sosiála juohkima. Don leat gárvvis sosiála vuovdimii.",
  "Vuorrbatgo liige hálddašeami birra? Mambalo synkronisere automáhtalaččat du buktandieđuid iežat neasstagávppis Facebookii, nu ahte juohke rievdadus mii dahkko boahtá njuolga oinnos du Facebook-e-gávpái. Daga dan oktii ja vajálduhte.",
  "Facebook-gávppi máinnosteapmi — dahkkon álkisin",
  "Facebook-piksel dahká máinnosteami Facebookas ollu beaktileabbon. Márkanaste álkidit iežat idealalaš vuostáiválditjovkui daid daguid vuođul maid sii leat dahkan du neasstagávppis, ja čuovo sin konversuvnnaid. Don eai dušše dieđe dárkilit geasa don máinnostat, muhto dus lea maiddái buoret áddejupmi das movt du máidnosat doaibmájit. Visot oktiibuot, don sáhtát dahkat iežat dieđuid nannoseabbon, mii buktá buoret ruhtadieđu du máinnosruđaide.",
  "Uđđasitmárkanaste. Juohkeoktii gii galleda du siiddu, dahje dušše olbmuide geat galledit dihto siidduid dahje dahket dihto daguid.",
  "Smidis sáhttu ja vearut: Integrerejuvvon stuorámus sáhttafálliiguin dego USPS, UPS, FedEx ja máŋggain earáiguin riikkaidgaskasaččat, vai automáhtalaččat rehkenastá sáhttomávssuid.",
  "WordPress e-gávpevejolašvuođat: Lasit iežat neasstagávppi WordPressii ja čájet seammá buktagiid, hattiid ja čilgehusaid iežat Facebook-gávppis dego WordPress-gávpeuvssas dahje eará siidoráhkadusprográmmas dego Weebly, Wix ja Adobe Muse.",
  "E-gávpismárkan mobiila-appat: Mambalo nuvttá iOS- ja Android-appaiguin don sáhtát hálddašit vuovdimiid, čuovvut lageriid ja vuostáiváldit neasstaluhtidemiid juohke sajis gos don leat.",
  "PCI DSS validerejuvvon dási 1 bálvalus: Fállá 55+ máksinválljema ja sihkaris HTTPS-máksinvuogi sihkkarastindihte ahte don čuovvut PCI DSS Dási 1 gáibádusaid.",
  "Leago vejolaš fárrehit iežat gávppi WooCommerceas Facebookii Mambaloin?",
  "Mun lean ain eahpesihkar ja dárbbašan eanet veahki Mambalo Facebook e-gávpe-appain. Maid mun galggan dahkat?",
  "Ale vajálduhte min Máhttovuođu ge. Jos don háliidat oahppat Mambalo vuođđodieđuid, movt hálddašit iežat Mambalo Facebook-gávppi ja eará Mambalo Facebook-e-gávpe-app-fáttáid, de min Máhttovuođđu sáhttá leat stuorra veahkkin.",
  "Mambalo-tiima veahkeha maiddái miehtamielain. Sáhtát mii sáddet sáni milloin nu, ja mii vástidit nu jođánit go vejolaš.",
  "Google Smart Shopping doalvu du buktagiid viidáseappot go Google-ohcamii veahkehandihte máinnostit Shopping, YouTube, Gmail ja Google Display Network bokte.",
  "Maksimere vuovdimiid almmá eahpesihkarvuođa haga"
]
```

I don't think y'all understand how excited I am to eat these.
I had them for the very first time when I last came to Portugal, and I was obsessed.
I ate about 50 of these.
Probably no exaggeration.
I ate so many of these when I was when I was last here.
And then I tried them in like other countries afterwards.
And they never hit the same.
They never hit the same.
So I'm having these again in Portugal.
Let's try them.
