Just so you know, Harriet and I didn't actually get back together.
What?
But I saw you kiss her.
Joan.
My acting like I liked you turned real.
And now I'm all confused because I got what I wanted.
But I don't think I want it anymore.
Like that time my parents got Fergie to perform at my ninth birthday and I was like, oh, this is sick.
Then she actually performed and I was like, oh, I forgot what Fergie sounds like.
Does that make sense?
It makes all the sense.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Buorre iđit máilbmit!
Mii letne mannamen ruskesajis dán iđit. Dat veahkeha rásket veahá dain áššiin, maid mii sirreheimmet ikte luoddaeranis. In jáhke ahte mii sáhttit rásket visot, earret jus váldit gielkká, muhto gielká lea dievva ruovddis mii galgá deadduvvot.
Maŋŋelaš soaitan joatkit kássaid páhkkemiin.
#BuorreIđitMáilbmit

Ruskesadjereissu lea dahkkon, ja vel okta biiladievas lea ráskejuvvon.
Lean váldán ođđa gielkká-aksela ja gielkká mohtorvuogádaga eret ruovderuskagielkkás. Dat mearkkaša ahte mii oažžut eambbo ruovderuskkiid dohko ja mii eat maiddái vahágis deadde daid osiid maid hálidan seailluhit.
Jáhkán ahte čuovvovaš lávki lea sirdigoahtit ruovderuskkiid duogárdis gielkái, vai dat lea gearggus fárrui.
Ruovderuskkemávssut eai leat nu alla dál, muhto lea buoret go ii mihkkige, jus doalvvon doarvái hávil.
Ferte vel sirret eará metallaid go ruovddi.

Dat dilli go leat váldimin guvrránan jorggožiid eret smávva, govda gieddemasinnajorggožiin....
Hirmus lossa bargu oažžut jorggoža nuppi beali eret, muhto dat lei duođai garrasit ruoston gitta rimmis nuppi bealde.
Dan botta go barget jorggoža luovvaniit, ledjen vajálduhttán ahte ledjen juo dahkan nuppi beali, ja nu rimma lei luovvanan muhto lei dárvvis jorggoža sisa!
Gártejin bidjat jorggoža fas gitta dan bealde, ja dasto bargat dan birra vai oažžun rimma eret.
Gártejin maiddái čuollat siseatnama vai oažžun dange eret!
Snoallan man galli jorggoža ferte vel luovvadahttit? Njeallje lean dahkan dán rádjai.

source_doc:
No, because you can't just say you want a divorce after so many years, and then you keep quiet.
Why now?
Why not now?
Tell me why not now?
Out.
Okay, fine.
I'll tell you.
I don't want to be in a loveless marriage anymore.
What?
You don't find it so.
No.
Okay.
Tell me, when did we meet?

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. Manne ii juste dál?
Muital munnje manne ii dál?
Olggos.
Ok, ortnegiis.

Mii?
Don it ane dálá dili dakkárin.
In.
Ok.
Muital munnje, goas moai deiviime?

source_doc:
Relentless Clan power past Steelers in statement home win

The Clan got off to a strong start with Joe Hazeldine slamming a first-time shot into the Sheffield net after some nice slip passing between Hugo Roy and Deven Sideroff.

Despite some strong defensive play from Glasgow, the Steelers found a breakthrough via Brien Diffley's sharp shooting through traffic before Mikko Juusola gave the visitors the lead with a deflected shot from right wing.

In the second period, the Clan saw momentum swing their way with Steven Seigo slipping a tidy finish from close-range past Matthew Greenfield to tie the game up.

Shortly after, Rylan Schwartz grabbed a go-ahead goal with a bullet from the backdoor after some luck with the Clan avoiding a too many men call.

Sheffield forced their way back into the game with Ryan Tait driving on net and backhanding a shot which Brine saved but didn't keep hold of as Kevin Tansey poked a third goal over the line for the visitors.

With the score line tied going into the final frame, the noise peaked inside Braehead and Glasgow gained control of the game.

Tristin Langan saw retribution for the ongoing battle he had to put up with throughout the game with Mitchell Heard as he cracked the bar with a beautiful finish to give his side the lead.

A holding penalty on Miihkali Teppo applied pressure to the hosts' advantage late on with the Steelers pulling their netminder for the extra attacker.

Langan grabbed his second of the game on the empty net though to round off the night with a well-earned and much-needed two points for the Clan on home ice.

Glasgow Clan head coach, Corey Neilson said after the game: "We were the better team. Our forecheck was excellent, that's something we've worked on all week and it was relentless tonight. The identity we were looking for is starting to show. It was really enjoyable to coach with full lines and take advantage of a team that's playing short, because usually we're on the other side of that."

Sheffield Steelers head coach, Aaron Fox, said: "I thought we were pretty good for the majority of the game. Glasgow jumped on us early, but our bounce back was good. Our guys were gassed by the end, we only had three lines but we were in the battle all game, I can't fault the compete level of our guys."
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Armas Clan vuittii Steelersa deatalaš ruovttumaleas

Clan álggahii gievrrat, go Joe Hazeldine bálkestii iežis vuosttaš boti Sheffield-muttu sisa maŋŋel go Hugo Roy ja Deven Sideroff leigga bures dárkkistan sirdimiid.

Vaikko Glasgow spillii gievrra bealuštusa, Steelers gávnnai rahpama Brien Diffley čorga boti bokte gassa coaga čađas, ovdal go Mikko Juusola sirdtii guossiid njunnošii botiin mii spiehkastii olgeš siiddus.

Nuppi oasis Clan oaččui spilla iežas hálbái, go Steven Seigo sirdtii čorga loahpahusa lagas gaskkas Matthew Greenfield duohpái ja dássádii spealu.

Oanehis bottu maŋŋel Rylan Schwartz vieččai jođihanboalu dakkár botiin duogábealde maŋŋel go Clanis lei lihkku ja gárttai evtheastat "liiggás olu olbmot" -ráŋggáštusas.

Sheffield bákcii iežas ruovttoluotta spellii go Ryan Tait vulggii mulla guvlui ja bálkestii boti gieđain, maid Brine gádjui, muhto ii nollon, ja Kevin Tansey bákcii goalmmát moli sisa guossiid ovddas.

Go loahppaoassi álggii dássatboaluin, jietna badjánii Braeheadis ja Glasgow válddii spealu háldui.

Tristin Langan oaččui mávssu dan dálá dáistaleamis mii sus lei leamaš miehtá spealu Mitchell Heardain, go son bálkestii boti muorrii čáppa loahpahusain mii sirdtii iežas joavkku njunnošii.

Miihkali Teppo doallanráŋggáštus bijai deaddaga ruovttujoavkku ovdamunnái maŋŋit spealus, go Steelers válddii eret mulfávrru oažžun dihte liige spelli.

Langan dattetge skorei iežas nuppi moli dán spealus guoros mullii ja loahpahii eahkeda guovtti ánssášuvvon ja hui dárbbašlaš čuoggáin Clanis iežas ruovttujieŋas.

Glasgow Clana váldohárjeheaddji Corey Neilson dajai maŋŋel spealu: "Mii leimmet buoret joavku. Min forecheck lei eami, dan leat mii hárjehallan miehtá vahku ja dat lei vuollaneameahttun odne. Dat identitehta maid leat ohcan lea álgi dál oidnot. Lei hui somá hárjehit olles raddemiiguin ja ávkkástallat joavkkus mii spillii vátna spelliiguin, go dábálaččat mii leat ieža dan dilis."

Sheffield Steelersa váldohárjeheaddji Aaron Fox dajai: "Mun gal logan ahte mii leimmet oalle buorit eanas oasis spealus. Glasgow fallehii min árrat, muhto min máhccankas lei buorre. Min spelleat ledje hui váiban loahpas, mis ledje dušše golbma raddema muhto mii leimmet fárus dáistaleamis olles spealu, mun in sáhte váidit min spelliid gilvalandási."

Dat identitehta maid leat ohcan lea álgi dál oidnot. Lei hui somá hárjehit olles raddemiiguin ja ávkkástallat joavkkus mii spillii vátna spelliiguin, go dábálaččat mii leat ieža dan dilis."

Sheffield Steelersa váldohárjeheaddji Aaron Fox dajai: "Mun gal logan ahte mii leimmet oalle buorit eanas oasis spealus. Glasgow fallehii min árrat, muhto min máhccankas lei buorre. Min spelleat ledje hui váiban loahpas, mis ledje dušše golbma raddema muhto mii leimmet fárus dáistaleamis olles spealu, inge sáhte moaitit min spelliid gilvalandási."
hypo_7:
Sitkes Clan vuittii gievrrat Steelersa dehálaš ruovttumuttus

Clan álggahii gievrrat, go Joe Hazeldine bálkestii boti njuolga Sheffield-muttui maŋŋel go Hugo Roy ja Deven Sideroff leigga čábbát sirdán dálkkažiid gaskaneaskka.

Vaikko Glasgow spillii gievrra bealuštusspela, Steelers gávnnai rahpama Brien Diffley dárkilis boti bokte spelliid gaskkas, ovdal go Mikko Juusola sirdtii guossiid njunnošii botiin mii spiehkastii olgeš siiddus.

Nuppi oasis speallu jorggii Clana buorrin, go Steven Seigo sirdtii čorga loahpahusa lagas gaskkas Matthew Greenfield duohpái ja dássádii spealu.

Oanehis bottu maŋŋel Rylan Schwartz vieččai jođihanmoli fástes botiin duogábealde maŋŋel go Clanis lei lihkku ja gárttai evtheastat "liiggás olu olbmot" -ráŋggáštusas.

Sheffield bákcii iežas ruovttoluotta spellii, go Ryan Tait vulggii mulla guvlui ja bálkestii boti gieđain, maid Brine gádjui, muhto ii nollon, ja Kevin Tansey bákcii goalmmát moli sisa guossiid ovddas.

Go loahppaoassi álggii dássatboaluin, jietna badjánii eanemusat Braeheadis ja Glasgow válddii spealu hálduideaset.

Tristin Langan oaččui mávssu dan dáistaleamis mii sus lei leamaš miehtá spealu Mitchell Heardain, go son bálkestii boti muorrii čáppa loahpahusain mii sirdtii iežas joavkku njunnošii.

Miihkali Teppo doallanráŋggáštus bijai deaddaga ruovttujoavkku ovdamunnái maŋŋit spealus, go Steelers válddii eret mulfávrru oažžun dihte liige spelli.

Langan dattetge skorei iežas nuppi moli dán spealus guoros mullii ja loahpahii eahkeda guovtti ánssášuvvon ja hui dárbbašlaš čuoggáin Clanis iežas ruovttujieŋas.

source_doc:
Ate a little more chicken and had a wash. Also had a little more fight when I made her take her fluids last.
We phoned the vet at 830 this morning to ask if they looked under her soft pallet while she was sedated, as she has major ear polyps. Was told the vet would call back. They didn't, rang just now (1645 local) and was told the vet wasn't in today. I was a bit annoyed and said "we paid you over £600 yesterday, you said phone if we have questions, we have questions you're not answering!"
"I don't like your tone, sir "
"It's not your fault personally, but when I pay the better part of a grand I expect a level of service that you're not providing"
"I'll get a vet from the other branch to ring you"

Seeing vet at other practise at half seven for more anti nausea medicine. They're not going to charge out of hours rate as we rang first thing.
Just got another 10ml of rescue fluids into her.

Back. Anti nausea jab, gabapentin, and she's home. Ate some chicken and some cheese.
Got more gabapentin in pill form for her, too

Won't stop eating. Having to slow her down to prevent her from vomiting. She's also absolutely, completely, totally, off her tits. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Fully in the yellow submarine.
Vet says this'll reset her appetite, or, when we stop giving her painkillers, show it's pain stopping her eating, which would mean medical imaging time.

She's eating a bit, and even played a little, but she's still on the medications so it might be that. Still giving her recovery fluids, which she's still not fighting as she would normally.

Valencia has decided we are all Suspicious. Won't come when called, runs if you go to her. Still comes on her own terms, so it's fine, she's just seen her adoptive sister repeatedly wrapped in a towel and made to drink Stuff, and she wants none of that, thank you very much.

Ming update: she's a little more active, but still floppy and sleeping a lot. She's on two lots of painkillers still, so she's probably fairly stoned.
She IS eating, little and often, and finished off the last of her rescue fluids from a saucer by herself. She's washing, but she hasn't slapped valencia in ages, and she's still not right. Hoping it's the painkillers, and that when we withdraw them, her appetite remains.

Ming has finished the course of painkillers and is showing determined desire to go out, which we're not allowing yet. She's eating, playing, but it'll be a few days until the drugs are cleared from her system and we'll then see how she is.
Cautiously optimistic.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Borai veahá eanet vuonccavuoššala ja basadii. Vástalii maiddái veahá eanet go bággejin su juhkat gárvvesčázi maŋimusat.
Sávenet dán iđit dihtor 8.30 dálkkodeaddjái ja jearasimet geahčadedje go sii su litna giergaga vuollái go lei ráfáiduhttojuvvon, go sus leat dakkár stuorra bealljepolypat. Sáddejedje sáni ahte dálkkodeaddji riŋge ruovttoluotta. Eai riŋgen, riŋgejin aiddo dál (báikkálaš áiggi 16.45) ja gullen ahte dálkkodeaddji ii leat dál dás odne. Ledjen veahá moaráš ja daddjon "mii máksiimet didjiide badjel 600 lihtte-ruvnno ikte, sáhkaniidde ahte galgat riŋget juos leat jearaldagat, mis leat jearaldagat maidda ehpet vástid dál!"
"Ii liiko du jietna, hearra"
"Ii dat leat persovnnalaččat du sáhka, muhto go máksá measta duhát lihtte-ruvnno de vuordá dakkár bálvalusdási maid ehpet dál fála"
"Bággen nubbi bálgá dálkkodeaddji riŋget dutnje"

Oaidnalit dálkkodeaddji nubbi bálgás beal gávcci áigge oažžut eanet dálkasa vuovssi vuostá. Eai áiggo váldit moari-maŋŋel-áigi mávssu go riŋgejuivvu gaskavahko iđđes dakkaviđe.
Ožžon vel 10ml gárvvesčázi sutnje.

Ruovttoluotta. Moari-maostun-boahkuheapmi, gabapentin, ja son lea ruovttus. Borai veahá vuonccavuoššala ja veahá vuosttá.
Ožžon eanet gabapentina maid bábir-hámis sutnje maiddái

Ii báljo bisse borramis. Ferte su bissehit veahá vai ii vuovssat. Son lea maiddái áibbas, ollislaččat, dievaslaččat, jalla-mielas. Áibbas gárren. Duolvvas. Gievrras jalla-mielas. Áibbas fiskes čázevulošfanas dás dál.
Dálkkodeaddji lohká ahte dát galgá ordnet su borranlusttu, dahje go loahpahetne dálkkodeaddji bákčas-dálkasiid, de čájeha ahte bávččas lea dat mii eastá su borramis, mii fas mearkkašivččii ahte fertet dálkkodeaddji govaide.

Borada veahá, ja spealai veahá maiddái, muhto lea dál vel dálkasiid mielde nu ahte soaitá dat mii váikkuha. Vel addimin sutnje gárvvesčázi, man vuostá ii velge vástalut nu go dábálaččat báljo dahká.

Valencia lea mearridan ahte mii leat buohkat Eahpádusat. Ii boađe go gohčču, gárgá juos manná su lusa. Boahtá vel go ieš hálida, nu ahte dat lea buorre, lea aiddo oaidnán iežas adoptiiva-oappá fáhtejuvvon liidni sisa máŋgii ja bággejuvvon juhkat Juonid, ja ii hálit dakkár dál, giitu goitge ollu.

Ming-diehtu: son lea veahá eanet lihkadeamis, muhto lea velge nannos ja oađđá ollu. Sus leat dál guokte sierranas bákčas-dálkasa, nu ahte lea kánske veahá jalla-mielas vel.
Son BORÁ goitge, veahá ja dávjá, ja gearggahii ieš gárvvesčázi man mii leat bidjan tallearkka ala sutnje. Basada, muhto ii leat Valencia jorggiidan dábálaččat guhká, ja ii leat velge áibbas buorre. Sávašeimme ahte dat leat bákčas-dálkasat, ja go stopteat daid, de borranlustu báhcá.

Ming lea geargan bákčas-dálkasiiguin ja čájeha dál gievrras dátu mannat olggos, maid mii eat vel divtte. Son borá, spealla, muhto dása manná moadde beaivvi ovdal go dálkasat leat eret su rumaš-vuogádagas ja de oaidnit mo son lea.
Várrogas optimistilaš.
hypo_1:
Borai fas veahá eanet vuonccavuoššala ja basadii. Lei maiddái veahá eanet vuostálastinmoddus go bággejin su juhkat gárvvesčázi maŋimusat.
Mii riŋgiimet elledálkkodeaddjái dán iđit dihto 8:30 ja jearaimet geahčadedje go sii su litna giergaga vuollái go son lei ráfáiduhttojuvvon, go sus leat dakkár stuorra bealljepolypat. Sii lohke ahte elledálkkodeaddji riŋge ruovttoluotta. Eai riŋgen, riŋgii aiddo dál (báikkálaš áiggi 16:45) ja gullen ahte dálkkodeaddji ii leat dál dás odne. Ledjen veahá moaráš ja dadden "mii máksiimet didjiide badjel 600 lihtte-ruvnno ikte, dii lohkašeiddet ahte galgat riŋget juos leat jearaldagat, mis leat jearaldagat maidda ehpet vástid!"
"Ii liiko du jietna, hearra"
"Ii dat leat persovnnalaččat du sáhka, muhto go máksá measta duhát lihtte-ruvnno de vuordá dakkár bálvalusdási maid ehpet fála"
"Bággen nubbi bálgá dálkkodeaddji riŋget dutnje"

Oaidnalit dálkkodeaddji nubbi bálgás beal gávcci áigge oažžut eanet dálkasa vuovssi vuostá. Eai áiggo váldit liigemávssu go riŋgiimet dakkaviđe iđđes.
Ožžon vel 10ml gárvvesčázi sutnje sisa.

Ruovttoluotta. Moari-boahkuheapmi, gabapentin, ja son lea ruovttus. Borai veahá vuonccavuoššala ja veahá vuosttá.
Ožžon eanet gabapentina pillarahámis sutnje maiddái

Ii bisse borramis. Fertet su gohcit giddet vai ii vuovssat. Son lea maiddái áibbas, ollislaččat, dievaslaččat, jalla-mielas. Áibbas gárren. Duolvvas. Gievrras gárrenmoddus. Áibbas fiskes čázevulošfanas dás dál.
Elledálkkodeaddji lohká ahte dát galgá ordnet su borranlusttu, dahje go loahpahetne bákčas-dálkasiid, de čájeha ahte bávččas lea dat mii eastá su borramis, mii fas mearkkašivččii ahte fertet dálkkodeaddji govaide.

Borada veahá, ja spealai veahá maiddái, muhto lea dál vel dálkasiid mielde nu ahte soaitá dat mii váikkuha. Vel addimin sutnje gárvvesčázi, man vuostá ii velge vástalut nu go dábálaččat dahká.

Valencia lea mearridan ahte mii leat buohkat Eahpádusat. Ii boađe go gohčču, gárgá juos manná su lusa. Boahtá vel go ieš hálida, nu ahte dat lea buorre, lea aiddo oaidnán iežas adoptiiva-oappá fáhtejuvvon liidni sisa máŋgii ja bággejuvvon juhkat Juonid, ja ii hálit dakkár dál ollige, giitu goitge ollu.

Ming-diehtu: son lea veahá eanet lihkadeamis, muhto lea velge nannos ja oađđá ollu. Sus leat dál guokte sierranas bákčas-dálkasa, nu ahte lea kánske veahá jalla-mielas vel.
Son BORÁ goitge, veahá ja dávjá, ja gearggahii ieš gárvvesčázi man mii leat bidjan tallearkka ala sutnje. Basada, muhto ii leat Valencia jorggiidan dábálaččat guhká, ja ii leat velge áibbas buorre. Sávašeimme ahte dat leat bákčas-dálkasat, ja ahte go stopteat daid, de borranlustu báhcá.

Ming lea geargan bákčas-dálkasiiguin ja čájeha dál gievrras dátu mannat olggos, maid mii eat vel divtte. Son borá, spealla, muhto dása manná moadde beaivvi ovdal go dálkasat leat eret su rumaš-vuogádagas ja de oaidnit mo son lea.
Várrogas optimistilaš.

Ming lea geargan bákčas-dálkasiiguin ja čájeha dál gievrras dátu mannat olggos, maid mii eat vel divtte. Son borá, spealla, muhto dása manná moadde beaivvi ovdal go dálkasat leat eret su rumaš-vuogádagas ja de oaidnit mo son lea.
Várrogas optimistilaš.
hypo_7:
Borai fas veahá eanet vuonccaláibmi ja basadii. Lei maiddái veahá eanet vuostálastinmoddus go bággejin su juhkat gárvvesčázi maŋimusat.
Mii riŋgiimet elledálkkodeaddjái dán iđit dihto 8:30 ja jearaimet geahčadedje go sii su litna giergaga vuollái go son lei ráfáiduhttojuvvon, go sus leat dakkár stuorra bealljepolypat. Sii lohke ahte elledálkkodeaddji riŋge ruovttoluotta. Eai riŋgen, riŋgiimet aiddo dál (báikkálaš áiggi 16:45) ja guliimet ahte dálkkodeaddji ii leat dás odne. Ledjen veahá moaráš ja dadden "mii máksiimet didjiide badjel £600 ikte, dii lohkašeiddet ahte galgat riŋget juos leat jearaldagat, mis leat jearaldagat maidda ehpet vástid!"
"Ii liiko du jietna, hearra"
"Ii dat leat persovnnalaččat du sáhka, muhto go máksá measta duhát lihtte-ruvnno de vuordá dakkár bálvalusdási maid ehpet fála"
"Bággen nuppi bálgá dálkkodeaddji riŋget dutnje"

Oaidnalit dálkkodeaddji nuppi bálgás beal gávcci áigge oažžut eanet dálkasa vuovssi vuostá. Eai áiggo váldit liigemávssu go riŋgiimet dakkaviđe iđđes.
Ožžon vel 10ml gárvvesčázi sutnje sisa.

Ruovttoluotta. Vuovsen-eastadanboahkuheapmi, gabapentin, ja son lea ruovttus. Borai veahá vuonccaláibmi ja veahá vuosttá.
Ožžon eanet gabapentina pillarahámis sutnje maiddái

Ii bisse borramis. Fertet su gohcit giddet vai ii vuovssat. Son lea maiddái áibbas, ollislaččat, dievaslaččat, jalla-mielas. Áibbas gárren. Duolvvas. Gievrras gárrenmoddus. Áibbas fiskes čázevulošfanas dás dál.
Elledálkkodeaddji lohká ahte dát galgá ordnet su borranlusttu, dahje go loahpahetne bákčas-dálkasiid, de čájeha ahte bávččas lea dat mii eastá su borramis, mii fas mearkkašivččii ahte fertet dálkkodeaddji govaide.

Borada veahá, ja spealai veahá maiddái, muhto lea dál vel dálkasiid mielde nu ahte soaitá dat mii váikkuha. Vel addimin sutnje gárvvesčázi, man vuostá ii velge vástalut nu go dábálaččat dahká.

Valencia lea mearridan ahte mii leat buohkat eahpárassii dakkárat. Ii boađe go gohčču, gárgá juos manná su lusa. Boahtá vel go ieš hálida, nu ahte dat lea buorre, lea aiddo oaidnán iežas adoptiiva-oappá fáhtejuvvon liidni sisa máŋgii ja bággejuvvon juhkat juorranas ávdnasiid, ja ii hálit dakkár dál ollige, giitu goitge ollu.

Ming-diehtu: son lea veahá eanet lihkadeamis, muhto lea velge splatnja ja oađđá ollu. Sus leat dál guokte sierranas bákčas-dálkasa, nu ahte lea kánske veahá jalla-mielas vel.
Son BORÁ goitge, veahá ja dávjá, ja gearggahii ieš gárvvesčázi man mii leat bidjan tallearkka ala sutnje. Basada, muhto ii leat Valencia jorggiidan dábálaččat guhká, ja ii leat velge áibbas buorre. Sávašeimme ahte dat leat bákčas-dálkasat, ja ahte go stopteat daid, de borranlustu báhcá.

Ming lea geargan bákčas-dálkasiiguin ja čájeha dál gievrras dátu mannat olggos, maid mii eat vel divtte. Son borá, spealla, muhto dása manná moadde beaivvi ovdal go dálkasat leat eret su rumaš-vuogádagas ja de oaidnit mo son lea.
Várrogas optimistilaš.

source_doc:
This morning while walking to work I had a thought: is it possible that the reason why the perception of the #replyGuy problem being worse on #Mastodon (and the #Fediverse in general) is due to sheer (lack of) numbers?
So I came up with a simplified model to check if this was indeed sufficient to explain the phenomenon.
Let's assume that, similarly to Mario Cipolla's Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, the fraction of reply guys in a population is a given constant ρ.
1/n
#maths

Let's also assume for simplicity that reply guys operate mechanically, i.e. do not use some kind of automation to find posts to reply to. This puts an upper limit to the total number of posts a reply guy can reply to in the course of a single day. Let's call this D.
We can also assume that on average a single non-reply-guy will generally post P < D posts per day.
Ignoring for a moment larger timeframes than a single day (but the discussion is similar if we extend the observation period) …
2/n

 … and assuming replyguys select randomly the posts to reply to (i.e. they don't specifically target a person for any particular reason), can we calculate what is the probability that a given person will see at least one reply from a reply guy?
Before doing the actual math, let's look at some practical example. Let's say that 1 in 10 users are reply guys, a reply guy goes through 100 posts per day, and a regular user posts 10 messages per day.
3/n

If there are 10 users in the network, 9 are regular users and 1 is a reply guy. There are 90 regular posts per day, and the the single reply guy will see ALL of them (because they can read 100 posts per day, so they see all the posts made on that network on that day.
However, if there are 100 users in the network, 10 of which are reply guys, the network will produce 900 posts in a day, but reply guys will NOT necessarily see all of them!
4/n

In the second scenario, each reply guy will see 100 random posts of the 900. Even if there are 10 reply guys, this does NOT mean that each post will be found by a reply guy! There may be posts that are seen by multiple reply guys, and posts that will not be seen by any reply guy!
So how do we compute the probability for a post to be seen by a reply guy in this case?
One way to do this is to compute the probability of NOT being seen by ANY reply guy, and taking the complement.
5/n

Now, since each reply guy sees 100 of the 900 posts, each post has a 1/9 probability of being seen by any particular reply guy, i.e. an 8/9 probability of NOT being seen by that particular reply guy. The probability of not being seen by ANY reply guy is thus 8/9 for each reply guy and assuming that the probabilities are independent, this means that the probability of not being seen by any of the 10 reply guys is (8/9)^10, which is 0.30794....
6/n

This means that the probability for each post to be seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guy is 1-(8/9)^10 or approximately 69%.
Of course, if someone posts 10 posts per day, then the probability for them to come across a reply guy is higher than that, because it will be the probability of at least on their post being seen by at least one reply guy!
Again assuming that for each post the probabilities are independent, the math is only slightly more complex:
6/n

each post has a (8/9)^10 probability of not being seen, but for the probability for ALL posts not being seen, that has to be further elevated to the number of posts made by the same person, which is 10, so (8/9)^100, and the probability of AT LEAST ONE POST being seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guys becomes 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… which is not 100% but very close to it.
This was the case of a network 100 people, 10 of which are reply guys. Let's do one more and then go general.
7/n

Let's now assume the network has 100K users, still with the same 10% of reply guys (90K regular users, 10K reply guys).
Each reply guy still reads 100 posts per day, and the regular users still produce 10 posts per day.
This means that in a single day the regular users produce 900K posts, and each reply guys reads 100 of those 900K posts!
Still under the randomness assumption, this means that a single reply guy will only see 100/900K posts!
8/n
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Dán iđit go vázzen bargui, de bođii munnje dakkár jurdda miehtá: leago dakkár vejolašvuohta ahte sivva dasa go #replyGuy-problema adnojuvvo vearrát #Mastodon-bálvalusas (ja #Fediverse:s oppalaččat) lea dušše fal olmmošlogus?

Nappo ledjen duddjon ovttasgielat modealla iskan dihte, leago dat duođai doarvái čilget dán ilme.
Jáhkket dál, Mario Cipolla olmmošlaš jallavuođa vuođđolágaid láhkai, ahte reply guy -olbmoid oassi populatšuvnnas lea dakkár konstánta ρ.
1/o
#matematihkká

Jáhkket maid ovttasgielatvuođa dihte ahte reply guy -olbmot barget mekaanalaččat, dehege eai geavahva makkárge automatihka gávdnat postejumiid maidda vástidit. Dat bidjá badjerájá dasa, man galli postejupmái reply guy sáhttá vástidit ovtta beaivve áigge. Gohčodit dán D:n.
Sáhttit maid jáhkkit ahte gaskamearálaččat okta dábálaš olmmoš (gii ii leat reply guy) poste P < D postejumi beaivve áigge.
Vejolaččat dál hilgut guhkit áiggi go ovtta beaivve (muhto ságastallan lea seammálágan go viiddidit áicanáigodaga) ...
2/o

... ja jáhkket ahte replyguy-olbmot válljejit soaittáhagas postejumiid maidda vástidit (dehege eai vikka dihto olbmo postejumiide makkárge dihto sivas). Sáhttitgo mii rehkenastit, mii lea vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto olmmoš oaidná unnimustá ovtta vástádusa reply guy -olbmos?
Ovdal go rehkenastigoađit, de geahčat muhtun geavatlaš ovdamearkka. Jáhkket ahte 1 user 10:s lea reply guy, okta reply guy geahčada 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, ja dábálaš geavaheaddji poste 10 sáni beaivve áigge.
3/o

Jos fierpmádagas leat 10 geavaheaddji, 9 leat dábálaš geavaheaddjit ja 1 lea reply guy. Dábálaš postejumit leat 90 beaivve áigge, ja dat okta reply guy oaidná daid BUOT (danne go son sáhttá lohkat 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, nu ahte son oaidná buot dán fierpmádaga postejumiid dán beaivve.
Muhto jos fierpmádagas leat 100 geavaheaddji, main 10 leat reply guy -olbmot, fierpmádat buvttada 900 postejumi beaivve áigge, muhto reply guy -olbmot eai dárbbatlaččat oainne daid buot!
4/o

Nuppi dilit, juohke reply guy oaidná 100 soaittáhagas válljejuvvon postejumi 900 postejumis. Vaikko gávdnojit 10 reply guy -olbmo, dat ii dárkkut ahte reply guy gávdná juohke postejumi! Sáhttet leat postejumit maid máŋga reply guy oaidnit, ja postejumit maid ii oktage reply guy oainne!
Nu ahte mot mii rehkenastit vejolašvuođa dasa ahte reply guy oaidná postejumi dán dilit?
Okta vuohki lea rehkenastit vejolašvuođa dasa ahte ii oktage reply guy oainne postejumi, ja váldit das complementa.
5/o

Dál, go juohke reply guy oaidná 100 postejumi 900 postejumis, de juohke postejumis lea 1/9 vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto reply guy oaidná dan, dehege 8/9 vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto reply guy ii oainne dan. Vejolašvuohta dasa ahte ii oktage reply guy oainne postejumi lea nu 8/9 juohke reply guy dáfus ja go jáhkkit ahte vejolašvuođat leat sorjjasmeahttumat, dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta dasa ahte ii oktage dán 10 reply guy -olbmos oainne postejumi lea (8/9)^10, mii lea 0.30794....
6/o

Dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta dasa ahte UNNIMUSTÁ OKTA reply guy oaidná juohke postejumi lea 1-(8/9)^10 dehe sullii 69%.
Dieđusge, jos muhtun poste 10 postejumi beaivve áigge, de vejolašvuohta dasa ahte son deaivá reply guy lea stuorát go dat, danne go dat lea vejolašvuohta dasa ahte unnimustá ovtta su postejumis oaidná unnimustá okta reply guy!
Fas jáhkket ahte juohke postejumi dáfus vejolašvuođat leat sorjjasmeahttumat, de matematihkká lea dušše veahá eanet mohkkái:
6/o

juohke postejumis lea (8/9)^10 vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dat ii oidno, muhto vejolašvuohta dasa ahte BUOT postejumit eai oidno, de dat ferte lasihuvvot dan loguin man galle postejumi seamma olmmoš lea dahkan, mii lea 10, nu ahte (8/9)^100, ja vejolašvuohta dasa ahte UNNIMUSTÁ OVTTA POSTEJUMI oaidná UNNIMUSTÁ OKTA reply guy šaddá 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… mii ii leat 100% muhto hui lahka dán.
Dát lei dilli go fierpmádagas ledje 100 olbmo, main 10 ledje reply guy -olbmot. Dahkat dál vel ovtta ja dasto dahkat dan almmolažžan.
7/o

Jáhkket dál ahte fierpmádagas leat 100K geavaheaddji, seamma 10% reply guy -olbmoin (90K dábálaš geavaheaddji, 10K reply guy).
Juohke reply guy lohká ain 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, ja dábálaš geavaheaddjit buvttadit ain 10 postejumi beaivve áigge.
Dat mearkkaša ahte ovtta beaivve áigge dábálaš geavaheaddjit buvttadit 900K postejumi, ja juohke reply guy lohká 100 dán 900K postejumis!
Ain dán soaittáhagas-jáhkus, dat mearkkaša ahte okta reply guy oaidná dušše 100/900K postejumi!
8/o

Dát lei dilli go fierpmádagas ledje 100 olbmo, main 10 ledje reply guy -olbmot. Dahkat dál vel ovtta ja dasto dahkat dan almmolažžan.
7/o

Jáhkket dál ahte fierpmádagas leat 100K geavaheaddji, seamma 10% reply guy -olbmoin (90K dábálaš geavaheaddji, 10K reply guy).
Juohke reply guy lohká ain 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, ja dábálaš geavaheaddjit buvttadit ain 10 postejumi beaivve áigge.
Dat mearkkaša ahte ovtta beaivve áigge dábálaš geavaheaddjit buvttadit 900K postejumi, ja juohke reply guy lohká 100 dán 900K postejumis!
Ain dán soaittáhagas-jáhkus, dat mearkkaša ahte okta reply guy oaidná dušše 100/900K postejumi!
8/o
hypo_2:
Dán iđit go vázzen bargui, de bođii munnje dakkár jurdda miehtá: leago dakkár vejolašvuohta ahte sivva dasa go #replyGuy-problema adnojuvvo vearrát #Mastodon-bálvalusas (ja #Fediverse:s oppalaččat) lea dušše fal olmmošlogu (vátnivuođas)?
Nu ahte duddjojin ovttasgielat modealla iskan dihte, leago dat duođai doarvái čilget dán ilme.
Jáhkket dál, Mario Cipolla olmmošlaš jallavuođa vuođđolágaid láhkai, ahte reply guy -olbmo oassi populatšuvnnas lea dihto konstánta ρ.
1/o
#matematihkká

Jáhkket maid ovttasgielatvuođa dihte ahte reply guy -olbmot barget mekaanalaččat, dehege eai geavahva makkárge automatihka gávdnat postejumiid maidda vástidit. Dat bidjá badjerájá dasa, man galli postejupmái reply guy sáhttá vástidit ovtta beaivve áigge. Gohčodit dán D:n.
Sáhttit maid jáhkkit ahte gaskamearálaččat okta dábálaš olmmoš (gii ii leat reply guy) poste P < D postejumi beaivve áigge.
Vejolaččat dál hilgut guhkit áiggi go ovtta beaivve (muhto ságastallan lea seammálágan go viiddidit áicanáigodaga) ...
2/o

... ja jáhkket ahte replyguy-olbmot válljejit soaittáhagas postejumiid maidda vástidit (dehege eai vikka dihto olbmo postejumiide makkárge dihto sivas), de sáhttitgo mii rehkenastit, mii lea vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto olmmoš oaidná unnimustá ovtta vástádusa reply guy -olbmos?
Ovdal go rehkenastigoađit, de geahčat muhtun geavatlaš ovdamearkka. Jáhkket ahte 1 geavaheaddji 10:s lea reply guy, okta reply guy geahčada 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, ja dábálaš geavaheaddji poste 10 sáni beaivve áigge.
3/o

Jos fierpmádagas leat 10 geavaheaddji, 9 leat dábálaš geavaheaddjit ja 1 lea reply guy. Dábálaš postejumit leat 90 beaivve áigge, ja dat okta reply guy oaidná daid BUOT (danne go son sáhttá lohkat 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, nu ahte son oaidná buot dán fierpmádaga postejumiid dán beaivve.
Muhto jos fierpmádagas leat 100 geavaheaddji, main 10 leat reply guy -olbmot, fierpmádat buvttada 900 postejumi beaivve áigge, muhto reply guy -olbmot eai dárbbatlaččat oainne daid buot!
4/o

Nuppi dilit, juohke reply guy oaidná 100 soaittáhagas válljejuvvon postejumi 900 postejumis. Vaikko gávdnojit 10 reply guy -olbmo, dat ii dárkkut ahte reply guy gávdná juohke postejumi! Sáhttet leat postejumit maid máŋga reply guy oaidnit, ja postejumit maid ii oktage reply guy oainne!
Nu ahte mot mii rehkenastit vejolašvuođa dasa ahte reply guy oaidná postejumi dán dilit?
Okta vuohki lea rehkenastit vejolašvuođa dasa ahte ii oktage reply guy oainne postejumi, ja váldit das complementa.
5/o

Dál, go juohke reply guy oaidná 100 postejumi 900 postejumis, de juohke postejumis lea 1/9 vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto reply guy oaidná dan, dehege 8/9 vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto reply guy ii oainne dan. Vejolašvuohta dasa ahte ii oktage reply guy oainne postejumi lea nu 8/9 juohke reply guy dáfus ja go jáhkkit ahte vejolašvuođat leat sorjjasmeahttumat, dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta dasa ahte ii oktage dán 10 reply guy -olbmos oainne postejumi lea (8/9)^10, mii lea 0.30794....
6/o

Dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta dasa ahte UNNIMUSTÁ OKTA reply guy oaidná juohke postejumi lea 1-(8/9)^10 dehe sullii 69%.
Dieđusge, jos muhtun poste 10 postejumi beaivve áigge, de vejolašvuohta dasa ahte son deaivá reply guy lea stuorát go dat, danne go dat lea vejolašvuohta dasa ahte unnimustá ovtta su postejumis oaidná unnimustá okta reply guy!
Fas jáhkket ahte juohke postejumi dáfus vejolašvuođat leat sorjjasmeahttumat, de matematihkká lea dušše veahá eanet mohkkái:

juohke postejumis lea (8/9)^10 vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dat ii oidno, muhto vejolašvuohta dasa ahte BUOT postejumit eai oidno, de dat ferte lasihuvvot dan loguin man galle postejumi seamma olmmoš lea dahkan, mii lea 10, nu ahte (8/9)^100, ja vejolašvuohta dasa ahte UNNIMUSTÁ OVTTA POSTEJUMI oaidná UNNIMUSTÁ OKTA reply guy šaddá 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… mii ii leat 100% muhto hui lahka dán.
Dát lei dilli go fierpmádagas ledje 100 olbmo, main 10 ledje reply guy -olbmot. Dahkat dál vel ovtta ja dasto dahkat dan almmolažžan.
7/o

Jáhkket dál ahte fierpmádagas leat 100K geavaheaddji, seamma 10% reply guy -olbmoin (90K dábálaš geavaheaddji, 10K reply guy).
Juohke reply guy lohká ain 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, ja dábálaš geavaheaddjit buvttadit ain 10 postejumi beaivve áigge.
Dat mearkkaša ahte ovtta beaivve áigge dábálaš geavaheaddjit buvttadit 900K postejumi, ja juohke reply guy lohká 100 dán 900K postejumis!
Ain dán soaittáhagas-jáhkus, dat mearkkaša ahte okta reply guy oaidná dušše 100/900K postejumi!
8/o
hypo_6:
Dán iđit go vázzen bargui, de bođii munnje dakkár jurdda miehtá: leago dakkár vejolašvuohta ahte sivva dasa go #replyGuy-problema adnojuvvo vearrát #Mastodon-bálvalusas (ja #Fediverse:s oppalaččat) lea dušše fal olmmošlogu (vátnivuođas)?
Nu ahte duddjojin ovttasgielat modealla iskan dihte, leago dat duođai doarvái čilget dán ilme.
Jáhkket dál, Mario Cipolla olmmošlaš jallavuođa vuođđolágaid láhkai, ahte reply guy -olbmo oassi populatšuvnnas lea dihto konstánta ρ.
1/o
#matematihkká

Jáhkket maid ovttasgielatvuođa dihte ahte reply guy -olbmot barget mekaanalaččat, dehege eai geavahva makkárge automatihka gávdnat postejumiid maidda vástidit. Dat bidjá badjerájá dasa, man galli postejupmái reply guy sáhttá vástidit ovtta beaivve áigge. Gohčodit dán D:n.
Sáhttit maid jáhkkit ahte gaskamearálaččat okta dábálaš olmmoš (gii ii leat reply guy) poste P < D postejumi beaivve áigge.
Vejolaččat dál hilgut guhkit áiggi go ovtta beaivve (muhto ságastallan lea seammálágan go viiddidit áicanáigodaga) ...
2/o

... ja jáhkket ahte replyguy-olbmot válljejit soaittáhagas postejumiid maidda vástidit (dehege eai vikka dihto olbmo postejumiide makkárge dihto sivas), de sáhttitgo mii rehkenastit, mii lea vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto olmmoš oaidná unnimustá ovtta vástádusa reply guy -olbmos?
Ovdal go rehkenastigoađit, de geahčat muhtun geavatlaš ovdamearkka. Jáhkket ahte 1 geavaheaddji 10:s lea reply guy, okta reply guy geahčada 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, ja dábálaš geavaheaddji poste 10 sáni beaivve áigge.
3/o

Jos fierpmádagas leat 10 geavaheaddji, 9 leat dábálaš geavaheaddjit ja 1 lea reply guy. Dábálaš postejumit leat 90 beaivve áigge, ja dat okta reply guy oaidná daid BUOT (danne go son sáhttá lohkat 100 postejumi beaivve áigge, nu ahte son oaidná buot dán fierpmádaga postejumiid dán beaivve.
Muhto jos fierpmádagas leat 100 geavaheaddji, main 10 leat reply guy -olbmot, fierpmádat buvttada 900 postejumi beaivve áigge, muhto reply guy -olbmot eai dárbbatlaččat oainne daid buot!
4/o

Nuppi dilit, juohke reply guy oaidná 100 soaittáhagas válljejuvvon postejumi 900 postejumis. Vaikko gávdnojit 10 reply guy -olbmo, dat ii dárkkut ahte reply guy gávdná juohke postejumi! Sáhttet leat postejumit maid máŋga reply guy oaidnit, ja postejumit maid ii oktage reply guy oainne!
Nu ahte mot mii rehkenastit vejolašvuođa dasa ahte reply guy oaidná postejumi dán dilit?
Okta vuohki lea rehkenastit vejolašvuođa dasa ahte ii oktage reply guy oainne postejumi, ja váldit das complementa.
5/o

Dál, go juohke reply guy oaidná 100 postejumi 900 postejumis, de juohke postejumis lea 1/9 vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto reply guy oaidná dan, dehege 8/9 vejolašvuohta dasa ahte dihto reply guy ii oainne dan. Vejolašvuohta dasa ahte ii oktage reply guy oainne postejumi lea nu 8/9 juohke reply guy dáfus ja go jáhkkit ahte vejolašvuođat leat sorjjasmeahttumat, dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta dasa ahte ii oktage dán 10 reply guy -olbmos oainne postejumi lea (8/9)^10, mii lea 0.30794....
6/o

Dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta dasa ahte UNNIMUSTÁ OKTA reply guy oaidná juohke postejumi lea 1-(8/9)^10 dehe sullii 69%.
Dieđusge, jos muhtun poste 10 postejumi beaivve áigge, de vejolašvuohta dasa ahte son deaivá reply guy lea stuorát go dat, danne go dat lea vejolašvuohta dasa ahte unnimustá ovtta su postejumis oaidná unnimustá okta reply guy!

source_doc:
@ptoothfish why do all of the kids’ IMDb headshots look like they’re screen grabs from This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup the whole production machine is giving uncanny valley
even if they are real kids underneath, i wonder how much tuning up their images get 😬
smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc
i stand by my assertion they will be treated like hot-swappable parts if they do anything complicated like have an opinion or grow into their faces wrong

@ptoothfish oh they absolutely will. There’s probably even some contract clauses that lands them in deep weta if they even sneeze wrong.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@ptoothfish manne buot mánáid IMDb-profilegovat orrot dego livčče govvašleamit This Person Does Not Exist -neahttasiiddus? 😬

@bloodflowersburning jo, olles buvttadanmášiidna addá dakkár fasttes, eahpelunddolaš dovddu
vaikko mánát leat duohta mánát rumašlaččat, de ipmirdan man olu sin govat leat divvun 😬
čalmit leat stuoriduvvon, modjebálgát čalmmustahttojuvvon jna.
mun doalan das gitta maid dadjen, ahte singuin meannuduvvo dego lonohasosiiguin, jos barget juoidá mii lea váttis, dego ahte sis lea iežaset oaivil dahje ahte sin ámadajut šaddet "boastut" go rávásmit

@ptoothfish o, sii barget ahte fal nu. Sullii leat soahpamušain dakkár eavttut, ahte sii gártejit garrasit gieđahallojuvvot jos vel bihsetge boastut.
hypo_1:
@ptoothfish manne buot mánáid IMDb-govat orrot dego skearbmagovat This Person Does Not Exist -neahttasiiddus? 😬

@bloodflowersburning joo, olles buvttadanmášiidnas lea dakkár eahpelunddolaš, fasttes vibe
vaikko mánát leat duođalaččat mánát duogábealde, de ipmirdan man olu sin govat leat divvun 😬
modjit leat viiddiduvvon, modjebálgát čalmmustahttojuvvon jna.
mun doalan das gitta maid dadjen, ahte singuin meannuduvvo dego lonohasosiiguin, jos sii barget juoidá váttis ášši dego ahte sis lea iežaset oaivil dahje ahte sin ámadajut šaddet "boastut" go sii rávásmit

@ptoothfish o, sii barget ahte fal nu. Soaitá leat soahpamušain vel dakkár eavttut, ahte sii gártejit garrasit gieđahallojuvvot jos vel bihsetge boastut.
hypo_2:
@ptoothfish manne buot mánáid IMDb-govat orrot dego skearbmagovat This Person Does Not Exist -neahttasiiddus? 😬

@bloodflowersburning joo, olles buvttadanmášiidnas lea dakkár eahpelunddolaš ja apmasis dovdu
vaikko mánát leat ge duođalaččat mánát duogábealde, de smiehtan man olu sin govat leat divvojuvvon 😬
modjit leat viiddiduvvon, modjebálgát čalmmustahttojuvvon jna.
mun doalan das gitta maid dadjen, ahte singuin meannuduvvo dego lonohasosiiguin, jos sii barget juoidá váttis ášši dego ahte sis lea iežaset oaivil dahje ahte sin ámadajut šaddet "boastut" go sii rávásmit

@ptoothfish o, sii barget ahte fal nu. Soitet vel soahpamušain dakkár eavttut, ahte sii gártejit garrasit gieđahallojuvvot jos vel bihsetge boastut.
hypo_3:
@ptoothfish manne buot mánáid IMDb-govat orrot dego skearbmagovat This Person Does Not Exist -neahttasiiddus? 😬

@bloodflowersburning joo, olles buvttadanmášiidna addá dakkár eahpelunddolaš ja fasttes dovddu

source_doc:
Well, aren't you even going to look at me?
Sure.
You're too young to know anything about children.
I'm sure the agency said you were 25.
You're not 25, are you?
You're nothing like 25.
Have you ever had a job as a governess before?
No.
But have you ever had any kind of a job?
Yes, I have.
But don't you ever finish a sentence.
Yes, if I'm allowed to.
Okay, let's start all over.
Sit down.
Tell me about yourself.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Na, eatgo áiggo geahčastitge mu guvlui?
Diehttelasat.
Don leat menddo nuorra diehtit maidege mánáid birra.
Ingo doaimmahat dadjan ahte don leat 25-jahkásaš.
Don it leat 25-jahkásaš, vai leatgo?
Don leat guhkkin eret 25-jahkásaččas.
Leatgo don goasgán ovdal leamaš governántan?
In.
Muhto leatgo don goasgán bargan mange mállet barggu?
Juo, lean.
Muhto eatgo don goasge geargga cealkagiin.
Juo, jos munnje addojuvvo lohpi.
Na buorre, álggahit fas álgos.
Čohkán.
Muital munnje iežat birra.

Stephen King: submitted for the approval of the midnight
Elon Musk [rising from bushes]: eeyyyyy stephano king
Barker: hey look steve it's your best friend
King: goddamnit clive
King: we're not
King: elon what do you want this time

2
Musk: stephano king i aska you fora da last time
Musk: why you no lika me
Musk: we so mucha da same, lika two peas inna pod
King: how do you figure that?
Musk:
Musk: mama mia you contradicta me?
Musk: maybe you a pedophile

3
King: see, elon, this is the problem
King: you're just being immature
Musk: mama mia ima very mature
Musk: lika my boy you know he very based
Musk: you shoulda introduce himma to your boy
King: i don't think so
Musk: mama mia itsa great idea!!

@bitterkarella
King [chuckling]: Hello, Very Based. I'm Steve.
Very Based Musk: Hi, Steve. I'm very impressed you got my name right away, most people need it explained.
King: Wha, I thought I was making a joke.

King: moai eat leat

2

King: in jáhke

Our next guest might be responsible for why a lot of us are here.
His soulful songs like cause I Love You and So Very Hard to Go with the soundtrack to the love stories of our lives growing up.

Yes.
Lenny Williams.
Oh.

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Ja dat soaitáge leat dat rievttes reaidu, dakkárat go UCT goittotge gieđahallat muora jierpmebeallásaččat budjehtain ja juohkit man čiekŋalis vs govda don manat

loahpalaččat lea álo vejolaš ahte juogalágan vuostálasti vállje muhtin vugiid/ávdnasiid dakkár kombinatuvrralaš eksplosion-vejolašvuođa, mii ii sáhte rehkenastot dakkaviđe makkárge hardware-osain, nuba mus lei dasto álo dárbu binnánaš gáržžidit dán gokko nu, muhto dat teorehtalaš gáržžidus lea dál 40-gearddi stuorát go ođđajagimánus

No, jáhkán ahte áiggon sirdit UCT geavahussii dál, go mu speallu lea dál dego Go, dás šaddá dál riekta mátki

source_doc:
Aren't you going to say goodbye to me?
How did you know I was going?
I knew it this afternoon.
The way you faced up to him.
Well, I would have told him then.
Except for you.
I thought it would be best if I slipped out this way.
Are you sure you're doing the right thing?
There's nothing else I can do.
Will you.
Will you let me know where you are?
Paul?
As soon as I know myself.

6

7

King:
King: ok

9

10

11

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
málemin bazkiein! 🧵 (njealjis) hárpu [1/x]
Smiehtadin ahte livččii somá juohkit olles dán proseassa movt málen dakkár iešguđetlágan dilit. soaitá leat ávkin muhtumiidda, ja earáide fas hávskes ádjánus :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVA & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
nugo diehtibehtet, de lean hui oskkolas olmmoš 🛐 nu ahte..
dilli lea ná: letne Edena šaddogárddis. adam borrá omeniid gildojuvvon muoras, dasgo diehttelas son dahká nu. eva ii gierdda dán fasttes málle, váldá dakkár fasttes gearbmaša mii gávdno dasto lahka, ja áigu čáskit adama dainna nu ahte reasahuhttá. 🐍
#málen

málemin bazkiein! 🧵 (njealjis) hárpu [2/x]
nu ahte mii dárbohit veardádallangovaid. háliidan ahte eva lea dakkár dilis ahte áigu jorggihit gearbmaša iežas birra; nu ahte jurddašin ahte baseball-spelle mii áigu čáskit livččii buorre málle.
nu ahte go gárggiidin dan olu AI-ruobbasa čáda, de gávdnen dán albma gova mas lea buorre pose ja buorre čuovga.

málemin bazkiein! 🧵 (njealjis) hárpu [3/x]
háliidan ahte adam lea dakkár dilis mas suddje iežas, ja seammás doalla gildojuvvon omenis gieđas, ja dán oinnus bálgá/duogá bealis. seammás čuovga ferte boahtit seamma bealis go čáski. nu ahte oktiibuot lea oalle váttis gávdnat vuogas veardádallangova dán dildái, nu ahte dán vuorru lean ieš posemalle.
válden sulaid 20 gova iešguđetlágan poseiguin jna., ja mearridehkes dán. (olgeš giehta áigu doallat omena)

Dilli lea ná: letne Edena šaddogárddis. Adam borrá omeniid gildojuvvon muoras, dasgo diehttelas son nu dahká. Eva ii gierdda dán fasttes málle, váldá dakkár fasttes gearbmaša mii gávdno dasto lahka, ja áigu čáskit Adama dainna nu ahte reasahuhttá. 🐍
#málemin

málemin bazkiein! 🧵 (njoazes) hárpu [2/x]
Nu ahte mii dárbohit veardádallangovaid. Háliidan ahte Eva lea juste jorggismin gearbmaša iežas birra; nu ahte jurddašin ahte baseball-spelle mii áigu čáskit livččii buorre málle.
Nu ahte go gárggiidin dan olu AI-ruobbasa čáda, de gávdnen dán albma gova mas lea buorre pose ja buorre čuovga.

málemin bazkiein! 🧵 (njoazes) hárpu [3/x]
Háliidan ahte Adam suddje iežas, ja seammás doalla gildojuvvon omena gieđas, ja dán oinnus bálgá/duogá bealis. Seammás čuovga ferte boahtit seamma bealis go čáski. Nu ahte oktiibuot lea oalle váttis gávdnat vuogas veardádallangova dán dildái, nu ahte dán vuorru lean ieš posemalle.
Válden sulaid 20 gova iešguđetlágan poseiguin jna., ja válljejin dán. (Olgeš giehta áigu doallat omena)

source_doc:
The Case for Impeaching Donald Trump

Bombs over Latin America: It's giving Wag the Dog, if you ask me. The administration, seemingly hot to bring back neoconservative military conquest, soft-launched its latest regime change war in Venezuela by making indiscriminate attacks on boats in the Caribbean and Pacific waters off of Central America. These attacks, all undertaken without a jot of congressional oversight and on the dubious premise that the boats were packed with fentanyl bound for the United States, were murderous on their own. But the news that the military was ordered to strike an already stricken boat in a "double tap" attack to kill any survivors has raised the specter of war crimes - and in a way that even many Republicans don't seem ready to countenance.

Trump's Binance buddy gets a pardon: Changpeng Zhao began this year the disgraced former CEO of Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, having done prison time for, as the Biden DOJ put it, "failing to maintain an effective anti-money laundering (AML) program," violating the Bank Security Act, and allowing money to flow freely to a host of bad actors, including "terrorists, cybercriminals, and child abusers." But Zhao, having forfeited the right to run Binance, wanted back in. So he used his connections to Trump's family and inner circle to secure a pardon that would let him run the show again. In return, Zhao showered his attention on World Liberty Financial - using Binance's leverage to enrich Trump's private crypto fund. TNR's Tim Noah was positively apoplectic about the shady arrangement.

Chips to China: Speaking of Tim Noah and apoplexy: It's probably not great that one firm, Nvidia, has come to possess such godlike, market-moving power. Its outsize importance to the global economy had Noah fingering it as one of the major pillars to crumble, when he gamed out a potential Trump stock market crash back in October. Trump's been doing what he can to boost Nvidia's fortunes, however: This year, the president broke with long-standing national security tradition and announced that he was permitting the firm to sell its H200 chips to China. As The New York Times" David Sanger noted, the deal - the fruits of "intense lobbying" from Nvidia CEO and White House gadfly Jensen Huang - raised a basic question: "If the chips that power the most advanced technology can be sold to the United States" chief technological, military and financial competitor, where is the new line drawn?" That's probably the least of Trump's concerns, however: The deal also guaranteed that "25 percent of all the revenues from the sales would go to the United States," in yet another case of this administration's affection for fascist corporatism.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ágga Donald Trump rihkkunáššái giddemii

Bombaid hávvun Latiinnat-Amerihká badjel: Mu mielas dat muitala "Wag the Dog" -vugiid birra. Ráđđehus, mii orru hálidit ealáskahttit neokonservatiiva militeara vuollulmolsunpolitihka, álggahii dálá váldemolsunsoađi Venezuelai njuolgga, go álggahii dáhpedorpmis fallehit fatnasiid Karibias ja Básifikmerenguovllus gaska-Amerihká olggobealde. Dát falleheamit, mat čađahuvvojit almmá makkárge kongreassa bearráigeahču haga ja dainna eahpádusveara ákkain, ahte fatnasat ledje dievva fentanyl-mirkkuin mii lei jođus Amerihká ovttastuvvan stáhtaide, ledje juo iešalddis gáddenmirko. Muhto ođas dan birra, ahte militeara gohččojuvvui fallehit juo vahágahtton fatnasa "double tap" -fallehemiin vai jáhkket buot ceavzi olbmuid, lea lokten eahpádusaid soahtorihkosiid birra – ja nu, ahte vel ollu republikánatge eai orru leat gárvásat dan dohkkehit.

Trump Binance-ustit oažžu ándagassii addojuvvot: Changpeng Zhao álggahii dán jagi heahpatlaš Binance, máilmmi stuorámus kryptovaluhtabálvalusa, ovddeš jođiheaddjin, gii lei čohkkán giddagasas, nugo Bideni justeassa-departemeanta dajai, "effektiva ruhtalottojuvvamiid vuostálastinprográmma váilevašvuođa geažil", go rihkui Báŋkodorvvolašvuođalága, ja diktii ruđa friddja golgat máŋggaid baháidagaide, mu vuolde "terroristtaide, nehttarihkkosiidda ja mánáidvearredahkiide". Muhto Zhao, gii lei gieldon jođiheaddji sajis Binanceas, hálidii ruovttoluotta. Son geavahii iežas oktavuođaid Trump bearrašii ja lagašbirrasii oažžun dihte ándagassiid, mat dikte su fas jođihit doaimmaid. Ruovttoluotta Zhao čájehii stuorra beroštumi World Liberty Financialii – geavahettiin Binance váikkuhusfámu Trump priváhta kryptofondda buorrin. TNR Tim Noah lei njuolgga moaráhuvvan dán Fasttes soahpamušas.

Sirpmat Kiinnái: Go hupmat Tim Noah ja su moari birra: Ii soaitte leat buorre, ahte okta fitnodat, Nvidia, lea ožžon nu almmolaš ja márkaniid lihkahalli fámu. Dan stuorra mearkkašupmi máilmmeekonomiijai dagahii, ahte Noah ozai dán dehege unnit áššiid gaskkas, go son dárkkistii vejolaš Trump bursa-reahka dán golggotmánus. Trump lea goitge dahkan maid sáhttá buoridit Nvidia dili: Dán jagi presideanta rihkui guhkesáigásaš álbmotlaš dorvvolašvuođavuogi ja almmuhii, ahte son diktá fitnodaga vuovdit H200-sirpmaid Kiinnái. Nugo The New York Times David Sanger čájehii, soahpamuš – mii lei Nvidia hoavdda ja Vilges viesu ustiba Jensen Huang "fápmolaš lobbema" boađus – bohciidii vuđolaš gažaldaga: "Jos sirpmaid, mat dorjot eanemus ovdánan teknologiija, sáhttá vuovdit Ovttastuvvan stáhtaid eanemus teknologiijalaš, militearalaš ja finánsalaš gilvaleaddjái, gosa de biddjo ođđa rádji?" Dat lea soaitte unnimus Trump fuolain: Soahpamuš maiddái dorvvastii, ahte "25 proseantta buot vuovdinboađuin manna Ovttastuvvan stáhtaide", mii lea fas okta ovdamearka dán ráđđehusa lágalaš korporatismma birra.

Trump Binance-ustit oažžu ándagassii addojuvvot: Changpeng Zhao álggahii dán jagi heahpatlaš Binance, máilmmi stuorámus kryptovaluhtabálvalusa, ovddeš jođiheaddjin, gii lei čohkkán giddagasas, nugo Bideni justeassa-departemeanta dajai, "effektiva ruhtalottojuvvamiid vuostálastinprográmma váilevašvuođa geažil", go rihkui Báŋkodorvvolašvuođalága, ja diktii ruđa friddja golgat máŋggaid baháidagaide, mu vuolde "terroristtaide, nehttarihkkosiidda ja mánáidvearredahkiide". Muhto Zhao, gii lei gieldon jođiheaddji sajis Binanceas, hálidii ruovttoluotta. Son geavahii iežas oktavuođaid Trump bearrašii ja lagašbirrasii oažžun dihte ándagassiid, mat dikte su fas jođihit doaimmaid. Ruovttoluotta Zhao čájehii stuorra beroštumi World Liberty Financialii – geavahettiin Binance váikkuhusfámu Trump priváhta kryptofondda buorrin. TNR Tim Noah lei njuolgga moaráhuvvan dán Fasttes soahpamušas.

Sirpmat Kiinnái: Go hupmat Tim Noah ja su moari birra: Ii soaitte leat buorre, ahte okta fitnodat, Nvidia, lea ožžon nu almmolaš ja márkaniid lihkahalli fámu. Dan stuorra mearkkašupmi máilmmeekonomiijai dagahii, ahte Noah ozai dán dehege unnit áššiid gaskkas, go son dárkkistii vejolaš Trump bursa-reahka dán golggotmánus. Trump lea goitge dahkan maid sáhttá buoridit Nvidia dili: Dán jagi presideanta rihkui guhkesáigásaš álbmotlaš dorvvolašvuođavuogi ja almmuhii, ahte son diktá fitnodaga vuovdit H200-sirpmaid Kiinnái. Nugo The New York Times David Sanger čájehii, soahpamuš – mii lei Nvidia hoavdda ja Vilges viesu ustiba Jensen Huang "fápmolaš lobbema" boađus – bohciidii vuđolaš gažaldaga: "If the chips that power the most advanced technology can be sold to the United States' chief technological, military and financial competitor, where is the new line drawn?" Dat lea soaitte unnimus Trump fuolain: Soahpamuš maiddái dorvvastii, ahte "25 proseantta buot vuovdinboađuin manna Ovttastuvvan stáhtaide", mii lea fas okta ovdamearka dán ráđđehusa lágalaš korporatismma birra.

Yes.
No bath.
Best shower of my life.
I thought I would do an unboxing together.
I kind of want to take these home.
They're the Ritz slippers, and my room service is here.

instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Juo.
Ii lean málbma.
Mu eallima buoremus riššu.
Mun jurddašin ahte mii nuppástuhttit ovttas.
Mun háliidivččen váldit dáid ruoktot.
Dát leat Ritz-gápmagat, ja mu lanjabálvalus lea dás.
Danne mun mulssojin málbmas riššui.
Danne go mun háliidejin hoahpuhit, vai beasan borrat.
Voi máilbmi, leatgo duođas?
Nu fasti.
hypo_1:
Juo.
Ii leat málbma.
Mu eallima buoremus riššu.
Mun jurddašin ahte mii rahppat dán báhka ovttas.
Mun háliidivččen veahá váldit dáid ruoktot.
Dát leat Ritz-gápmagat, ja mu lanjabálvalus lea dás.
Danne mun mulssojin málbmas riššui.
Danne go háliidejin hoahpuhan vai beasan borrat.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

hypo_0:
:redpanda: muhtumin olbmot jerget mis ahte "ii go livčče hui somá jos oažžoleidde almmuheaddji dán [game]-speallái?" muhto dasto lea dakkár buncarassan ahte buot dakkár áššit fertejit mannat min speallodirektevrra, Ashe, bokte, ja son lea dadjan ahte ii huma ovttage almmuheaddjin mii ii gohčo su Ashen
dađistaga go son oažžu "Jess", de lea loahppa dakkaviđe

:redpanda: ja dakkár máilmmis gos eai dakkár AI-lohpádusat maid AI-bohtalasttat sáddejit, muhto olbmot geat leat lean njuolga boastut ja muhtumiin sáhtte *dovdat* movt nissonvašši goicá sin e-poasttain, de eat mii leat nu beroštuvvan háleštit singuin lol

:redpanda: (mun gal rámidan daid almmuheaddjiid geat leat váldán minguin oktavuođa ja leat dadjan ahte "dá leat muhtun spealut maid mii leat almmuhan" ja iežaset listtus válljen dušše furry-spealuid. sii leat goit dahkan ruovttubarggaset)

:redpanda: mii nu, jos leat goasnu jurddašan ahte "mun in ádde manne Blobun ii leat switchas? dat livčče jorba heivvolaš dása" de dasa lea dakkár sivva, ja mis ii leat ruhta dan devkitii ja gamemaker-veršuvdnii mii sáhttá dan duddjot, nu ahte jua don ferteš Steam Decka (dahje x86-ARM-konvertera daidda anberniidda) geavahit jos hálidat dan mátkái mielde

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

hypo_0:
na joo, de nugo ledjen muitalemin, de čálled meastta ovtta hui dovddus ja hui ustitgaččan orru dáiddárstillevaš olbmui ja čálle sutnje dan dábálaš čilgehusa:
- mo šaldi doaibmá
- mo šaddat šaldun
- áinnas duga nu, go háliidan čuovvut du ja juohkit fas muhtun du čállosat main liikon
- juos eat hálit, de dat lea áivan ortnegis
ja son vástidii "in dga dan" mii lea áivan ok, muhto de son blockii mu???
dušše nugo áivan almma makkárge siva haga

in namut geange, go in eisege fasttutuolbma geange dás, inge ge dál eisege hálit makkárge falleheami álgit, muhto dát lea dáhpáhuvvan juo máŋggain olbmuiguin, maiddái olbmuiguin geat leat FASJUOHKÁN JA LIIKON ŠALDEJUVVON POSTIID DÁN REHKENASTTUS (mu váldorehkenasttus), mii lea JUSTTE SIVVA MANNE HÁLIIDIN ČUOVVUT SIN

juos sii livčče dušše dadjan "ii giitu", de livčče ožžon mus "ok, áivan ipmárdattis! :)" dahje sullasačča, muhto dál fertejit buohkat gillat mu seahkanan rántemiin dan sadjái. in leat oppa dál eisege moarástuvvan, lean dušše *duođas eahpesihkar*

bsky-olbmot, leago dát duođalaš váttisvuohta din platformmas (go dat lea juoga maid in leat measta *eisege* vásihan dán bealde šalddi) dahje leango dušše gávdnan heajos muorjji maŋŋá heajos muorjji

in duođai dieđe makkár olbmuid dábálaš dovdomušat leat Bridgy Fed enabling birra dás, go dat ii leat juste fáddá mii goasge badjánana dás (dađi bahábut)… Muhto dás lea sihkkarit muhtun juogadus olbmuin geat leat super-álkit deaddilit block-boalu, in liiko dása iige muđui ge.
hypo_1:
na joo, de nugo ledjen muitalemin, de čálled meastta ovtta hui dovddus ja hui ustitgaččas orru dáiddárstillevaš olbmui ja čálle sutnje dan dábálaš čilgehusa:
- mo šaldi doaibmá
- mo searvat šaldái
- áinnas duga nu, go háliidan čuovvut du ja juohkit fas muhtun du čállosiid main liikon
- juos eat hálit, de dat lea áivan ortnegis
