source_doc:
```json
[
  "Lookin’ Good",
  "Boost Your Business !",
  "Shoppable Instagram Posts are just a few clicks away",
  "Let customers order directly from your Instagram posts when you’re powered by Mambalo.",
  "Tap to tag products",
  "Home decor for lovely places like yours",
  "Unleash the power of email with Mailchimp",
  "Use your Mambalo purchase data to segment your email list and create targeted campaigns for current and potential customers.",
  "Share discount coupons",
  "Collect emails with a sign-up form",
  "Short on time? Make ‘em automated",
  "Unleash the power of email with MailChimp",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: How to Turn Your Visitors Into Customers",
  "Every visitor on your site is an opportunity to make a sale.",
  "You can sit and wait when your visitors remember your brand, or… You can bring customers back to your online store with remarketing. And that’s no rocket science — read this article to learn how to get started.",
  "Facebook retargeting ads will appear on Facebook sites, and they get about two billion visits every month.",
  "The word “dynamic” in the term means that something in the ads changes – in this case, the items displayed in the ad. To give you a proper understanding of how it works, let’s go through some examples.",
  "We also have a visitor named Janet. Janet also finds the Awesome Super Shoes store on Google. She likes our Red Shoes, but it is four days to her payday and she is short on cash, so she leaves the store website without making a purchase.",
  "Five days later, she is on Facebook, browsing her friends’ posts. Between the posts, she can see an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Red Shoes she already liked. Since she got her paycheck yesterday, she decides to spoil herself and buy the shoes.",
  "In the evening, he goes through several review sites about running shoes. Since most of the sites are on the Google Display Network, one of them runs an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Running Shoes Jared has already looked at. He hasn’t found better shoes yet and he’s quite tired, so he decides to buy the Running Shoes.",
  "And that is what dynamic retargeting is about. No matter how visitors get to your webpage, if they don’t purchase anything, they’ll see your ads with the product they were interested in.",
  "Hit launch campaign and that’s it. No coding, no messing with CSV files, no stress. The process is the same for Google remarketing ads.",
  "We can’t wait to learn how you’re doing retargeting in your Mambalo store. Tell us in the comments below!"
]
```
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is from software data. Translate the content of json, without translating keys and placeholders (i.e. copy them rather than translate them). Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Produce a valid json output that matches the input format. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Čáppa almmustahttin",
  "Nanne iežat fitnodaga !",
  "Osttadalli Instagram-bosttat leat dušše moadde deaddileami eret",
  "Divtte áššehaččaid diŋgot njuolga du Instagram-bosttaid bokte, go ávkkastalat Mambaloin.",
  "Deaddil gova gilvet buktagiid",
  "Ruovttudisreaddjat fiidna báikkiide nugo du ruoktu",
  "Váldde e-boastta fámolaš reaidduid atnui Mailchimpa vehkiin",
  "Geavat iežat Mambalo-oastindieđuid e-boastatlistta juohkimii ja dárkkislaš kampánjjaid ráhkadeapmái dáláš ja boahttevaš áššehaččaide.",
  "Juohkke vuolláduskupongguid",
  "Čohkke e-boasttaid searvan-skoviin",
  "Váilu go áigi? Ráhkas daid automáhtalažžan",
  "Váldde e-boastta fámolaš reaidduid atnui MailChimpa vehkiin",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: Mo nuppástuhttit gallededdjiid áššehažžan",
  "Juohke galledaddji du neavttasiidduin lea vejolašvuohta gávpevuovdimii.",
  "Sáhtát čohkkát ja vuordit dassážiigo galledaddjit muitot du fitnodatgova, dahje… Sáhtát geasahit áššehaččaid ruovttoluotta iežat neavttagávpái ođđasit-fálaldagaiguin (remarketing). Dat ii leat goasge lossa dieđa — loga dán artihkkala ja oahpa mo álgit.",
  "Facebook ođđasit-fálaldatdieđáhusat (retargeting) ihtet Facebook-siidduide, ja dain leat birrasiid guokte miljárdda galledeami juohke mánu.",
  "Sátni \"dynámalaš\" mearkkaša ahte juoga almmuhusain rievdá – dán dáhpáhusas, buvttat mat čájehuvvojit almmuhusas. Vai ipmirdat mo dat doaibmá, geahčastat moadde ovdamearkka.",
  "Mis lea maid galledaddji gean namma lea Janet. Janet maid gávdná Awesome Super Shoes -gávppi Google bokte. Son liiko min Rukses Kamuvssaide, muhto leat njeallje beaivvi bálkái ja sus lea vánis ruhta, nu ahte son guođđá gávppi neavttasiiddu oasttolaga.",
  "Vihta beaivvi maŋŋelaš, son lea Facebookas, ja geahčadii ustibiiddis bosttaid. Bosttaid gaskkas son oaidná Awesome Super Shoes -almmuhusa main leat dat Rukses Kamuvssat maidda son juo liikojii. Go son oaččui bálkkás ikte, son mearrida ráfáiduhttit iežas ja oastá kamuvssaid.",
  "Eahkes son manná moadde árvvoštallansiidduide mat čállet viehkangápmagiid birra. Go eanaš siiddut leat Google Display Network -fierpmi oasis, de okta dain čájeha Awesome Super Shoes -almmuhusa main leat dat viehkan-gápmagat maid Jared lea juo geahčadan. Son ii leat gávdnan buoret gápmagiid vel ja lea viehka váibat, nu ahte son mearrida oastit daid viehkan-gápmagiid.",
  "Ja das lea sáhka dynámalaš ođđasit-fálaldatdieđáhusain. Vaikko mo galledaddjit bohtet du neavttasiidui, jos sii eai oastte maidege, de sii oaidnit du almmuhusaid dainna buktagiin mainna ledje beroštuvvan.",
  "Deaddil kampánjja johtui ja dat lea gárvvis. Ii dárbbat koda čállit, ii CSV-fiilaiguin rähkät, ii makkárge lossa stressa. Prošeassa lea seammálágan Google ođđasit-fálaldatdieđáhusaide (remarketing).",
  "Mii illudit gullat mo don geavat ođđasit-fálaldatdieđáhusaid iežat Mambalo-gávppis. Muital midjiide kommentárain vulobealde!"
]
```

source_doc:
Falkirk strengthen top six hopes with away win at St Mirren

Miller then made sure of the points just after the hour mark as he capitalised on some static St Mirren defending to race on to his own blocked shot before dinking the ball over George.

It was an afternoon to forget for St Mirren, who lost Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips and George to injury as they slipped to a third straight defeat.

Falkirk had the first opening in the 18th minute when Barney Stewart laid the ball off to Dylan Tait, whose curling effort from just outside the box took a slight deflection before cannoning off the top of the crossbar.

St Mirren finally threatened just after the half-hour mark when Mikael Mandron shot from a tight angle, forcing Falkirk goalkeeper Scott Bain into a smart stop with his feet.

Falkirk then raced down the other end and the lively Miller was released and allowed to shoot from a similar angle but George comfortably saved.

The match was finally coming to life and Dan Nlundulu was the next to fire at goal in the 36th minute after the Bairns had given up possession cheaply, but it was a routine stop at the near post by Bain.

Nlundulu then got in behind and slid the ball home, though the cheers from the home fans were short-lived as the assistant referee raised his flag for what appeared to be a clear offside.

The hosts had already lost Donnelly to injury midway through the first half and they suffered a further blow when Phillips, who appeared to hurt his shoulder in the opening period, came off at the interval.

The match was crying out for a moment of quality and it came 10 minutes into the second half through Yeats.

Tait's perfect through ball released Miller, and although George came racing out of his goal and timed his challenge well, the loose ball fell invitingly for Yeats, who curled a stunning first-time finish into the top corner of the unguarded St Mirren goal.

It got even better for the away side just after the hour mark as the Bairns doubled their lead.

Miller's initial shot from the edge of the box was blocked by Scott Tanser but, as the home defence hesitated, Miller reacted first to run on to the loose ball and lift a right-footed shot over the onrushing George.

St Mirren suffered yet another blow shortly after as the keeper was forced off to be replaced by Ryan Mullen.

The enforced changes and the quickfire goals seemed to rock the hosts and they never threatened a comeback, with their afternoon summed up in the 89th minute when Tanser completely mis-kicked his attempted volley from six yards out.

The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Falkirk nanne dárkkisvuođas guđa buoremusa joavkkus olggobeal-vuoittuin St Mirren vuostá

Miller sihkkarastti de čuoggáid ovdalgo diibmu lei dievvan, go son ávkkástalai St Mirren bisánan bealuštusain, viegai iežas bissehuvvon suttu ala ja bálkestii spáppa George badjel.

Dát lei maŋitbeaivi maid St Mirren háliida vajálduhttit, go sii masse sihke Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips ja George rasiiduvvama geažil, ja dasto doppe goalmmát binná vuostálas vuoittuhisvuođa.

Falkirkas lei vuosttaš dilli 18. minuhtas, go Barney Stewart hálai spáppa Dylan Taitii, gean dárkilis sutti boksá olggobealde spiehkastii veahá ovdalgo dat bođii ristaruvrra nala.

St Mirren fálai loahpas áitaga ovdalgo bealle-diibmu lei dievvan, go Mikael Mandron sutti gáržžes čiegas, mainna bággii Falkirk-uhttun Scott Bain čájehit čeahpes gáhttema juolggiiguin.

Falkirk dasto gárttai nuppi nuvttii, ja ealasis Miller beasai dasto suttedat gáržžes čiegas, muhto George gáhttii álkit.

Speallu lei vihpat ealáskemin, ja Dan Nlundulu lei čuovvovaš guhte sutti uhtii 36. minuhtas maŋŋel go Bairns lei láhppán spáppa hálbba vuogi mielde, muhto Bain gáhttii álkit lagas uksenollis.

Nlundulu beasai dasto maŋit beallái ja sárdnistii spáppa uhttii, muhto ruovttusiiddu ealáskan eai lean guhká go uhttu-duopmar bajidii leavgga dakkár áššis mii orrui leamen čielga offside.

Ruovttusiidu lei eidu massán Donnelly rasiiduvvama geažil gaskan vuosttaš beali, ja sii gárte vel eará rasiiduvvama ala go Phillips, guhte orrui bávččagahttimin iežas oalggi vuosttaš bealis, vulggii eret gaskkaáiggis.

Speallu gáibidii kvalitehta, ja dat bođii 10 minuhta maŋŋel nuppi beali Yeats bokte.

Tait čorgis spábba Millerii, ja vaikko George viegai olggos iežas uhtus ja áiggái iežas hástaleami bures, de spábba gárttai Yeatsii, guhte sutti vuosttaš háve bajimuš čihgii uhtus, mii lei guoros.

Dilli šattai vel buoret olggobeal-joavkkui ovdalgo diibmu lei dievvan, go Bairns duppalasttii iežaset jođu.

Miller vuosttaš sutti boksá rájes bissehuvvui Scott Tanseris, muhto go ruovttubealuštus eahpidii, de Miller reagerei vuosttažin ja viegai spáppa ala ja bálkestii spáppa olgeš juolggiin badjel George guhte viegai ovddas.

St Mirren gillii vel eará rasiiduvvama dakkaviđe maŋŋel, go uhtto-gáhtti bággejuvvui eret ja su sadjái bođii Ryan Mullen.

Bággejuvvon nuppástusat ja jođánis uhtut orru hávvadan ruovttusiiddu, eaige sii goasge áitán máhccama, go sin maŋitbeaivi čálgojuvvui 89. minuhtas go Tanser áibbas boastut sutti iežas volley-geahččaleami guđa lávkki rájes.

Tait čorgis spábba Millerii, ja vaikko George viegai olggos iežas uhtus ja áiggái iežas hástaleami bures, de spábba gárttai Yeatsii, guhte sutti vuosttaš háve bajimuš čihgii uhtus, mii lei guoros.

Dilli šattai vel buoret olggobeal-joavkkui ovdalgo diibmu lei dievvan, go Bairns duppalasttii iežaset jođu.

Miller vuosttaš sutti boksá rájes bissehuvvui Scott Tanseris, muhto go ruovttubealuštus eahpidii, de Miller reagerei vuosttažin ja viegai spáppa ala ja bálkestii spáppa olgeš juolggiin badjel George guhte viegai ovddas.

St Mirren gillii vel eará rasiiduvvama dakkaviđe maŋŋel, go uhtto-gáhtti bággejuvvui eret ja su sadjái bođii Ryan Mullen.

Bággejuvvon nuppástusat ja jođánis uhtut orru hávvadan ruovttusiiddu, eaige sii goasge áitán máhccama, ja sin maŋitbeaivi čálgojuvvui 89. minuhtas go Tanser áibbas boastut sutti iežas volley-geahččaleami guđa lávkki rájes.
hypo_5:
Falkirk nannii doaivvuidis beassat guđa buoremusa searvái go vuittii St Mirrena dán ruovttušiljus

Miller sihkkarasttii dasto čuoggáid go diibmu lei eidu dievvan. Son ávkkástalai St Mirrena lojogas bealuštusain, viegai iežas bissehuvvon bálkesteami ala ja bálkestii spáppa čábba láhkai George badjel uhttái.

Dát lei dakkár maŋitbeaivi maid St Mirren háliida vajálduhttit, go sii masse sihke Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips ja uhttegáhtti George rasiiduvvama geažil, ja dasto gárte gillat goalmmát vuolláneami maŋŋalaga.

Falkirkas lei vuosttaš dilli 18. minuhtas, go Barney Stewart hálai spáppa Dylan Taitii, gean jorba bálkesteapmi eidu boksá olggobealde spiehkastii veahá ovdalgo dat bođii ristaruvrra nala.

St Mirren áittii dasto vuosttaš háve go bealle-diibmu lei dievvan, go Mikael Mandron bálkestii gáržžes čiegas, ja nu bággii Falkirk-uhttegáhtti Scott Bain čájehit čeahpes gáhttema juolggiiguin.

Falkirk viegai dasto nuppi nillii, ja ealasis Miller beasai dasto bálkestit gáržžes čiegas, muhto George gáhttii álkit.

Speallu lei vihpat ealáskemin, ja Dan Nlundulu lei čuovvovaš guhte bálkestii uhttái 36. minuhtas maŋŋel go Bairns lei láhppán spáppa hálbba vuogi mielde, muhto Bain gáhttii álkit lagas uksenollis.

Nlundulu beasai dasto maŋit beallái ja sárdnistii spáppa uhttii, muhto ruovttusiiddu ealáskan eai lean guhká, go uhttu-duopmar bajidii leavgga dakkár áššis mii orrui leamen čielga offside.

Ruovttusiidu lei eidu massán Donnelly rasiiduvvama geažil gaskan vuosttaš beali, ja sii gárte vel eará rasiiduvvama ala go Phillips, guhte orrui bávččagahttimin iežas oalggi vuosttaš bealis, vulggii eret gaskkaáiggis.

Speallu gáibidii kvalitehta, ja dat bođii 10 minuhta maŋŋel nuppi beali Yeats bokte.

Dilli šattai vel buoret olggobeal-joavkkui ovdalgo diibmu lei dievvan, go Bairns duppalasttii iežaset jođu.

Miller vuosttaš bálkesteapmi boksá rájes bissehuvvui Scott Tanseris, muhto go ruovttubealuštus eahpidii, de Miller reagerei vuosttažin ja viegai spáppa ala ja bálkestii spáppa olgeš juolggiin badjel George guhte viegai ovddas.

St Mirren gillii vel eará rasiiduvvama dakkaviđe maŋŋel, go uhtto-gáhtti bággejuvvui eret ja su sadjái bođii Ryan Mullen.

Bággejuvvon nuppástusat ja jođánis uhtut orru hávvadan ruovttusiiddu, eaige sii goasge áitán máhccama, ja sin maŋitbeaivi čálgojuvvui 89. minuhtas go Tanser áibbas boastut sutti iežas volley-geahččaleami guđa lávkki rájes.

source_doc:
Outside of court a never ending stream of flying monkeys has doxxed, harassed and threatened me and anyone they believe have "helped" me in anyway shape or form.
One flying monkey is the tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim who jumped on my ex's public posts, and knows my ex privately.
I'll re-post some of their videos about me with a CW.
But I want to make it clear how much these people wish to erase me and my few accomplishments.
Here's violent threats about a witness in my case.

This tiktoker has made it their PRIMARY content to attempt to dox me, my friends and specifically witnesses to my illegal eviction.
In the video they made about me they attempt to paint me as "not an activist", "not a hacker" and "just a grifter".
ALL because my ex decided that splitting bills while navigating a break constituted domestic violence.
They then call their constant online lynch mob chasing me around "activism" and fund raise off MY pain and court process.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" is known locally for posting tiktoks of herself stalking + harassing multiple of her ex's all on her tiktok+IG.
Areej maced a trans librarian, Canyon, ON camera as she got off work likely bc Canyon had to enforce BASIC library rules.
Areej cyberbullied Canyon for months after.
Canyon soon thereafter died of a suspected intentional drug overdose.
Many in the community believe Areej's actions directly contributed to Canyon's death.
THESE are the "friends" my ex keeps.

Anywho... this type of leftist infighting, is the worst portlandia coded telenovela ever.
I've NEVER posted anything at all publicly about Areej till now.
Areej did contact me 2years ago with some infighting, which I immediately DECLINED to be involved with.
I had a few private & community conversations about the issues they raised to ensure a restorative justice process had or would occur.
One had occured and had plenty of support so I bowed out.
This had been the extent of our contact.

At the time I bowed out I warned the community against cyber bullying especially 3rd parties to the initial interpersonal conflict.
This warning was directed to Areej, I felt their cyber bullying ON top of the already existing decisions in their favor was in poor taste.
I especially felt Areej doxxing the restorative justice committee/mediators DURING the process was actively abusive.
I warned specifically about the likelihood of Areej's victims self harming being a real risk.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Duopmostuolu olggobealde lea dakkár dajahusa "flying monkeys" ("bálvalit") loahpaheapme virre, mii lea doxxen, hárrejeaddji ja áitán mu ja juohkehačča, geasa sii jáhkket ahte muhtun láhkai leat "veahkehan" mu.
Okta dakkár "bálvaleaddji" lea tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim, gii njuiki mu ovddežii almmolaš postaide ja dovdá mu ovddeža priváhtalaččat.
Mun re-posten muhtun sin videoin mu birra CW-ain.
Muhto mun hálidan čájehit čielgasit man olu dát olbmot hálidit sihkkut mu ja mu unnán duddjon bohtosiid.
Dás leat veahkaválddálaš áitagat vihtana birra mu áššis.

Dát tiktoker lea dahkan iežas VÁLDOmassin geahččalit doxxet mu, mu ustibiid ja erenoamážit mu lágalaš eretgurrema vihtaniid.
Videose, maid sii dhte mu birra, sii geahččalit govvidit mu dego "in leat aktivista", "in leat hákkeri" ja "dušše beare grifter".
BUOT dan dihte go mu ovddeš mearridii ahte rehkegiid juohkin earráneami áigge lei ruovttuveahkaválddálašvuohta.
Sii dasto gohčodit iežaset bistevaš interneahta vajaldussuorggi mu maŋis "aktivisman" ja čohkkejit ruđa MU bákčasis ja duopmostuollovuogádagas.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" lea báikkálaččat dovddus das, ahte son postá tiktokiid iežas birra, gos son doarrá ja hárrejeaddji máŋggaid iežas ovddežiid buot su tiktok+IG:s.
Areej maced trans-girjjarájolassii, Canyonii, KÁMERAs go son binná barggus, várra go Canyon fertii doallat girjjarájovuođđonjuolggadusat.
Areej cyberbullii Canyona mánuid maŋŋá.
Canyon jámii fargga maŋŋá jáhkkehahtti eaktodáhtolaš dálkkasbadjeloimmástussii.
Máŋggat servodagas jáhkket, ahte Areej dagut váikkuhedje njuolga Canyon jápmimii.
DÁT leat dat "ustibat", geaid mu ovddeš doallá.

Nugo vel... dát lágan gurutbeal lágat, lea vearrámus portlandia-kodas telenovela goasge.
Mun in leat GOASGE posten maidege almmolaččat Areej birra ovdal dál.
Areej válddii mune oktavuođa guokte jagi áigi muhtun riidduin, masa mun dallán GILDEJIN seahkanis.
Mus ledje muhtun priváhta ja servodatráđđádallamat áššiid birra, maid sii bajidedje, sihkkarastin dihte ahte máhcahanvuoiggalašvuođaproseassa lei dahje dáhpáhuvvái.
Okta lei dáhpáhuvvan ja das lei olu doarjja, nu ahte mun gáidat eret.
Dát lei leamaš min oktavuohta.

Dan áigge go gáidat eret, mun vákšojin servodaga cyberbullyinga vuostá, erenoamážit goalmmát beali olbmuide álgoálgosaš persovnnalaš riidui.
Dát vákšun lei čujuhuvvon Areejii, mun dovden ahte sin cyberbullying juo dálá mearrádusaid ala sin buorrin lei heittot dáhpi.
Erenoamážit mun dovden ahte Areej doxxen máhcahanvuoiggalašvuođalávdegotti/gaskaoapmeolbmo proseassa ÁIGGE lei aktiivvalaččat illastupmi.
Mun vákšojin erenoamážit dan birra, ahte lea duohta riska, ahte Areej oaffarat vahágahttet iežaset.

Okta lei dáhpáhuvvan ja das lei olu doarjja, nu ahte mun gáidat eret.
Dát lei leamaš min oktavuohta.

Dan áigge go gáidat eret, mun vákšojin servodaga neahttagivssideami vuostá, erenoamážit goalmmát beali olbmuide álgoálgosaš persovnnalaš riidui.
Dát vákšun lei čujuhuvvon Areejii, mun dovden ahte sin neahttagivssideapmi juo dálá mearrádusaid lassin sin buorrin lei heittot dáhpi.
Erenoamážit mun dovden ahte Areej doxxen máhcahanvuoiggalašvuođalávdegotti/gaskaoapmeolbmuid proseassa ÁIGGE lei aktiivvalaš illastupmi.
Mun vákšojin erenoamážit dan birra, ahte lea duohta riska, ahte Areej oaffarat vahágahttet iežaset.

Mun re-posten muhtun sin videoin mu birra CW-ain.
Muhto mun hálidan čájehit čielgasit man olu dát olbmot hálidit sihkkut mu ja mu unnán duddjon bohtosiid.
Dás leat veahkaválddálaš áitagat vihtana vuostá mu áššis.

Videose, maid sii dahke mu birra, sii geahččalit govvidit mu dego "in leat aktivista", "in leat hákkeri" ja "dušše beare jallašalli".
BUOT dan dihte go mu ovddeš mearridii ahte rehkegiid juohkin earráneami áigge lei ruovttuveahkaválddálašvuohta.

source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Melbourne Renegades duste Glenn Maxwell ja Melbourne Stars Marvel Stadiumis BBL15-turneares maŋŋel go Usman Khawaja ja Brisbane Heat leat dusten Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominerii 82 čuoggáin mat eai leat vuorustuvvan 51 spallit hámis, ja Glenn Maxwell muittašii makkár lea go spábba deaivá bera su ráfálaš 20 čuoggá vuorustuvakeahtes vuorus 17 spallit hámis, mas lei mielde okta stuorra guhtta. Son ii leat massán máhtuidis ja livččii njuorranan vejolašvuođas fitnat gasku šiljju.

42 846 olbmo guldaleaddjit eai ožžon dan gilvvu maid sávve, go Stars vuittii spealu gávcci beraigu go 25 spalli ledje báhcán.

Dát doallá Melbourne Stars gilvvus mielde go sii barget golmma spealu losses gávcciid, ja dahká eallima váttisin Melbourne Renegadesii. Marcus Stoinis čáskkii bures ja válddi 3-33, ja lei ovtta muddus hat-trick-dilálašvuođas, muhto Harper lea erenoamáš buorre hámis go lea čáskkán 356 čuoggá 159 strike-mearri mielde turnearas. Son lei spealu dárkkisteaddji.

Tom Rogers máhcai johtilis 50 čuoggáin Melbourne Renegades vuostá

Muhto buot lei nohkan go Tom Rogers veahkehii iežas 50 čuoggáin 19 spallit hámis álggahit vuoru 84 ovttasbargguin Harperiin.

"Sii utplejejedje min 'G:s, nu ahte lei somá oažžut min viđat vuoittu," Harper muitalii Fox Cricketii.

Eanemus miellagiddevaččat ledje kommentárat Fox Cricket kommentárakássas, gos Englándda ovddeš kapteina Michael Vaughan čájehii čielgasit man gárolaš son lei das makkár vuogi mielde engelas njunnožat gieđahalle klubbadáhpáhusa mas Harry Brook lei mielde Ođđa-Sealánddas ovdal go sii bohte Austráliai The Ashes-turneai.

Melbourne Stars veterána Peter Siddle dajai, ahte "dat lei buorre jorggáldus" go vuoitu hoigá joavkku ruovttoluotta nuppi sadjái BBL-tabeallas.

Dilli lea liegganeamen go golbma spealu leat báhcán Melbourne Renegadesii ja guokte spealu Melbourne Starsii.

Dán gease lea vel olu kriket báhcán, nu ahte speala mielde. Giitu go čuovvut. Sáhttágo Stars viimmat vuoitit dán namahusa?

Sam Harper dominerii spealu ja časkkii 82 čuoggá (eai spealustuvvon olggos) 51 spallis, ja Glenn Maxwell muittašii makkár lea go spábba deaivá bera go časkkii ráfálaš 20 čuoggá (ii spealustuvvon olggos) 17 spallis, mii siskkildii ovtta miht some stuorra guđat čuoggá časkima. Son ii leat massán máhtuidis ja dárkkašii vejolašvuođas dárkkistit spealu gaskkamuttus.

42 846 olbmo geahččiide ii adnon dat gilvu maid sii sávve, go Stars vuittii spealu gávcci beraigu (wickets) go 25 spalli ledje vel báhcán.

Dát doallá Melbourne Stars -joavkku fárus gilvvus go sii botkejedje golmma spealu tápsovárri, ja dahká eallima váttisin Melbourne Renegadesii. Eanemus miellagiddevaččat ledje kommentárat Fox Cricket -kommentárakássas, gos Englándda ovddeš kapteina Michael Vaughan čájehii čielgasit man gárolaš son lei das makkár vuogi mielde Englándda kriket-njunnožat gieđahalle klubbadáhpáhusa mas Harry Brook lei mielde Ođđa-Sealánddas ovdal go sii bohte Austráliai The Ashes -turneai.

Melbourne Stars -veterána Peter Siddle dajai, ahte "dat lei buorre jorggáldus" go vuoitu hoigá joavkku ruovttoluotta nuppi sadjái BBL-tabeallas.

Dilli lea liegganeamen go golbma spealu leat báhcán Melbourne Renegadesii ja guokte spealu Melbourne Starsii.

Dán gease lea vel olu kriket báhcán, nu ahte čuovu fárus. Giitu go čuvvot. Sáhttágo Stars viimmat vuoitit dán namahusa?
hypo_7:
Melbourne Renegades duste Glenn Maxwell ja Melbourne Stars -joavkku Marvel Stadiumis BBL15-spealus maŋŋel go Usman Khawaja ja Brisbane Heat leat dusten Sydney Thunder -joavkku

Sam Harper dominerii spealu ja časkkii 82 čuoggá (almma bera massima haga) 51 spallis, ja Glenn Maxwell muittastii makkár lea go spábba deaivá bera go časkkii ráfálaš 20 čuoggá (almma bera massima haga) 17 spallis, mii siskkildii ovtta erenoamáš stuorra guđat čuoggá časkima. Son ii leat massán máhtuidis ja dárkkašii vejolašvuođas dárkkistit spealu gaskkamuttus.

42 846 geahčči eai ožžon dakkár gilvu maid ledje sávvan, go Stars vuittii spealu gávcci beraigu (wickets) go 25 spalli ledje vel báhcán.

Dát doallá Melbourne Stars -joavkku mielde gilvvus go sii botkejedje golmma spealu tápsovárri, ja dahká eallima váttisin Melbourne Renegadesii. Marcus Stoinis bálggestii bures ja válddi golbma bera 33 čuoggáin (3-33) ja lei ovtta gaskkas lahka hat-tricka, seammás go Harper lea erenoamáš buorre hámis go lea časkán 356 čuoggá turnearas 159 strike rate -mearri mielde. Son válljejuvvojis spealu buoremus speallin.

Tom Rogers máhcai fáhkka jođánis 50 čuoggáin Melbourne Renegades vuostá

Muhto buot lei nohkan dakkaviđe go Tom Rogers časkkii 50 čuoggá 19 spallis ja álggahii vuoru 84 čuoggá ovttasbargguin Harperiin.

"Sii utplejejedje min 'G-šiljus, nu ahte lei somá oažžut min viđat vuoittu," Harper muitalii Fox Cricketii.

Eanemus miellagiddevaččat ledje kommentárat Fox Cricket -kommentárakássas, gos Englándda ovddeš kapteina Michael Vaughan čájehii čielgasit man gárolaš son lei das makkár vuogi mielde Englándda kriket-njunnožat gieđahalle klubbadáhpáhusa mas Harry Brook lei mielde Ođđa-Sealánddas ovdal go sii bohte Austráliai The Ashes -turneai.

Melbourne Stars -veterána Peter Siddle dajai, ahte "dat lei buorre jorggáldus" go vuoitu hoigá joavkku ruovttoluotta nuppi sadjái BBL-tabeallas.

Dilli lea liegganeamen go golbma spealu leat báhcán Melbourne Renegadesii ja guokte spealu Melbourne Starsii.

Dán gease lea vel olu kriket báhcán, nu ahte čuovu fárus. Giitu go čuvvot. Sáhttágo Stars viimmat vuoitit dán namahusa?

source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ja go leat okta dain ártigii, de mii dábálaččat oažžut fallehahttimiid dákko ja duokko. Juogo neahtas, neahta olggobealde dahje vel iežat lagamus olbmuin. Dat fallehahttimat bohte dábálaččat homofobiijas, transfobiijas, dahje muhtumin juste das go eai liiko man ártigat mii leat ja movt mii láhttet, erenoamážit furri-olbmot geat dahket čiekŋaleabbo rollaspealuid ja therianthropy.

Dan dihte muhtumat mis ožžo oadjebasvuođa go eai dárbbashan muitalit geat mii leat ja gostat mii leat eret. Muhtumat mis ožžo oadjebasvuođa go čájehit iežamet dušše iežamet ustibiidda dahje lagaš ustibiidda. Ámadaju/goruda čájeheapmi lea kultuvra maid eanas furri-olbmot dahke unnimustá oktii priváhta postas, lea dasto "sihkkojuvvo farga" -stilla postas dahje muitalusas.

Vaikko lea ná, mii leat dattetge rabas sosiála interakšuvnnaide neahta olggobealde. Mii ordnet furmeet-deaivvadeami—persovnnalaš deaivvadeapmi furri-olbmuid gaskka, lea dasto joavkkus dahje persovnnalaš, dáhpáhusas dahje juste dábálaččat—ja muhtumin dahkat con/fur on, nugo MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM ja nu ain. Lea somá deaivvadit singuin neahta olggobealde, oahpásmuvvat guhtet guimmiideamet, beassat oaidnit sin persovnnalaččat go eanas mis eat leat goasge oaidnán guhtet guimmiideamet ámadajuid, váldit gova maid seailluha alit persovnnalaččat ja sensurere almmolaččat, bohkosahttit ovttas ja ságastallat sullasaš beroštumiin ja nu ain. Dat lea somá, sosiála ja liekkus.

Vaikko, áššit eai oro seammalážžat odne. Go olbmot álget geahččalit váldit eret olbmuid anonymitehta, fallehit furri-olbmuid, therian-olbmuid, LGBTQIA ja doxxet sin, ja movt maid min searvvus searvá ja bidjá álkidit dramáid sisa, de áššit leat leamaš veahá eanet eahpádusat, unnit liekkus ja unnit dovdomeahttun nugo searvvus dahje bearaš. Dat ii leat šat seammaláhkai.

Oassi mus sávvá ahte áššit sáhttet máhccat dasa movt dat dovdui 2000- ja 2010-logus, muhto, mun divttán juste Ipmila dahkat loahpa. Mun lean veahá dilitmeahttun servodagas ja olbmuin. Mun lean váiban das movt áššit garrasit vearránit ja leat oaivvilduvvon fallehit ja juohkit unna searvvužiid doaivvutmeahttun dilážiidda. Mun in liiko dasa movt servodat ii šat odne gudnejahte ja leat ovttasvuođas.

Dat falleheamit bohte dábálaččat homofobiijas, transfobiijas, dahje muhtumin juste das go eai liiko man ártigat mii leat ja movt mii láhttet, erenoamážit furri-olbmot geat dahket čiekŋaleabbo rollaspealuid ja therianthropy.

Dat falleheamit bohte dábálaččat homofobiijas, transfobiijas, dahje muhtumin juste das go eai liiko man imašlaččat mii leat ja movt mii láhttet, erenoamážit furrit geat ellet dán eallinvuohkái čiekŋaleabbot, nugo rollaspealuiguin ja therianthropy-vugiin.

Oassi mus sávvá ahte áššit sáhttet máhccat dasa movt dat dovdui 2000- ja 2010-logus, muhto, mun divttán juste Ipmila ordnet loahpa. Mun lean veahá eahpádusas servodaga ja olbmuid hárrái. hypo_5:
Ja go mii leat dakkár arrát olbmot, de mii juste oažžut fallehemiid dákko ja duokko hui dávjá. Juogo neahtas, olggobealde neahta, dahje vel iežat lagamus olbmuin. Dat falleheamit bohte dábálaččat homofobiijas, transfobiijas, dahje muhtumin juste das go eai liiko dasa man arrát mii leat ja movt mii láhttet, erenoamážit furriin geat luitet iežaset dán eallinvuohkái vel čiekŋaleabbot, nugo rollaspealuiguin ja therianthropy-vugiin.

Dan dihte muhtumat mis ožžo oadjebasvuođa go eai dárbbashan muitalit geat mii leat ja gostat mii leat eret. Muhtumat mis ožžo oadjebasvuođa go čájehit iežamet dušše iežamet ustibiidda dahje lagaš ustibiidda. Ámadaju dahje goruda čájeheapmi lea kultuvra maid eanas furrit dahke unnimustá oktii priváhta postas, lea dasto dakkár "sihkon farga" -stilla postas dahje muitalusas (story).

Vaikko lea ná, mii leat dattetge rabas sosiála deaivvadeamiide neahta olggobealde. Mii ordnet furmeet-deaivvadeami—persovnnalaš deaivvadeapmi furriid gaskka, lea dasto joavkkus dahje guovttá gaskka, dáhpáhusas dahje juste dábálaččat—ja muhtumin ordnet con-dahje fur-konferánssaid, nugo MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM ja nu ain. Lea somá deaivvadit singuin olggobealde neahta, oahpásmuvvat guhtet guimmiideamet, oaidnit sin persovnnalaččat, go eanas mis eat leat goasge oaidnán guhtet guimmiideamet ámadajuid, váldit gova maid seailluha ieš ja suddje almmolaččat, bohkosit ovttas ja ságastallat sullasaš beroštumiin ja nu ain. Dat lea somá, sosiála ja liekkus.

Vaikko, áššit eai oro seammalážžat odne. Go olbmot álget geahččalit váldit eret olbmuid anonymitehta, fallehit furriid, therian-olbmuid, LGBTQIA ja doxxet sin, ja go min iežamet searvvuš maid searvá ja bidjá álkidit dramáid sisa, de áššit leat leamaš veahá eanet eahpádusat, unnit liekkus ja unnit dovdomeahttun nugo searvvuš dahje bearaš. Dat ii leat šat seammaláhkai.

Oassi mus sávvá ahte áššit sáhttet máhccat dasa movt dat dovdui 2000- ja 2010-logus, muhto, mun divttán juste Ipmila ordnet loahpa. Mun lean veahá eahpádusas servodaga ja olbmuid hárrái. Mun lean váiban das movt áššit garrasit vearránit ja leat oaivvilduvvon fallehit ja juohkit unna searvvužiid doaivvutmeahttun dilážiidda. Mun in liiko dasa movt servodat ii šat odne gudnejahte ja leat ovttasvuođas.

source_doc:
US bound Thompson stars as Galway reach FBD final

California-bound Matthew Thompson lashed home 2-06 as Galway overcame Leitrim by 11 points in Tuam to book their spot in next week's FBD League decider.

2025 Young Footballer of the Year nominee Thompson will be out of action for the entirety of the league and the early part of the championship, with Padraic Joyce confirming that the Salthill-Knocknacarra players is studying in Berkeley for the upcoming semester.

He was the leading figure on a largely experimental Galway side - which also contained Cian Hernon and Kieran Molloy - as they came from three points down at half-time to beat Leitrim.

Thompson buried a goal in the top corner in the first half but the Connacht champions trailed Leitrim at the break, Killian Gaffney proving effective from placed balls, while Ryan O'Rourke and Jack Kelly also landed points.

Galway manager Padraic Joyce remonstrates with the referee over a decision

However, with Thompson converting a second half penalty, Galway eased home after the interval, with 10 different scorers overall as they ran out 2-19 to 0-14 winners.

After two rounds of the FBD League, the top two progress to next week's final, with Galway facing the winner of tomorrow's Roscommon-Mayo tie.

In Leinster, Westmeath have booked their spot in the O'Byrne Cup final after an 11-point win over Offaly in a goal-fest in Mullingar.

Waiting for them in the decider is a Kildare outfit that defeated Dublin 1-22 to 1-13.

Mark McHugh's Westmeath side advanced ahead of reigning champions Longford following a coin toss last Saturday but they impressed on the field of play on Saturday.

A brace of goals apiece from Danny McCarton and Brandon Kelly, plus another from Senan Baker, saw them run out 5-10 to 2-08 winners.

Ciaran Murphy scored two goals either side of half-time to pull the visitors back into the contest, the margin being briefly reduced to three points 11 minutes into the second half.

However, an unanswered burst of 3-02 over the next 15 minutes saw the hosts settle the contest in an emphatic manner.

Kildare found their feet in the second half against Dublin and now are one game away from a first O'Byrne Cup since 2014.

Harry O'Neill fires to the net for Kildare

Both management teams experimented in Newbridge with Dublin in particular shorn of overly familiar faces, but in the first half it seemed to matter little as they led 1-08 to 0-08 at the break.

Jamie McCarville palmed home their goal but it was Clyde Burke who caught the eye for the travelling support with some brilliant shooting that included two orange flags - the second of which was of the highest quality.

Alex Beirne was racking up the scores for the Lilywhites though and his two-point free early in the second half kick-started a run of 1-05 without reply, Harry O'Neill with the goal in the 43rd minute.

Kildare continued to turn the screw with James Harris' late two-pointer sending them on their way.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
USA:ii mátkkošteaddji Thompson lei njunušas go Galway geargai FBD-finálii

Matthew Thompson, gii lea mátkkošteame Californiai, časkkihahtti 2-06 go Galway vuittii Leitrim 11 poanttain Tuamas ja sihkkarastti iežas saji boahtte vahku FBD-liigga loahppagilvui.

Jagi 2025 nuorra spábbačiekči (Young Footballer of the Year) nominánta Thompson ii leat fárus olles liiggas iige álgogásis hárjehallanliiggas, ja Padraic Joyce lea nannet ahte Salthill-Knocknacarra spábbačiekči studere Berkeleyis boahtte lohkanbaji.

Son lei njunušgájuhažžan oalle geahččaleaddji Galway-joatkkas – mas ledje maiddái fárus Cian Hernon ja Kieran Molloy – go sii bohte golmmaid poanttaid duohken gaskabeivve vuoitit Leitrim.

Thompson bálki málba bajimuš čihkii vuosttaš gaskabeivve, muhto Connacht-meastárat ledje Leitrim duohken bottus, mas Killian Gaffney čájehii iežas nannosavvon málain, muhto maiddái Ryan O'Rourke ja Jack Kelly ožžo poanttaid.

Galway-hárjeheaddji Padraic Joyce vuostálastá duopmára mearrádusa

Eará láhkai go Thompson časkkihahtti nubbi gaskabeivve penalty, Galway beasai álkit dán maŋŋá, ja oktiibuot 10 iešguđetlágan časkkiheaddji ledje go sii vuite 2-19 - 0-14.

FBD-liigga guovtti vuoru maŋŋá guokte njunušjoavkku mannet boahtte vahku finálii, gos Galway deaivá boahttevaš Roscommon-Mayo-vuoiti.

Leinsteris Westmeath lea sihkkarasttán iežas saji O'Byrne Cup -finálas 11 poantta vuoittu maŋŋá Offaly badjel málagilvvu maŋŋá Mullingaris.

Sii vuordet loahppagilvvus Kildare-joavkku, mii vuittii Dublin 1-22 - 1-13.

Mark McHugh Westmeath-joavku manai ovddasgolli meastáriid Longford ovddabeallai rano-bálkun maŋŋá mannan lávvardaga, muhto sii čájehedje iežaset lášmmohisvuođa lávvardaga spábbatullis.

Guokte mála iešguđetlágan Danny McCarton ja Brandon Kelly, ja vel okta Senan Bakeris, dagahii ahte sii vuite 5-10 - 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy časkkihahtti guokte mála goappešat beali gaskabeivve ja geasii gussiid fas fárrui gilvui, ja erohus biddjojuvvui oanehaččat golmma poantii 11 minuhta maŋŋá nubbi gaskabeivve.

Muhto vástidakeahtes 3-02-bávtti boahtte 15 minuhta áigge dagahii ahte ruovttujoavku sihkkarastti vuoittu nannosit.

Kildare gávnnai iežas saji nubbi gaskabeivve Dublin vuostá ja lea dál ovtta spábbačiekčama duohken vuosttaš O'Byrne Cup -vuoittus maŋŋá jagi 2014.

Harry O'Neill časke málba Kildarii

Goappešat hárjeheaddjijoavkkut geahččaledje ođđa vugiid Newbridgeis, ja Dublinis erenoamážit váilo dábálaš modjut, muhto vuosttaš gaskabeivve dat ii lean nu dehálaš go sii jođihe 1-08 - 0-08 bottus.

Jamie McCarville dasti iežaset mála, muhto lei Clyde Burke gii geasii oinnolaš fuomášumi fárus čiekčivuidda erenoamáš buori čiekčamiiguin, main ledje guokte alit leavgga – main nubbi lei erenoamáš dási.

Alex Beirne čohkkii goittotge poanttaid Lilywhites-joavkkus, ja su guovtti poantta nuvttá spábba nubbi gaskabeivve álggos álggahii 1-05 run vuostálasvuođahaga, Harry O'Neill málain 43. minuhtas.

Kildare jotkkii preassema ja James Harris maŋit guovtti poantta čiekčan sihkkarastti sin vuoittu.

Eará láhkai go Thompson časkkihahtti nubbi gaskabeivve straffespábba, Galway beasai álkit dán maŋŋá, ja oktiibuot 10 iešguđetlágan časkkiheaddji ledje go sii vuite 2-19 - 0-14.

FBD-liigga guovtti vuoru maŋŋá guokte njunušjoavkku mannet boahtte vahku finálii, gos Galway deaivá boahttevaš Roscommon-Mayo-vuoiti.

Leinsteris Westmeath lea sihkkarasttán iežas saji O'Byrne Cup -finálas 11 poantta vuoittu maŋŋá Offaly badjel málagilvvu maŋŋá Mullingaris.

Sii vuordet loahppagilvvus Kildare-joavkku, mii vuittii Dublin 1-22 - 1-13.

Mark McHugh Westmeath-joavku manai ovddasgolli meastáriid Longford ovddabeallai rano-bálkun maŋŋá mannan lávvardaga, muhto sii čájehedje iežaset lášmmohisvuođa lávvardaga spábbatullis.

Guokte mála iešguđetlágan Danny McCarton ja Brandon Kelly, ja vel okta Senan Bakeris, dagahii ahte sii vuite 5-10 - 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy časkkihahtti guokte mála goappešat beali gaskabeivve ja geasii gussiid fas fárrui gilvui, ja erohus biddjojuvvui oanehaččat golmma poantii 11 minuhta maŋŋá nubbi gaskabeivve.

Muhto vástidakeahtes 3-02-bávtti boahtte 15 minuhta áigge dagahii ahte ruovttujoavku sihkkarastti vuoittu nannosit.

Kildare gávnnai iežas saji nubbi gaskabeivve Dublin vuostá ja lea dál ovtta spábbačiekčama duohken vuosttaš O'Byrne Cup -vuoittus maŋŋá jagi 2014.

Harry O'Neill časke málba Kildarii

Goappešat hárjeheaddjijoavkkut geahččaledje ođđa vugiid Newbridgeis, ja Dublinis erenoamážit váilo dábálaš modjut, muhto vuosttaš gaskabeivve dat ii lean nu dehálaš go sii jođihe 1-08 - 0-08 bottus.

Jamie McCarville dasti iežaset mála, muhto lei Clyde Burke gii geasii oinnolaš fuomášumi fárus čiekčivuidda erenoamáš buori čiekčamiiguin, main ledje guokte alit leavgga – main nubbi lei erenoamáš dási.

Alex Beirne čohkkii goittotge poanttaid Lilywhites-joavkkus, ja su guovtti poantta nuvttá spábba nubbi gaskabeivve álggos álggahii 1-05 run vuostálasvuođahaga, Harry O'Neill málain 43. minuhtas.

Kildare jotkkii preassema ja James Harris maŋit guovtti poantta čiekčan sihkkarastti sin vuoittu.

Thompson bálki málba bajimuš čihkii vuosttaš gaskabeivve, muhto Connacht-meastárat ledje Leitrim duohken bottus, mas Killian Gaffney čájehii iežas nannosavvon málain, muhto maiddái Ryan O'Rourke ja Jack Kelly ožžo poanttaid.

Galway-hárjeheaddji Padraic Joyce dárkkista duopmára mearrádusa

Eará láhkai go Thompson časkkihahtti nubbi gaskabeivve straffespábba, Galway beasai álkit dán maŋŋá, ja oktiibuot 10 iešguđetlágan časkkiheaddji ledje go sii vuite 2-19 - 0-14.

FBD-liigga guovtti vuoru maŋŋá guokte njunušjoavkku mannet boahtte vahku finálii, gos Galway deaivá boahttevaš Roscommon-Mayo-vuoiti.

Leinsteris Westmeath lea sihkkarasttán iežas saji O'Byrne Cup -finálas 11 poantta vuoittu maŋŋá Offaly badjel málagilvvu maŋŋá Mullingaris.

Sii vuordet loahppagilvvus Kildare-joavkku, mii vuittii Dublin 1-22 - 1-13.

Mark McHugh Westmeath-joavku manai ovddasgolli meastáriid Longford ovddabeallai rano-bálkun maŋŋá mannan lávvardaga, muhto sii čájehedje iežaset lášmmohisvuođa lávvardaga spábbatullis.

Guokte mála iešguđetlágan Danny McCarton ja Brandon Kelly, ja vel okta Senan Bakeris, dagahii ahte sii vuite 5-10 - 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy časkkihahtti guokte mála goappešat beali gaskabeivve ja geasii gussiid fas fárrui gilvui, ja erohus biddjojuvvui oanehaččat golmma poantii 11 minuhta maŋŋá nubbi gaskabeivve.

Muhto vástidakeahtes 3-02-bávtti boahtte 15 minuhta áigge dagahii ahte ruovttujoavku sihkkarastti vuoittu nannosit.

Kildare gávnnai iežas saji nubbi gaskabeivve Dublin vuostá ja lea dál ovtta spábbačiekčama duohken vuosttaš O'Byrne Cup -vuoittus maŋŋá jagi 2014.

Harry O'Neill časke málba Kildarii

Goappešat hárjeheaddjijoavkkut geahččaledje ođđa vugiid Newbridgeis, ja Dublinis erenoamážit váilo dábálaš modjut, muhto vuosttaš gaskabeivve dat ii lean nu dehálaš go sii jođihe 1-08 - 0-08 bottus.

Jamie McCarville dasti iežaset mála, muhto lei Clyde Burke gii geasii oinnolaš fuomášumi fárus čiekčivuidda erenoamáš buori čiekčamiiguin, main ledje guokte alit leavgga – main nubbi lei erenoamáš dási.

Alex Beirne čohkkii goittotge poanttaid Lilywhites-joavkkus, ja su guovtti poantta nuvttá spábba nubbi gaskabeivve álggos álggahii 1-05 run vuostálasvuođahaga, Harry O'Neill málain 43. minuhtas.

Kildare jotkkii preassema ja James Harris maŋit guovtti poantta čiekčan sihkkarastti sin vuoittu.

$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. 1. Sii sáddejedje liŋkka videoságastallamii, golbma vahku áigi. Dat geavaha Ikea iežas videoságastallanbálvalusa
2. Sii bivde ođđa gievkkana plánaid ja 3D-govaid
3. Sii sáddejedje e-poastta mas lohket "giitu go sáddejit plána"
4. Mii logget sisa odne, ja sii álggahit ságastallama ná: "min vuogádat gielddii du fiilaid, duddjojedne gievkkana ovttas"

source_doc:
Ashley Barnes at the double as Burnley claim welcome win over Millwall

Ashley Barnes bagged a brace as Burnley put their Premier League worries on hold to cruise into the fourth round of the FA Cup with a 5-1 win over Millwall.

The 36-year-old scored his first goal of the season early on and added his second midway through the second half as the blundering Lions gifted a confident home side the most emphatic of wins.

Boss Scott Parker made eight changes to the side that started in Wednesday's 2-2 draw with Manchester United and they did not disappoint, as further goals from Loum Tchaouna and Jaidon Anthony put them out of sight by half-time.

Substitute Jaydon Banel added Burnley's fifth on the stroke of 90 minutes before the shell-shocked Lions, who had completely capitulated, netted an added-time consolation through Josh Coburn.

Burnley dominated the opening exchanges and grabbed the lead in the 11th minute when Jacob Bruun Larsen squared for Barnes to sweep home past visiting goalkeeper Steven Benda.

The Lions mustered little in response, with Aidomo Emakhu booting their best chance straight at Burnley keeper Max Weiss after being released down the left by Joe Bryan.

But the visitors slowly grew into the game and should have levelled when Jake Cooper got his head on Alfie Doughty's cross from deep on the left but was denied by a brilliant over-arm save from Weiss.

The keeper saved again from Cooper on the half-hour as Millwall threatened a leveller but the visitors were undone by two defensive errors that put the game beyond their grasp.

Tchaouna was allowed to thread his left-foot shot from the edge of the box past a static Benda on 35 minutes and shortly before the break the Millwall keeper's poor clearance ultimately gifted Anthony the chance to slide home his side's third.

Millwall looked livelier at the start of the second half and Thierno Ballo should have done better when he found space to get a shot off in the left side of the box, but the home side were clearly in cruise control.

Tchaouna came close to his second when he rifled a shot against the outside of Benda's right-hand post and the increasingly inevitable fourth arrived on 65 minutes when Kamarl Grant made a hash of clearing Anthony's right-wing cross and a delighted Barnes mopped up.

Hunting for a hat-trick, Barnes flashed a header straight at Benda as the linesman's flag was raised, but it was Banel who completed the rout from close range before Coburn's confident finish in stoppage time.

hypo_0:
Ashley Barnes skoraii guovtte geardde go Burnley oaččui dehálaš vuoittu Millwalla vuostá

Ashley Barnes skoraii guokte moala go Burnley binnážiid vajálduhtii Premier League-muraidis ja manai njuolga FA-cupa njealját gurrii 5-1-vuoittuin Millwalla vuostá.

36-jahkásaš spellei skoraii iežas baji vuosttaš moala álgomuttus ja lasihii nuppi moala go nuppi vuorru lei beallemuttus, go fasttes meattáhusaid dahkan Lions attii iežassihkaris ruovttujovkui hui čielga vuoittu.

Hovdda Scott Parker lei rievdadan gávcci spellei dan joavkkus, mii álggahii gaskavahko 2-2-dássaspealus Manchester Uniteda vuostá, ja sii eai behton, go Loum Tchaouna ja Jaidon Anthony moalat dahke dilli dakkárin, ahte vuoitto lei juo sihkkarastojuvvon gaskabeivviid rádjai.

Sajástatspellei Jaydon Banel lasihii Burnley viđat moala go 90 minuhta ledje lahkanemin loahpa, ovdal go dárroluvvan Lions, mii lei ollásit gahčan, oaččui loabbatmoala lasiáiggis Josh Coburna bokte.

Burnley dominerii spealu álggus ja válddii jođu 11. minuhtas, go Jacob Bruun Larsen attii sirdima Barnesii, gii skoraii mannan guossi málvahtariid Steven Benda meattá.

Lions ii nagodan báljo maidege vástidit, ja Aidomo Emakhu bálkii iežaset buoremus liibba njuolga Burnley málvahtariid Max Weissii, mii lei beassan joatkit Joe Bryana bokte gurut bealde.

Muhto guossit šadde gulul eambbo mielde speallui ja livčče galgan dássádit, go Jake Cooper oaččui oaivvi Alfie Doughty gurut beale crossii, muhto Weiss vuostálasttii earenoamáš giehta-gáktenin.

Málvahtar gákttii Cooper-báhčima fas go jahkebeallediibmu lei gollan, go Millwall áittii dássádusain, muhto guossohiid cuvkejedje guokte bealuštusmeattáhusa, mat dahke spealu sirdima sin olbmo olbmos olggos.

Tchaouna biddjui fitnat gurut juolggi báhčimiin málgaguovllus static Benda meattá 35 minuhta maŋŋá, ja binná ovdal gaskabeivviid Millwalla málvahtara heittogis málgaguovllu eretbálkun attii Anthonyliibba sliidet ruovttujovkui goalmmát moala.

Millwall lei eambbo ealasiin nuppi vuoru álggus, ja Thierno Ballo livčči galgan dahkat buoret go gávnnai saji báhčimii gurut bealde málgaguovllus, muhto ruovttujoavku lei čielgasit njuolga stivra guvlui.

Tchaouna lei lahka iežas nuppi moala, go son bálkii báhčima vuostá Benda olgeš málgapolsta olggobealde, ja eambbo ja eambbo dábálaš njealját moalla bođii 65 minuhta maŋŋá, go Kamarl Grant dagai váttisvuođa eretbálkumis Anthony olgešbeale crossis ja ilolaš Barnes bođii dasto doidit das.

Hat-trick-ohcamis, Barnes flasšii oaivebáhčima njuolga Benda vuostá go linnjealbmá leavga lei bajiduvvon, muhto dat lei Banel, gii loahpahii vuoittu lagis ovdal Coburna iežassihkaris loahpaheami lasiáiggis.
hypo_1:
Ashley Barnes skoraidis guovtte geardde go Burnley válddii dehálaš vuoittu Millwalla vuostá

Ashley Barnes skoraidis guokte moala go Burnley binnážiid vajálduhtii Premier League-muraidis ja manai njuolga FA-cupa njealját gurrii 5-1-vuoittuin Millwalla vuostá.

36-jahkásaš spellei skoraidis iežas dán baji vuosttaš moala álgomuttus ja lasihii nuppi go nuppi vuorru lei beallemuttus, go fasttes meattáhusaid dahkan Lions attii iežassihkaris ruovttujovkui hui čielga vuoittu.

Hovdda Scott Parker lei rievdadan gávcci spellei dan joavkkus, mii álggahii gaskavahko 2-2-dássaspealus Manchester Uniteda vuostá, ja sii eai behton, go Loum Tchaouna ja Jaidon Anthony lassemoalat dahke dilli dakkárin, ahte vuoitto lei juo sihkkarastojuvvon gaskabeivviid rádjai.

Sajástatspellei Jaydon Banel lasihii Burnley viđat moala juste ovdal go 90 minuhta ledje dievvan, ovdal go dárroluvvan Lions, mii lei ollásit vuollánan, oaččui loabbatmoala lasiáiggis Josh Coburna bokte.

Burnley dominerii spealu álggus ja válddii jođu 11. minuhtas, go Jacob Bruun Larsen attii sirdima Barnesii, gii skoraidis málgaguovllu sisa meattá guossi málvahtara Steven Benda.

Lions ii nagodan báljo maidege vástidit, ja Aidomo Emakhu bálkii sin buoremus liibba njuolga Burnley málvahtarii Max Weissii maŋŋá go lei beassan friija gurut bealde Joe Bryana bokte.

Muhto guossit šadde gulul eambbo mielde speallui ja livčče galgan dássádit, go Jake Cooper oaččui oaivvi Alfie Doughty gurut beale crossii, muhto Weiss gákttii ereloai dakkár giehta-gáktenin.

Málvahtar gákttii Cooper-báhčima fas go jahkebeallediibmu lei gollan, go Millwall áittii dássádusain, muhto guossohiid cuvkejedje guokte bealuštusmeattáhusa, mat dahke spealu sirdima sin olbmo olbmos olggos.

Tchaouna biddjui fitnat gurut juolggi báhčimiin málgaguovllu duogábealde meattá lihkatmeahttun Benda 35 minuhta maŋŋá, ja binná ovdal gaskabeivviid Millwalla málvahtara heittogis málgaguovllu eretbálkumis attii Anthonyliibba sliidet ruovttujovkui goalmmát moala.

Millwall lei eambbo ealasiin nuppi vuoru álggus, ja Thierno Ballo livčči galgan dahkat buoret go gávnnai saji báhčimii gurut bealde málgaguovllus, muhto ruovttujoavku stivrii spealu hui álkit.

Tchaouna lei lahka iežas nuppi moala, go son bálkii báhčima vuostá Benda olgeš málgapolsta olggobealde, ja eambbo ja eambbo dábálaš njealját moalla bođii 65 minuhta maŋŋá, go Kamarl Grant dagai váttisvuođa eretbálkumis Anthony olgešbeale crossis ja ilolaš Barnes bođii dasto doidit das.

Hat-trick-ohcamis, Barnes flasšii oaivebáhčima njuolga Benda vuostá go linnjealbmá leavga lei bajiduvvon, muhto dat lei Banel, gii loahpahii vuoittu lagis ovdal Coburna iežassihkaris loahpaheami lasiáiggis.

Hovdda Scott Parker lei rievdadan gávcci spellei dan joavkkus, mii álggahii gaskavahko 2-2-dássaspealus Manchester Uniteda vuostá, ja sii eai behton, go Loum Tchaouna ja Jaidon Anthony lassemoalat dahke dan, ahte vuoitto lei juo mearkkašahtti sihkkarastojuvvon gaskabeivviid rádjai.

Sajástatspellei Jaydon Banel lasihii Burnley viđat moala juste ovdal go 90 minuhta ledje dievvan, ovdal go dárroluvvan Lions, mii lei ollásit vuollánan, oaččui loabbatmoala lasiáiggis Josh Coburna bokte.

Burnley dominerii spealu álggus ja válddii jođu 11. minuhtas, go Jacob Bruun Larsen attii sirdima Barnesii, gii časkki málva guossi málvahtara Steven Benda meattá.

Lions ii nagodan báljo maidege vástidit, ja Aidomo Emakhu bálkii sin buoremus liibba njuolga Burnley málvahtarii Max Weissii maŋŋá go lei beassan friija gurut bealde Joe Bryana bokte.

Muhto guossit šadde gulul eambbo mielde speallui ja livčče galgan dássádit, go Jake Cooper oaččui oaivvi Alfie Doughty gurut beale crossii, muhto Weiss gákttii erenoamáš bures bajilválddi giehtagáktenin.

Málvahtar gákttii Cooper-báhčima fas go jahkebeallediibmu lei gollan, go Millwall áittii dássádusain, muhto guossohiid cuvkejedje guokte bealuštusmeattáhusa, mat dahke spealu sirdima sin olbmos olggos.

Tchaouna beasai fitnat gurut juolggi báhčimiin málgaguovllu ravddas meattá lihkatmeahttun Benda 35 minuhta maŋŋá, ja binná ovdal gaskabeivviid Millwalla málvahtara heittogis málgaguovllu eretbálkumis attii Anthonyii liibba sliidet ruovttujovkui goalmmát moala.

Millwall lei eambbo ealasiin nuppi vuoru álggus, ja Thierno Ballo livčči galgan dahkat buoret go gávnnai saji báhčimii gurut bealde málgaguovllus, muhto ruovttujoavku stivrii spealu hui álkit.

Tchaouna lei lahka iežas nuppi moala, go son bálkii báhčima vuostá Benda olgeš málgapolsta olggobealde, ja eambbo ja eambbo dábálaš njealját moalla bođii 65 minuhta maŋŋá, go Kamarl Grant dagai váttisvuođa eretbálkumis Anthony olgešbeale crossis ja ilolaš Barnes bođii dasto doidit das.

Hat-trick-ohcamis, Barnes flasšii oaivebáhčima njuolga Benda vuostá go linnjealbmá leavga lei bajiduvvon, muhto dat lei Banel, gii loahpahii vuoittu lagis ovdal Coburna iežassihkaris loahpaheami lasiáiggis.

source_doc:
"An utterly miserable day": Kempton Park meeting marred by death of three horses

The Lanzarote Hurdle card at Kempton Park was marred by the death of three horses, including the Grade One-winning Kalif Du Berlais, whose loss Paul Nicholls described as "a big kick in the teeth" and a "sad day."

Kalif Du Berlais - whose ownership group includes Sir Alex Ferguson - unseated Harry Cobden in the four-runner Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase and landed lame, with the broken shoulder he sustained proving untreatable and he was euthanised by the veterinary team on Saturday.

Nicholls said: "It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone, the owners, the poor girl who looks after him - you hate to see that happen. He was just showing his class today, he jumped and travelled well and sadly now he will never be able to show the potential we thought he had.

"I can say as much as I like, but it's just a shame for the whole team. Harry was extremely upset and is missing his ride in the last as he doesn't feel great about it. He's a big, bold horse who attacks his fences and those horses, when they do that, can end up having a bad fall.

"He was enthusiastic today and travelling beautifully and we'll never know where we would have ended up, we've always had a lot of faith in him. These things happen, sadly, and we'll have to try to pick ourselves up and move forward. These horses get the best of everything, there's not much you can say to make it better at this point.

"It never gets any easier when these things happen and it's a big old blow."

In the Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, Jonjo and AJ O'Neill's Peso was pulled up on the flat with an injury that could not be treated, leaving racecourse vets with no choice but to euthanise him.

Harry Derham saddled Wertpol for the juvenile hurdle and the horse looked to be running a huge race before falling at the last and sustaining a life-ending injury. Derham said on his X account: "An utterly miserable day at Kempton Park today losing Wertpol who we only had the good fortune of having in our yard for a short period of time.

"It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone," said Paul Nicholls. Photograph: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"He was a bright talent who was fresh and happy doing his work every day, often playing around and expressing himself. He loved his job and I am so sad for his Heart Of The South syndicate, who are the most wonderful group of people. Racing can at times be a painful sport and today has been a tough day for a number of connections. A day to forget."

A spokesperson for Kempton Park said: "All of us at Kempton Park care deeply about the welfare of all racehorses, as do the thousands of racing staff who provide them with world-class levels of care at home every day. Our heartfelt condolences are with the connections of all three horses."
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
"Aivve surgadis beaivi": Kempton Parka gilvvut surgadedduis golmma heakka manahallamiin

Kempton Parka Lanzarote Hurdle -gilvvuid surgadii golmma heakka manahallan. Okta dain lei Grade One -vuoiti Kalif Du Berlais, man lihkohisvuođa Paul Nicholls govaidii "garrasit deaddilin" ja "surgadis beaivin".

Kalif Du Berlais – man oamasteaddjijoavkku searvvis lea maid Sir Alex Ferguson – bálkii Harry Cobdena selggistis Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase -gilvvus, mas ledje njeallje heakka. Heastta olgeš oalgi doddjoneami geažil nu garrasit, ahte dálkkodeapmi lei veadjemeahttun, ja šibitdoavtterjoavku fertii dan luitit sisa sotnabeaivve.

Nicholls muitalii: "Lea surgadis beaivi go dakkár heasttat manahallojuvvojit, dat lea lossa ášši olles jovkui. Dat lea garrasit deaddilin buohkaide: oamasteaddjiide, sutnje geas heasttas lea fuolla – lea surgat go dakkár dáhpáhuvvá. Son čájehii aiddo iežas dáidduid odne, riidei ja mátkkoštii bures, ja šállošahtti dál son ii goasge beasa čájehit iežas dakkár potensiála mii mis lei dárkkuhus.

"Sáhtán lohkat vaikko maid, muhto dat lea dušše šállošahtti olles jovkui. Harry lei hui unnistuvvan ja son ii riide maŋimuš gilvvus go son ii dál dovdda iežas bures. Dat lea stuorra, duostilis heasta mii falleha áidigoarkŋun-gilvvuid, ja dakkár heasttaide sáhttá, go dakkár dahket, gártat lossa gahččan.

"Son lei odne movttet ja mátkkoštii čábbát, eatge mii goasge dieđe gosa livččiimet gártan, mis lea álo leamaš hui garra jáhkku sutnje. Dakkár áššit dáhpáhuvvet, šállošahtti, ja mii fertet geahččalit njuorrat ja ovdánit. Dát heasttat ožžot buot buoremusa, ii dás dál leat olu maid sáhttá lohkat mii dán buoridivččii.

"Ii dat goasge álggut go dát áššit dáhpáhuvvet, dat lea stuorra časkestat."

Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase -gilvvus Jonjo ja AJ O'Neilla Peso bissehuvvui duolbba eatnamis bákčasiid geažil maid ii sáhttán dálkkodit, mii gáibidii gilvvošaddit šibitdoaktariid luitit su sisa.

Harry Derham riidii Wertpola nuoraid áidegilvui, ja heasta orui riidejit hui bures ovdalgo son gahčai maŋimuš áiddi nalde ja oaččui dakkár bákčasa mii loahpahii su eallima. Derham čálii iežas X-konttus: "Aivve surgadis beaivi Kempton Parkas odne go manahallat Wertpola, gean mis lei lihkku doallat iežamet šiljus dušše oanehis áiggi.

"Lea surgadis beaivi go dakkár heasttat manahallojuvvojit, dat lea lossa ášši olles jovkui. Dat lea garrasit deaddilin buohkaide," Paul Nicholls dajai. Govva: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"Son lei šaddáris taleanta, mii lei varas ja lihkolaš iežas barggus juohke beaivve, ja dávjá stođai ja čájehii iežas. Son humai iežas barggu, ja lean hui lossadit su Heart Of The South -syndikáhtas, mii lea buot eanemus ipmárduslaš joavku. Gilvvut sáhttet muhtumin leat bákčasat ja odne lea leamaš lossa beaivi máŋgga oamasteaddjái. Beaivi mii ferte vajálduhttojuvvot."

Kempton Parka ovddasteaddji muitalii: "Mii buohkat Kempton Parkas beroštit hui garrasit buot gilvvoheasttaid čálggus, nu mo maid dat duháhollat gilvvohallit geat biddjot sidjiide máilmmi dási fuola ruovttus juohke beaivve. Mii sáhttit váimmolaš lossesváimmu buot golmma heastta oamasteaddjiide."

Derham čálii iežas X-konttus: “Aivve surgadis beaivi Kempton Parkas odne go manahallat Wertpola, gean mis lei lihkku doallat iežamet šiljus dušše oanehis áiggi.

“Lea surgadis beaivi go dakkár heasttat manahallojuvvojit, dat lea lossa ášši olles jovkui. Dat lea garrasit deaddilin buohkaide,” Paul Nicholls dajai. Govva: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

Son humai iežas barggu, ja lean hui lossadit su Heart Of The South -syndikáhta beales, mii lea buot eanemus ipmárduslaš joavku. Gilvvut sáhttet muhtumin leat bákčasat ja odne lea leamaš lossa beaivi máŋgga oamasteaddjái. Beaivi mii ferte vajálduhttojuvvot.”

Kempton Parka ovddasteaddji muitalii: “Mii buohkat Kempton Parkas beroštit hui garrasit buot gilvvoheasttaid čálggus, nu mo maid dat duháhollat gilvvohallit geat biddjot sidjiide máilmmi dási fuola ruovttus juohke beaivve. Mii sáhttit váimmolaš lossadit buot golmma heastta oamasteaddjiide.”

Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase -gilvvus Jonjo ja AJ O'Neilla Peso bissehuvvui duolbba eatnamis bákčasiid geažil maid ii sáhttán dálkkodit, mii gáibidii gilvvošaddit šibitdoaktariid luitit dan sisa.

Derham čálii iežas X-konttus: “Aivve surgadis beaivi Kempton Parkas odne go manahallat Wertpola, gean mis lei lihkku doallat iežamet šiljus dušše oanehis áiggi.

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mun vurden ahte liikon Project Hail Mary -girjái, mun LIUKOJIN Project Hail Mary -girjái, dat maiddái bávččagahtti mu earenoamáš vugiin dieđaoahpaheaddji ežžonažžan maŋŋel jagi go lean geahččat mo buot dieđaoahpahus lea ráfihisvuođain fallehuvvon ja das leat váldojuvvon ruđat eret. Olbmot liikojit dán elliideandagovvii, mii sihkkarit šaddá lihkostupmin, ja sii vašuhit mu ežžona barggu ja barget su prográmmaid vuostá ja hálidit mii massit min karriearaid. Mo lea vejolaš ahte dát buot lea duohta seammás.

Son vulggii iđđes dás seahka 7 mannat oahpahit geavatlaš laboratoriabargguid maid son oahpaha, gos sii gieđahallat seallaid, gos leat stuorrudan luohkkásturvuda ja geahpedan oahpahanveahkiid, son geavaha eanet aktiiva áiggi studeanttaiguin lab-kallariin go oktage eará klássa universitehtas. Son ásahii prográmma kommunála allaskuvlla studeanttaide vai sii ožžot ruhtaduvvon bargguid laboratoriain, mii rahpá STEM-bálgáid sidjiide geat eai goasge eará láhkai livčče ožžon dán vejolašvuođa. Buot dán earenoamáš barggu ovddas son gohčoduvvo "DEI-bargun dieđas" mii sin mielas lea lágahis

Muhto dieđusge, jáhkán ahte jos son livččii vilges almmái programmerejeaddji guhte čállá fanfic-teavsttaid dieđaoahpahusa birra.... son livččii oadjuduvvon.

@grimalkina seamma ruohttasat leat juo Hail Marys, duohta dál. Mun liikon Andy Weirii hui olu ja in jáhke ahte son oaivvildii dán, muhto oppa dát jurdda ahte "byrokratia ja ovttasbargu leat duođaid cáskkaldahkan áššiid ordnemii, ja go áššit mannet boastut mii oažžut fámolaš anti-byrokráhta guhte vuorusta dábálašvugiid ja bágge juohkeovtta bargat prošeavtta, herggiid dahje dan maid oassálastit hálidit" čuozai munnje dego hui Amerihkálaš individualismma fápmo-fántasia, ja livččen jáhkkán ahte Amerihkálaš lea čállán dán jos in livčče diehtán

@jcachada @grimalkina
Vai mielddiset, girjjis lea dát oassi mii ii lean elliideandagovas.
---
“Lean utnolaš,” dajan Strattai. “Go mii álggahit Hail Mary. Maid don de barggat?”
“Mun?” son sárdnoi. “Ii mearkkaš maidege. Go Hail Mary álggahuvvo, mu fápmu nohka. Mun jáhkkihahttit šaddan diggái suhttan ráđđehusaid dihte fápmonuolvuma geažil. Sáhtán vihkis eallima giddagasas ordnet.”
“Lean seamma giddagaslanjas du lahka,” sárdnoi Leclerc.
“Leatgo dán birra ollige fuolas?”
Son badjelgeahčai oalggi. “Mii buohkat fertet dahkat sakriifiissaid. Jos ferten leat máilmmi ráŋggáštus mii sihkkarastá min gádjuma, de dat lea mu sakriifiisa mii ferte dahkkot.”
---
Leago son buoret dahje boastut jos son jáhkká ahte son sakriifisere iežas?

Mun vurden ahte liikon Project Hail Maryi, mun LIUKOJIN Project Hail Maryi, dat maiddái bávččagahtii mu earenoamáš vugiin luonddufágaoahpaheaddji ežžonan, maŋŋel jagi go lean geahččat mo buot luonddufágaoahpahus viggojuvvo billistuvvot ja das váldojit ruđat eret. Olbmot liikojit dán filbmii, mii sihkkarit šaddá lihkostupmin, muhto sii vašuhit mu ežžona barggu, billistit su prográmmaid ja hálidit ahte mii massit iežamet karriearaid. Mo lea vejolaš ahte dát buot lea duohta seammás.

Son vulggii iđđes dás seahka gáržžes fárttaiguin oahpahit geavatlaš laboratoriabargguid, gos sii gieđahallat seallaid, ja gos eiseválddit leat stuorrudan luohkkásturvuda ja geahpedan oahpahanveahkiid. Son geavaha eanet áiggi studeanttaiguin lab-kallariin go oktage eará klássa olles kampusas. Son ásahii prográmma loahpahanstudeanttaide vai sii ožžot ruhtaduvvon bargguid laboratoriain, mii rahpá STEM-bálgáid sidjiide geat eai goasge eará láhkai livčče ožžon dán vejolašvuođa. Buot dán earenoamáš barggu ovddas son dál gohčoduvvo "DEI-bargun dieđas" mii sin mielas lea lágahis.

Muhto dieđusge, jáhkán ahte jos son livččii vilges almmái programmerejeaddji guhte čállá fanfic-teavsttaid luonddufágaoahpahusa birra.... son livččii oadjebas dilis.

Mun vurden ahte liikon Project Hail Maryi, mun DUOĐAID LIIKOJIN Project Hail Maryi, ja dat maid cuvkehii mu earenoamáš vugiin luonddufágaoahpaheaddji ežžonan, maŋŋel jagi go lean geahččat mo olles luonddufágaoahpahus viggojuvvo rávvameahttumit billistuvvot ja das váldojit ruđat eret. Olbmot liikojit dán filbmii, mii sihkkarit šaddá lihkostupmin, muhto sii vašuhit mu ežžona barggu, billistit su prográmmaid ja hálidit ahte mii massit iežamet karriearaid. Mo lea vejolaš ahte dát buot lea duohta seammás.

Son vulggii čiežat iđđes oahpahit geavatlaš laboratoriabargguid, gos sii gieđahallat seallaid, ja gos eiseválddit leat stuorrudan luohkkásturvuda ja geahpedan oahpahanveahkiid. Son geavaha eanet áiggi studeanttaiguin lab-kallariin go oktage eará klássa olles kampusas. Son ásahii prográmma loahpahanstudeanttaide vai sii ožžot ruhtaduvvon bargguid laboratoriain, mii rahpá STEM-bálgáid sidjiide geat eai goasge eará láhkai livčče ožžon dán vejolašvuođa. Buot dán earenoamáš barggu ovddas son dál gohčoduvvo "DEI-bargun dieđas" mii sin mielas lea lágahis.

Muhto dieđusge, jáhkán ahte jos son livččii vilges almmái programmerejeaddji guhte čállá fanfic-teavsttaid luonddufágaoahpahusa birra.... son livččii oadjebas dilis.

@grimalkina seamma ruohttasat leat juo Hail Marys, duohta dál. Mun liikon Andy Weirii hui olu ja in jáhke ahte son oaivvildii dán, muhto oppa dát jurdda ahte "byrokratia ja ovttasbargu leat duođaid cáskkaldahkan áššiid ordnemii, ja de go áššit mannet badjelmeari mii oažžut fámolaš anti-byrokráhta guhte hilgu diplomatiija ja bágge juohkeovtta bargat prošeavtta, herggiid dahje dan maid oassálastit hálidit" čuozai munnje dego hui Amerihkálaš individualismma fápmofántasia, ja livččen jáhkkán ahte Amerihkálaš lea čállán dán jos in livčče diehtán.

@jcachada @grimalkina
Vai mielddiset, girjjis lea dát oassi mii ii lean filmmas.
---
“Lean utnolaš,” dajan Strattai. “Go mii álggahit Hail Mary. Maid don de barggat?”
“Mun?” son sárdnoi. “Ii mearkkaš maidege. Go Hail Mary álggahuvvo, mu fápmu nohka. Mun jáhkkihahttit šaddan diggái suhttan ráđđehusaid dihte fápmonuolvuma geažil. Sáhtán eallinagi giddagasas čohkkát.”
“Lean seamma giddagaslanjas du lahka,” sárdnoi Leclerc.
“Leatgo dán birra ollige fuolas?”
Son badjelgeahčai oalggi. “Mii buohkat fertet dahkat sakriifiissaid. Jos ferten leat máilmmi ráŋggáštus mii sihkkarastá min gádjuma, de dat lea mu sakriifiisa mii ferte dahkkot.”
---
Leago son buoret dahje hehkot jos son jáhkká ahte son sakriifisere iežas?
