@theynege As someone who was aware of dansup (bc of you and some other folks) but hadn't witnessed it happen in real time, this time I witnessed it in real time and it was a piece of work. Polished. Like he's a habitual offender.

@theynege he screenshotted her account and posted it with his "crazy mask lady" comments, when called out he IMMEDIATELY deleted the posts and started posting his bona fides as a "community builder" and all the folks he's worked with and and and wow, isn't he amazing no acknowledgement at all that he - community builder and dude with marginalized identities and all - targeted a disabled racialized woman online for harassment by doing it.
The sniper quality of it was something to behold. He was ready to tell everyone how great he was to cover over basically an attack he knew could bring harm.

@quietmarc @theynege that post was like an ableism hat trick

hypo_0:
@theynege Dehgon dakkár olmmoš gii diđii dansup birra (du ja muhtin earáid geažil) muhto giehta ii lean oaidnán dan dáhpáhuvvamin njuolggosáttas, de dán háve mun oidnen dan njuolggosáttas ja dat lei dakkár bargu. Čorgat. Deggo son livččii dábálaš rihkolaš.

@theynege son válddiigovvidii su profiila ja rissii dan iežas "crazy mask lady" -kommentáraiguin, ja go hástaluvvui de son SEAMMÁS sihkui postejumiid ja álggahii iežas ánsuid rámiid "servodatfápmuideaddjin" ja buot daid olbmuid geaiguin son lea bargan ja ja ja vooii, iigo son leat eahpedábálaš eai ge dás leat mangelgáhttasat dan birra ahte son - servodatfápmuideaddji ja dakkár olmmoš geas leat marginaliserejuvvon identitehtat ja buot - vástidii váttisvuođaiguin ja rasisttalaš nissonolbmo neahtas givssidemiin.
Dan snipereane lei dakkár mii gáibida fuomášumi. Son lei gárvvis muitalit buohkaide man eahpedábálaš son lei vai gokčá dakkár falleheami mii son diđii ahte sáhttá vahágahttit.

@quietmarc @theynege dat postejupmi lei dego ableismma golbmagiehta

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Sleinkan geahppes ruoná flauella, go áiggon vuosttaš geardde geahččalit Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap -skábmamálle. In dieđe maid jurddašit rávvagis geavahit gárvunvuođu, muhto dat várra gáibida juoidá mii dahká dan veahá garrasabbun ja assásabbun.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap -málle rávve čuollat gáruosiid vinjubeallái čuoldagii ("bias-čuollamin") vai dat gealggašii eanet birra, muhto de flauellaráiddut šaddet vinjut, muhto mun háliidivččen daid njuolgat.
Mii beassat oaidnit. Dát lea geahččalanbargu vai oahpásmuvvá mállii. Mun lihan liikon flauellii dan gođđosa dihte, muhto ruoná ii livčče mu vuosttaš válljen, ja dát tekstiila lea nu geahpas ahte berrešin lasihit gárvunvuođu dahje juoga mii mus gávdno vuorkkás.

Go dárkileappot geahčen, de mu tekstiila ii leat ge flauella, dat lea dušše velvehta, nu ahte sáhtán čuollat 45 gráda hálbái nugo Sachi rávve Newsboy Cap -málles, iige dat čájet fasttin.
#millinery

source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@JugglingWithEggs goitge mu ustitgaskavuođas njuovžžamátke-telefovnnat eai lean dábámettuat álgogeahčen 90-logu, muhto dat mákse *hui* olu jus riinggii lanjastelefovnnas (nu ahte jus orui ruovttus, de váhnemat eai hálidan ahte riinget), ja gitta 1995-1999 rádjái dat eai lean dorvvolaččat, juohkehaš geas lei radioskánner sáhtii guldalit daid (ja dábálaččat dagai ge).
Vaikko radioskánnerat ledje nuoraide liiggás divrasat, de máŋggain boarrásut olbmuin ledje dakkárat, ja gitta 90-logu loahpa rádjái sii ledje dábálaččat dakkár radioberošteaddjit geat ledje tory-gárpmehuvvamat ja dorjo bolesiid ja eará ásahusorganisašuvnnaid, nu ahte jus ságastalai juosat subversive-áššiid njuovžžamátke-telefovnnas, de lei dakkár várra ahte gárttai ilbmojuvvot..
Ironalaččat dilli jorgasii 90-logu loahpas go skánnerat šadde hálbbin, ja bolesiin ledje ain analogalaš radiot 😁

@JugglingWithEggs 1990-logu loahpas juohkehaččas lei njuovžžamátke-telefuvdna ja riingat ledje hálbbit (dábálaččat ledje olu nuvttá minuhtat) muhto SMS-dieđut eai lean luohtehahttit ja álggos dat eai oppa doaibman ge fierpmádagaid rastá - olbmot duođai háladedje guhtet guimmiineaset dainna!
Okta erohus lei ahte beassan fysalaš báikkiide ii lean nu garra dálá áigge go - vaikko lei ain CCTV ja báikkálaččat riŋgejedje bolesiidda go nuorat "orustalle", de ii lean doarvái olbmuid báikki alde iige fierpmádat-CCTV (duohta dorvofálta fertii geahččat bázahusaid báikkálaččat, ja gárdimiid eaiggádat eai dábálaččat hálidan máksit dán olbmuide eahkedis ja vahkkoloahpaid.
Ledje maid unnit bolesat barggus olggut guovlluin ihkku/vahkkoloahpaid - sii ledje buohkat biddjon gávpoga guovddážii)

@vfrmedia
Muhtán ahte SMS-dieđuid boahtimis sáhtii muhtumin váldit máŋga diimmu álgogeahčen 2000-logu - nu ahte ii álo lean nu buorre dakkaviđe ordnedallamiidda.
Márkanbáikkis orrun mearkkašii sihkarit ahte lei unnit cctv ja bolesat 90-logus. Muhtán erohusa go vulggii eahkedis Bournemouthii dahje Norwichii. Muhto nuoraid hávskásvuohta ii lean dakkár fasttes ášši go dál. Mu ovdalaš posts facilaš dovdamis lei guovllu birra gos lea leamaš lassáneapmi nuorain geat dasto beare orustallet.

@JugglingWithEggs 1990-logu loahpas juohkehaččas lei njuovžžamátke-telefuvdna ja riingat ledje hálbbit (dábálaččat ledje olu nuvttá minuhtat) muhto SMS-dieđut eai lean luohtehahttit ja álggos dat eai oppa doaibman ge fierpmádagaid rastá - olbmot duođai háladedje guhtet guimmiineaset dainna!
Okta erohus lei ahte beassan fysalaš báikkiide ii lean nu garra dálá áigge go - vaikko lei ain CCTV ja báikkálaččat riŋgejedje bolesiidda go nuorat "orustalle", de ii lean doarvái olbmuid báikki alde iige fierpmádat-CCTV (duohta dorvofálta fertii geahččat bázahusaid báikkálaččat, ja gárdimiid eaiggádat eai dábálaččat hálidan máksit dán olbmuide eahkedis ja vahkkoloahpaid.
Ledje maid unnit bolesat barggus olggut guovlluin ihkku/vahkkoloahpaid - sii ledje buohkat biddjon gávpoga guovddážii)

@vfrmedia
Muhtán ahte SMS-dieđuid boahtimis sáhtii muhtumin váldit máŋga diimmu álgogeahčen 2000-logu - nu ahte ii álo len nu buorre dakkaviđe ordnedallamiidda.
Márkanbáikkis orrun mearkkašii sihkarit ahte lei unnit cctv ja bolesat 90-logus. Muhtán erohusa go vulggii eahkedis Bournemouthii dahje Norwichii. Muhto nuoraid hávskásvuohta ii lean dakkár fasttes ášši go dál. Mu ovdalaš posts muođodovdamis lei guovllu birra gos lea leamaš lassáneapmi nuorain geat dasto beare orustallet.
hypo_2:
@JugglingWithEggs goitge mu ustitgaskavuođas mátketelefovnnat eai lean dábámettuat álgogeahčen 90-logu, muhto dat mákse *hui* olu jus riinggii lanjastelefovnnas (nu ahte jus orui ruovttus, de váhnemat eai hálidan ahte riinget), ja gitta 1995-1999 rádjái dat eai lean dorvvolaččat, juohkehaš geas lei radioskánner sáhtii guldalit daid (ja dábálaččat dagai ge).
Vaikko radioskánnerat ledje nuoraide liiggás divrasat, de máŋggain boarrásut olbmuin ledje dakkárat, ja gitta 90-logu loahpa rádjái sii ledje dábálaččat dakkár radioberošteaddjit geat ledje tory-gárpmehuvvamat ja dorjo bolesiid ja eará ásahusorganisašuvnnaid, nu ahte jus ságastalai juosat subversive-áššiid mátketelefovnnas, de lei dakkár várra ahte gárttai ilbmojuvvot..
Ironalaččat dilli jorgasii 90-logu loahpas go skánnerat šadde hálbbin, ja bolesiin ledje ain analogalaš radiot 😁

source_doc:
@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social nuuu, mii dalle merget duohta olbmo dahkan sisdoalu vai sis lea dataset mas lea unnit bahča-sisdoallu mainna hárjehallat?
In dieđe, sii galgale gierdat iežaset guolban bahča-sisdoalus maid leat ieža duddjon, dassážiigo sin latentavektorspábma gáržo ovtta čuokkisin.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Mu vuosttaš jurdda maiddái. Mun jávkkadihkon iežan persovnnalaš nehttasiiddu go in hálidan biebmat daid iešguđetge Torment Nexus -prošeavttaid. Duohta olbmo sisdoalu mergen dušše álkkásmahttá ođđa, mirkkohis ja bahčahis dáttá-čoakkáldagaid huksema.

source_doc:
Celtic hammer Dundee United on O'Neill's return

Normal service resumed at Celtic Park as champions Celtic secured a dominant 4-0 win over Dundee United and their first clean sheet since Martin O'Neill's previous game in charge.

Two first-half goals in five minutes from Yang Hyun-jun and Arne Engels sent Celtic on their way as O'Neill returned to the dugout in style following Wilfried Nancy's brief but disastrous reign.

Substitute Benjamin Nygren grabbed his 11th goal of the season and Daizen Maeda netted on the rebound to equal Celtic's two biggest wins of the league season so far. Both of them were in O'Neill's caretaker spell in charge, which resulted in seven wins from eight games.

Celtic sent for the 73-year-old on Monday after terminating Nancy's contract in the wake of six defeats - and 18 goals against - in eight matches.

The chaos, confusion and defensive fragility that marked Nancy's reign disappeared as the Hoops moved three points off the top of the table.

Nobody in the stadium would have been surprised to see O'Neill restore Celtic's long-standing 4-3-3 formation and the team picked up where they left off under O'Neill, as if they had awoken from a nightmare and got on with life as normal.

Centre-back Liam Scales was back to the consistent form he displayed before suffering in and out of a back three under the Frenchman.

Callum McGregor dictated play again and Celtic's wide players, Yang and Sebastian Tounekti, were given attacking licence after being handed wing-back roles by the former Columbus Crew head coach.

Celtic enjoyed 78 per cent possession, had 22 shots at goal and let United have just three. Their opponents averaged 12 shots during Nancy's tenure and United managed 17 themselves during their 2-1 win over the Hoops at Tannadice less than four weeks ago.

Celtic penned United in from the start, with Kieran Tierney instrumental in creating a series of first-half chances.

The left-back had a shot deflected wide, Yang and Scales threatened from headers and Maeda flicked a low cross of the bar, before the pressure paid off in the 27th minute.

Such was Celtic's dominance that Scales found himself in possession on the edge of the box and rolled a pass to Yang, who drilled home from 20 yards.

Maeda soon mis-kicked a volley before Engels produced a first-time finish from Tierney's pass.

It was not all plain sailing for Celtic in the first half. Mexican right-back Julian Araujo marked his first start with a yellow card for a dangerous challenge on Will Ferry, who was still hobbling when he took the resulting free-kick.

United also had chances and Dario Naamo looked unsure whether to head or volley Craig Sibbald's deep cross and did neither and Owen Stirton twice came close.

The striker was firstly foiled by a goal-saving block from Scales after being gifted possession by Auston Trusty and later shot just wide from 18 yards after the Celtic central defence backed off.

United brought on winger Amar Fatah for holding midfielder Pan Camara at half-time but Celtic were even more dominant in the second half.

Reo Hatate and Maeda missed good chances before Nygren shot high into the net from six yards in the 63rd minute.

Maeda had an easy finish six minutes later after Tounekti's shot was saved.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Celtic vuittii Dundee United stuorralasat O'Neilla máhccankámppas

Dábálaš dilli máhcai Celtic Parkii go dálá meštirat Celtic dálkkodastiid 4-0 vuoittu Dundee United vuostá, mii lei sin vuosttaš dakkár speallu dán áigodagas go eai dáržan ovttage deanu dan rájes go Martin O'Neill lei maŋŋaust eiseválddiin.

Guokte vuosttaš gurdgolaš ovttasbargo-spealu viđa minuhtas, maiguin Yang Hyun-jun ja Arne Engels hálidit Celtic ovdii, sáddejedje Celtic buorrin álgun go O'Neill máhcai stivrenbovttiide fiidna vugiin Wilfried Nancy oanehis ja lihkohis badjeáiggi maŋŋá.

Sajis-spealli Benjamin Nygren časkkiidii iežas dán áigodaga 11. deanu ja Daizen Maeda časkkiidii máhcahuvvon spilla unnit-guovdil dásset Celtic guokte stuorámus vuoittu dán áigodaga liiggis dán rádjái. Gidda eanet dain ledje O'Neilla sadjásašvirggi áigge, mii buvttii čieža vuoittu gávcci spealus.

Celtic rávkii 73-jahkásaš hárjánan hárjeheaddji mánnodaga maŋŋá go ledje loahpahan Nancy šiehtadusa, go son lei vuoiton guhtta spealu – ja oažžun 18 deanu iežas vuostá – gávcci spealus.

Sodju, seahka ja bealuštanváttisvuođat mat midjejuvvodedje Nancy áigge jávke go Hoops lagadii golmmain čuoggáin liigga njunnoša.

Ii oktage stadionis lean hirpmahuvvan go oinnii O'Neilla máhcaheamen Celtic boares ja oahpes 4-3-3 opmodaga, ja juovku jođgii dás, gosa lei báhcán O'Neilla áigge, dego sii livčče herggiidan niehkosrájes ja joatkán eallima dábálaččat.

Guovddášbealušteaddji Liam Scales lei fas dan dásis mii oidnui ovdal go son šattai čuollat deattu sisa ja olggos ranskalaš hárjeheaddji golmma bealušteaddji vuogádagas.

Callum McGregor stivrii fas spealu ja Celtic gilvobeale-speallit, Yang ja Sebastian Tounekti, oaččujedje friijavuođa fallehit maŋŋá go ledje ožžon bealuštan-gilvobeale rollaid Columbus Crew ovddeš oaivvehárjeheaddjis.

Celtic doalai spáppa 78 proseantta áiggis, sis ledje 22 fálaldaga deanu guvlui ja sii divtte United oažžut dušše golbma fálaldaga. Sin vuostálastiin ledje gaskamearálaččat 12 fálaldaga Nancy stivrenáigge, ja United nagadii ieš 17 fálaldaga go sii vuite Hoops 2-1 Tannadices vátna njeallje vahku áigi.

Celtic deaddilii United álggu rájes, mas Kieran Tierney lei deatalaš speallaođastusaid duddjojeaddji vuosttaš gurdgolas.

Gurut bealušteaddji fálaldat manai gilvobeallái, Yang ja Scales áito oivviiguin ja Maeda spáitilii vuollegis spáppa rásttilastii ovdal go deaddileapmi buvttii bohtosa 27. minuhtas.

Celtic lei nu nannosit deaddileamen ahte Scales gávnnai iežas spáppain deannorájis ja spáitilii spáppa Yangii, gii časkkiidii dan sisa 20 mehtera duogábealde.

Maeda eahpelihkostuvai volley-časkimiin ovdal go Engels rávkkai spáppa sisa dakkaviđe Tierney maŋisguovdil spealus.

Áššit eai lean Celtic vuosttaš gurdgolas álo álkit. Mexicolaš olgeš bealušteaddji Julian Araujo oaččui iežas vuosttaš álgo-spealus fiskes koartta fasttes falleheami geažil Will Ferry vuostá, gii velá rávkkai go spealai maŋŋá dán friijaspáppa.

Unitedis ledje maid fálaldagat ja Dario Naamo lei eahpesihkar galggai go son časkit oaivviin vai volleyin Craig Sibbalda čiekŋalis spáppa, iige dahkan goappáge, ja Owen Stirton lei guovtte geardde lagaba deanu.

Falleheaddji vuosttaš fálaldaga eastadii Scales, gii bealuštii deanu maŋŋá go Auston Trusty lei lean ložžet spáppa, ja maŋŋelaš son časkkiidii fárrolaga dušše veahá olggobeallái 18 mehteris go Celtic guovddášbealuštus manai maŋos.

United buvttii speallan Amar Fatah gurut gilvobeallái gaskaspealli Pan Camara sadjái gaskagurddus, muhto Celtic lei vel eanet dásset nubbi gurdgolas.

Reo Hatate ja Maeda manne lagaba buriid fálaldagaid ovdal go Nygren časkkiidii spáppa badjái deannui guđa mehteris 63. minuhtas.

Maedas lei álkes časkit deanu guhta minuhta maŋŋá go Tounekti fálaldat lei eastaduvvon.
hypo_1:
Celtic hárvui Dundee United O'Neilla máhccankámppas

Dábálaš dilli máhcai Celtic Parkii, go meštirjuovku Celtic nannii njuolga 4-0-vuoittu Dundee United vuostá, mii lei sin vuosttaš speallu almmá deannu haga dan rájes go Martin O'Neill maŋgimus lei stivrenbovttis.

Guokte vuosttaš gurdgolaš deanu viđa minuhtas, maiguin Yang Hyun-jun ja Arne Engels ožžo Celtic ovdánit, sáddejedje Celtic buorrin álgun, go O'Neill máhcai stivrenbovttiide fiidna vugiin Wilfried Nancy oanehis muhto lihkohis badjeáiggi maŋŋá.

Sajis-spealli Benjamin Nygren časkkiidii iežas dán áigodaga 11. deanu ja Daizen Maeda časkkiidii máhccanspálttas, mii dásset Celtic guokte stuorámus vuoittu dán áigodaga liiggis dán rádjái. Gidda eanet dain ledje O'Neilla sadjásašvirggi áigge, mii buvttii čieža vuoittu gávcci spealus.

Celtic rávkkai 73-jahkásaš hárjeheaddji mánnodaga maŋŋá go ledje loahpahan Nancy šiehtadusa guhta vuoittahallama – ja 18 deanu iežas vuostá – maŋis gávcci spealus.

Sodju, seahka ja bealuštanváttisvuođat, mat ledje Nancy áigge, jávke go Hoops lagadii golmmain čuoggáin liigga njunnoša.

Ii oktage stadionis lean hirpmahuvvan go oinnii O'Neilla máhcaheamen Celtic guhkesáigásaš 4-3-3-ortnega, ja juovku joatkkii dás, gosa lei báhcán O'Neilla áigge, dego sii livčče herggiidan niehkosrájes ja joatkán eallima dábálaččat.

Guovddášbealušteaddji Liam Scales lei fas dan dásis, mii oidnui ovdal go son šattai čuollat deattu sisa ja olggos ranskalaš hárjeheaddji golmma bealušteaddji vuogádagas.

Callum McGregor stivrii fas spealu, ja Celtic gilvobeale-speallit, Yang ja Sebastian Tounekti, oaččujedje friijavuođa fallehit maŋŋá go ledje ožžon bealuštan-gilvobeale rollaid Columbus Crew ovddeš oaivvehárjeheaddjis.

Celtic doalai spáppa 78 proseantta áiggis, sis ledje 22 fálaldaga deanu guvlui ja sii divtte United oažžut dušše golbma fálaldaga. Sin vuostálastiin ledje gaskamearálaččat 12 fálaldaga Nancy stivrenáigge, ja United nagadii ieš 17 fálaldaga go sii vuite Hoops 2-1 Tannadices vátna njeallje vahku áigi.

Celtic deaddilii United álggu rájes, mas Kieran Tierney lei deatalaš speallaođastusaid duddjojeaddji vuosttaš gurdgolas.

Gurut bealušteaddji fálaldat manai gilvobeallái, Yang ja Scales áito oivviiguin ja Maeda spáitilii vuollegis spáppa rásttilastii ovdal go deaddileapmi buvttii bohtosa 27. minuhtas.

Celtic lei nu nannosit deaddileamen, ahte Scales gávnnai iežas spáppain deannorájis ja spáitilii spáppa Yangii, gii časkkiidii dan sisa 20 mehtera duogábealde.

Maeda eahpelihkostuvai volley-časkimiin ovdal go Engels časkkiidii spáppa sisa dakkaviđe Tierney maŋisguovdil spealus.

Áššit eai lean Celtic vuosttaš gurdgolas álo álkit. Mexicolaš olgeš bealušteaddji Julian Araujo oaččui iežas vuosttaš álgo-spealus fiskes koartta fasttes falleheami geažil Will Ferry vuostá, gii velá rávkkai go spealai maŋŋá dán friijaspáppa.

Unitedis ledje maid fálaldagat, ja Dario Naamo lei eahpesihkar galggai go son časkit oaivviin vai volleyin Craig Sibbalda čiekŋalis spáppa, iige dahkan goappáge, ja Owen Stirton lei guovtte geardde lagaba deanu.

Falleheaddji vuosttaš fálaldaga eastadii Scales buori bealuštusain maŋŋá go Auston Trusty lei lean ložžet spáppa, ja maŋŋelaš son časkkiidii fárrolaga dušše veahá olggobeallái 18 mehteris go Celtic guovddášbealuštus manai maŋos.

United buvttii speallan Amar Fatah gurut gilvobeallái gaskaspealli Pan Camara sadjái gaskagurddus, muhto Celtic lei vel eanet dásset nubbi gurdgolas.

Reo Hatate ja Maeda manne lagaba buriid fálaldagaid ovdal go Nygren časkkiidii spáppa badjái deannui guđa mehteris 63. minuhtas.

Maedas lei álkes časkit deanu guhta minuhta maŋŋá go Tounekti fálaldat lei eastaduvvon.

Áššit eai lean Celtic vuosttaš gurdgolas álo álkit. Mexicolaš olgeš bealušteaddji Julian Araujo oaččui iežas vuosttaš álgo-spealus fiskes koartta fasttes falleheami geažil Will Ferry vuostá, gii velá rávkkai go spealai maŋŋá dán friijaspáppa.

Unitedis ledje maid fálaldagat, ja Dario Naamo lei eahpesihkar galggai go son časkit oaivviin vai volleyin Craig Sibbalda čiekŋalis spáppa, iige dahkan goappáge, ja Owen Stirton lei guovtte geardde lagaba moala.

Falleheaddji vuosttaš fálaldaga eastadii Scales buori bealuštusain maŋŋá go Auston Trusty lei lean ložžet spáppa, ja maŋŋelaš son časkkiidii fárrolaga dušše veahá olggobeallái 18 jardas go Celtic guovddášbealuštus manai maŋos.

United buvttii speallan Amar Fatah gurut gilvobeallái gaskaspealli Pan Camara sadjái gaskagurddus, muhto Celtic lei vel eanet dásset nubbi gurdgolas.

Reo Hatate ja Maeda manne lagaba buriid fálaldagaid ovdal go Nygren časkkiidii spáppa badjái moallai guđa jardas 63. minuhtas.

Maedas lei álkes časkit moala guhta minuhta maŋŋá go Tounekti fálaldat lei eastaduvvon.
hypo_6:
Celtic ráskii Dundee United go O'Neill máhcai

Dábálaš dilli máhcai Celtic Parkii, go meštirjuovku Celtic nannii nollabeallá-vuoittu ja vuittii njuolga 4–0 Dundee United vuostá. Dát lei sin vuosttaš speallu mii nogai nolláin dan rájes go Martin O’Neill maŋgimus lei stivrenbovttis.

Guokte vuosttaš gurdgolaš moala viđa minuhtas, maiguin Yang Hyun-jun ja Arne Engels ožžo Celtic ovdánit, sáddejedje Celtic buorrin álgun, go O’Neill máhcai hárjeheaddjibovttiide fiidna vugiin Wilfried Nancy oanehis muhto lihkohis badjeáiggi maŋis.

Sajis-spealli Benjamin Nygren časkkiidii iežas dán áigodaga 11. moala ja Daizen Maeda časkkiidii máhccanspálttas, mii dásset Celtic guokte stuorámus vuoittu dán áigodaga liiggis dán rádjái. Gidda eanet dain ledje O’Neilla gaskaboddosaš hárjeheaddjiáigge, mii buvttii čieža vuoittu gávcci spealus.

Celtic rávkkai 73-jahkásaš hárjeheaddji mánnodaga maŋŋá go ledje loahpahan Nancy šiehtadusa guhta vuoittahallama – ja 18 moala iežas vuostá – maŋis gávcci spealus.

Sodju, seahka ja bealuštanváttisvuođat, mat ledje Nancy áigge, jávke go Hoops lagadii golmmain čuoggáin liigga njunnoša.

Ii oktage stadionis lean hirpmahuvvan go oinnii O’Neilla máhcaheamen Celtic guhkesáigásaš 4-3-3-ortnega, ja juovku joatkkii dás, gosa lei báhcán O’Neilla áigge, dego sii livčče herggiidan niehkosrájes ja joatkán eallima dábálaččat.

Guovddášbealušteaddji Liam Scales lei fas dan dásis, mii oidnui ovdal go son šattai čuollat deattu sisa ja olggos ranskalaš hárjeheaddji golmma bealušteaddji vuogádagas.

Callum McGregor stivrii fas spealu, ja Celtic gilvobeale-speallit, Yang ja Sebastian Tounekti, oaččujedje friijavuođa fallehit maŋŋá go ledje ožžon bealuštan-gilvobeale rollaid Columbus Crew ovddeš oaivvehárjeheaddjis.

Celtic nautti 78 proseantta spábbadoallamis, sis ledje 22 fálaldaga moala guvlui ja sii divtte United oažžut dušše golbma fálaldaga. Sin vuostálastiin ledje gaskamearálaččat 12 fálaldaga Nancy stivrenáigge, ja United nagadii ieš 17 fálaldaga go sii vuite Hoops 2-1 Tannadices vátna njeallje vahku áigi.

Celtic deaddilii United álggu rájes, mas Kieran Tierney lei deatalaš speallaođastusaid duddjojeaddji vuosttaš gurdgolas.

Gurut bealušteaddji fálaldat manai gilvobeallái, Yang ja Scales áito oivviiguin ja Maeda spáitilii vuollegis spáppa rásttilastii ovdal go deaddileapmi buvttii bohtosa 27. minuhtas.

Celtic lei nu nannosit deaddileamen, ahte Scales gávnnai iežas spáppain moalarájis ja spáitilii spáppa Yangii, gii časkkiidii dan sisa 20 jarda duogábealde.

Maeda eahpelihkostuvai volley-časkimiin ovdal go Engels časkkiidii spáppa sisa dakkaviđe Tierney maŋisguovdil spealus.

Áššit eai lean Celtic vuosttaš gurdgolas álo álkit. Mexicolaš olgeš bealušteaddji Julian Araujo oaččui iežas vuosttaš álgo-spealus fiskes koartta fasttes falleheami geažil Will Ferry vuostá, gii velá rávkkai go spealai maŋŋá dán friijaspáppa.

Unitedis ledje maid fálaldagat, ja Dario Naamo lei eahpesihkar galggai go son časkit oaivviin vai volleyin Craig Sibbalda čiekŋalis spáppa, iige dahkan goappáge, ja Owen Stirton lei guovtte geardde lagaba moala.

Falleheaddji vuosttaš fálaldaga eastadii Scales buori bealuštusain maŋŋá go Auston Trusty lei lean ložžet spáppa, ja maŋŋelaš son časkkiidii fárrolaga dušše veahá olggobeallái 18 jardas go Celtic guovddášbealuštus manai maŋos.

United buvttii speallan Amar Fatah gurut gilvobeallái gaskaspealli Pan Camara sadjái gaskagurddus, muhto Celtic lei vel eanet dásset nubbi gurdgolas.

Reo Hatate ja Maeda manne lagaba buriid fálaldagaid ovdal go Nygren časkkiidii spáppa badjái moallai guđa jardas 63. minuhtas.

Maedas lei álkes časkit moala guhta minuhta maŋŋá go Tounekti fálaldat lei eastaduvvon.

source_doc:
Robin Roefs" penalty saves secures Sunderland's spot in FA Cup fourth round

Get the Adam Clery Football Column. A newsletter that unpacks the absurdities and oddities of the beautiful game

The ACFC newsletter: unpacking football's absurdities

Unpack football's oddities with the ACFC newsletter

Robin Roefs was Sunderland's hero as Everton's FA Cup hopes came to a premature end once again after three woeful penalties in a shootout saw the Black Cats reach round four.

David Moyes" threadbare squad looked like exiting in normal time until James Garner's 89th-minute spot-kick cancelled out Enzo Le Fee's brilliant first-half strike.

But extra time was the last thing the hosts, down to just 12 senior players, needed and when the shootout came around Garner, Thierno Barry and Beto all saw their efforts saved by Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka and Luke O'Nien confidently scored their first three attempts to help Sunderland into the fourth round for only the second time in 11 seasons.

It was a hammer blow to Everton, who were dragged back into the game by Adam Aznou, a £7.8million signing from Valladolid in the summer who had not had a sniff of first-team action.

The teenager's only senior football was two appearances in the EFL Trophy back in September and October and his 86th-minute introduction for Merlin Rohl was only because Moyes had little to no option.

But the Spanish-born Moroccan showed more drive in the four minutes of regulation time than many of his battle-weary team-mates had in the preceding 86 - particularly fellow 19-year-old and summer arrival Tyler Dibling, who cost five times as much.

Within three minutes he won an admittedly soft penalty after a shoulder-to-shoulder challenge by Trai Hume allowing Garner to equalise.

Replays of the foul on the big screens at full-time enraged Xhaka, who hurled his water bottle into the turf and raged at the perceived injustice to anyone in earshot, but the Black Cats" captain was soon celebrating.

It is rare for Sunderland, promoted from the Championship last season, to be favourites in any game but the fact Regis Le Bris was able to make five changes and still have the likes of Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete and Wilson Isidor in reserve swung the odds in their favour.

Injuries, the Africa Cup of Nations and suspensions for Michael Keane and Jack Grealish were compounded by Tim Iroegbunam's hamstring problem which took the absences to nine.

Barry, the one senior player he left out, accounted for 23 of the 27 first-team appearances among the substitutes with five of six academy players not having previously featured at all.

After Harrison Armstrong sliced wide their only first chance of the first half, Sunderland took control and should have been comfortably ahead by the interval.

Their first shot resulted in the opener - and what a goal.

Everton failed to deal with a long throw and Eliezer Mayenda teed up Le Fee to send a cushioned right-footed volley curling past Jordan Pickford.

Moyes had a face like thunder and his demeanour was not improved as Pickford clawed away a Nordi Mukiele overhead kick and tipped away, at full-stretch, Romaine Mundle's strike from distance.

Surprisingly, the Everton boss did not make the only change available to him and sacrifice one of his five midfielders for Barry at the start of the second half, but they did not come to life until Mayenda rolled an angled shot just wide with less than half an hour remaining.

Beto's appeal for a penalty for a shirt pull by Hume was waved away but referee John Brooks obliged when Aznou went down and Garner equalised.

Unfortunately for Everton their subsequent penalties were not as confident, with Barry and Beto's stuttering run-ups far from convincing, as Roefs saved all three.

hypo_0:
Robin Roefsa ruitto-caggiid eastataddamat sihkarastedje Sunderlandii saji FA-cupa njealját vuorrui

Váldde Adam Clery spábbačiekčan-kolumna. Diehtočálus mii čilge dán čappa spealu absurditehtaid ja ártatvuođaid

ACFC-diehtočálus: čilge spábbačiekčama absurditehtaid

Čilge spábbačiekčama ártatvuođaid ACFC-diehtočállagiin

Robin Roefs lei Sunderlandi sáŋgár, go Evertona FA-cup-doaivva nogai ovdalaš áiggi fas oktii maŋŋel golbma unna ruitto-cahkkema ruittočiekčamis, man láhka Black Cats bođii njealját vuorrui.

David Moyesa hárve cohkkejuvvon joukko orui gollame dábálaš áiggis, dassážiigo James Garnera 89. minuhta ruittočiekčan dovdameahttun ruittočiekčama dásset Enzo Le Fee ealligeahče vuosttaš-beali čiekčama.

Muhto liigeáigi lei maŋimuš ášši maid ruokto-juovku, mas ledje dušše 12 senior-speallit, dárbbašii, ja go ruittočiekčan álggii, de Roefs eastadii sihke Garnera, Thierno Barry ja Beto viggamušaid.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka ja Luke O'Nien čiegejedje iežaset golbma vuosttaš viggamuša njuolga ja iehpatvuođahisvuođain, mii veahkehii Sunderlandi njealját vuorrui dušše nuppi geardde 11 fágavuorus.

Dát lei lossa doarrun Evertonii, geat buktojuvvojedje fas speallamii Adam Aznou bokte, guhte lei £7.8 miljovnna hovden Valladolidis geasset, ja geas ii lean leamaš oktage áigi vuosttašjoavkku spealuin.

Nuorabučča áidna senior-spábbačiekčan ledje guokte spealu EFL Trophys čakčamánus ja golggotmánus, ja su 86. minuhta fárren Merlin Rohl sadjái lei dušše dan dihte go Moyesis ii lean eará molssaeaktu.

Muhto Spánias riegádan Marokkolaš čájehii eanet áŋgirvuođa njealji minuhtas dábálaš áiggis go máŋgasa su dálvevuođas váiban searve-speallit ledje čájehan ovdal 86 minuhtas - erenoamážit nuppi 19-jahkásaš ja geasset boahtán Tyler Dibling, guhte mávssii vihtta geardde eanet.

Golmma minuhta siste son ruittoi, dábálaš, njuovžilis ruitto-mearri maŋŋelgo Trai Hume goalostii olggi-olggi vuostá, mii attii Garnerii vejolašvuođa dásset.

Feaila-spealuid čájeheapmi stuorra šearpmain dievas áiggis surolašvuhtii dagai Xhaka suhttun, guhte bálkestii iežas čáhce-bohtala nannosii ja suhtai dan boasttuvuođa vuostá buohkaide geat gulle, muhto Black Cats kapteina ávvudii fargga.

Sunderland, mii badjánii Championshipas mannan badjin, lea hárve favovrittan makkárge spealus, muhto dat ahte Regis Le Bris sáhtii rievdadit vihtta spealli ja dasto vel bisuhit nugo Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete ja Wilson Isidor vuorkkás, jugai vuoitto-vejolašvuođaid sin beallái.

Vahágat, Afrihká-cup ja Michael Keanea ja Jack Grealisha bálká-hehttehusat gárte vel lossadin Tim Iroegbunama njoammudeami maŋŋel, mii bijai vátnumiid logu ovccái.

Barry, áidna senior-spealli maid son guđii olggobeallái, lei 23 dan 27 vuosttašjoavkku spealuin molssaspealliid gaskkas, gos vihtta dan guđa akademia-speallis eai lean ovdal searvan olláge.

Maŋŋelgo Harrison Armstrong bálkestii iežaset vuosttaš vejolašvuođa vuosttaš bealis, Sunderland válddii badjelasas stivrema ja sin livččii galgan leat álkit ovddabealde ovdal gaskkaáiggi.

Sin vuosttaš bálkesteapmi bođii vuosttaš čiekčamii - ja makkár čiekčan dat lei.

Everton ii bastán dustet guhkes bálkesteami ja Eliezer Mayenda bálkestii Le Feei, guhte bálkestii njuolga olgeš-juolggi volley Jordan Pickforda maŋis.

Moyesis lei dálki muođuin ja su láhtten ii buorránan go Pickford dustii Nordi Mukiele gállis-čiekčama ja bálkestii guhkás, Romaine Mundle gáiddus-čiekčama.

Heahkastuvvame, Everton-hoavda ii dahkan áidna vejolaš rievdadusa mii sus lei ja ii ruitto-bálkestii ovtta su viđa gaska-speallit Barry ovdii nuppi beali álggus, muhto sii eai eallán dassážiigo Mayenda čuovvui bealle-čiekčama meattá go ledje váile bealli diibmu báhcán.

Beto ohcamuš ruitto-čiekčamii Hume bálkesteami dihte ii vuollánuvvon, muhto duopmar John Brooks miehtái go Aznou gahčai ja Garner dásset.

Váidalahtti Evertonii sin maŋit ruitto-čiekčamat eai lean nu iehpatvuođahis, go Barry ja Beto veahkaválddálaš viggamušat eai lean olláge nannosat, go Roefs eastadii buot golbma.
hypo_1:
Robin Roefsa ruittočiekčaneastadeamit sihkkarastet Sunderlandii saji FA-cupa njealját vuorrui

Diŋgo Adam Clery spábbačiekčankolumna. Diehtočálus mii guorahallá dán čappa spealu absurditehtaid ja ártatvuođaid

ACFC-diehtočálus: gieđahallá spábbačiekčama absurditehtaid

Guorahala spábbačiekčama ártatvuođaid ACFC-diehtočállagiin

Robin Roefs lei Sunderlandi sáŋgár, go Evertona FA-cup-doaivvut nogasmuvve fas oktii maŋŋel golbma unna ruittočiekčama ruittočiekčangilvvus, man bokte Black Cats bođii njealját vuorrui.

David Moyesa hárvves cohkkejuvvon juovku orui gollame dábálaš áiggis, dassážiigo James Garnera 89. minuhta ruittočiekčan dásset Enzo Le Fee ealligeahče vuosttašbeale čiekčama.

Muhto liigeáigi lei maŋimuš ášši maid ruoktojuovku, mas ledje dušše 12 senior-spealli, dárbbašii, ja go ruittočiekčangilvu álggii, de Roefs eastadii sihke Garnera, Thierno Barry ja Beto viggamušaid.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka ja Luke O'Nien čiegejedje iežaset golbma vuosttaš viggamuša njuolga ja iehpatvuođahisvuođain, mii veahkehii Sunderlandi njealját vuorrui dušše nuppi geardde 11 fágavuorus.

Dát lei lossa doarrun Evertonii, geat buktojuvvojedje fas speallamii Adam Aznou bokte, guhte lei £7.8 miljovnna hovden Valladolidis geasset, ja geas ii lean leamaš oktage áigi vuosttašjoavkku spealuin.

Nuorabučča áidna senior-spábbačiekčan ledje guokte spealu EFL Trophys čakčamánus ja golggotmánus, ja su 86. minuhta fárren Merlin Rohl sadjái lei dušše dan dihte go Moyesis ii lean eará molssaeaktu.

Muhto Spánias riegádan Marokkolaš čájehii eanet áŋgirvuođa njealji minuhtas dábálaš áiggis go máŋgasat su dálvevuođas váiban searvespealliin ledje čájehan ovdal 86 minuhtas - erenoamážit nuppi 19-jahkásaš ja geasset boahtán Tyler Dibling, guhte mávssii vihtta geardde eanet.

Golmma minuhta siste son ruittoi, dábálaš, njuovžilis ruitto-mearri maŋŋelgo Trai Hume goalostii olggi-olggi vuostá, mii attii Garnerii vejolašvuođa dásset.

Feaila-spealuid čájeheapmi stuorra šearpmain dievas áiggis surolašvuhtii dagai Xhaka suhttun, guhte bálkestii iežas čáhcebohtala nannosii ja suhtai dan boasttuvuođa vuostá buohkaide geat gulle, muhto Black Cats kapteina ávvudii fargga.

Sunderland, mii badjánii Championshipas mannan badjin, lea hárve favovrittan makkárge spealus, muhto dat ahte Regis Le Bris sáhtii rievdadit vihtta spealli ja dasto vel bisuhit nugo Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete ja Wilson Isidor vuorkkás, jugai vuoitto-vejolašvuođaid sin beallái.

Vahágat, Afrihká-cup ja Michael Keanea ja Jack Grealisha bálká-hehttehusat gárte vel lossadin Tim Iroegbunama njoammudeami maŋŋel, mii bijai vátnumiid logu ovccái.

Barry, áidna senior-spealli maid son guđii olggobeallái, lei 23 dan 27 vuosttašjoavkku spealuin molssaspealliid gaskkas, gos vihtta dan guđa akademia-speallis eai lean ovdal searvan olláge.

Maŋŋelgo Harrison Armstrong bálkestii iežaset vuosttaš vejolašvuođa vuosttaš bealis, Sunderland válddii badjelasas stivrema ja sin livččii galgan leat álkit ovddabealde ovdal gaskkaáiggi.

Sin vuosttaš bálkesteapmi bođii vuosttaš čiekčamii - ja makkár goal dat lei.

Everton ii bastán dustet guhkes bálkesteami ja Eliezer Mayenda bálkestii Le Feei, guhte bálkestii njuolga olgešjuolggi volley Jordan Pickforda maŋis.

Moyesis lei dálki muođuin ja su láhtten ii buorránan go Pickford dustii Nordi Mukiele gállis-čiekčama ja bálkestii guhkás, Romaine Mundle gáiddus-čiekčama.

Heahkastuvvame, Everton-hoavda ii dahkan áidna vejolaš rievdadusa mii sus lei ja ii ruitto-bálkestii ovtta su viđa gaskaspeallit Barry ovdii nuppi beali álggus, muhto sii eai eallán dassážiigo Mayenda čuovvui bealle-čiekčama meattá go ledje váile bealle diibmu báhcán.

Beto ohcamuš ruitto-čiekčamii Hume bálkesteami dihte ii vuollánuvvon, muhto duopmar John Brooks miehtái go Aznou gahčai ja Garner dásset.

Váidalahtti Evertonii sin maŋit ruittočiekčamat eai lean nu iehpatvuođahis, go Barry ja Beto veahkaválddálaš viggamušat eai lean olláge nannosat, go Roefs eastadii buot golbma.

Golmma minuhta siste son ruittoi, dábálaš, njuovžilis ruitto-mearri maŋŋelgo Trai Hume goalostii olggi-olggi vuostá, mii attii Garnerii vejolašvuođa dásset.

Feaila-spealuid čájeheapmi stuorra šearpmain dievas áiggis surolašvuhtii dagai Xhaka suhttun, guhte bálkestii iežas čáhcebohtala nannosii ja suhtai dan boasttuvuođa vuostá buohkaide geat gulle, muhto Black Cats kapteina ávvudii fargga.

Sunderland, mii badjánii Championshipas mannan badjin, lea hárve favovrittan makkárge spealus, muhto dat ahte Regis Le Bris sáhtii rievdadit vihtta spealli ja dasto vel bisuhit nugo Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete ja Wilson Isidor vuorkkás, jugai vuoitto-vejolašvuođaid sin beallái.

Vahágat, Afrihká-cup ja Michael Keanea ja Jack Grealisha bálká-hehttehusat gárte vel lossadin Tim Iroegbunama njoammudeami maŋŋel, mii bijai vátnumiid logu ovccái.

Barry, áidna senior-spealli maid son guđii olggobeallái, lei 23 dan 27 vuosttašjoavkku spealuin molssaspealliid gaskkas, gos vihtta dan guđa akademia-speallis eai lean ovdal searvan olláge.

Maŋŋelgo Harrison Armstrong bálkestii iežaset vuosttaš vejolašvuođa vuosttaš bealis, Sunderland válddii badjelasas stivrema ja sin livččii galgan leat álkit ovddabealde ovdal gaskkaáiggi.

Sin vuosttaš bálkesteapmi bođii vuosttaš čiekčamii - ja makkár goal dat lei.

Everton ii bastán dustet guhkes bálkesteami ja Eliezer Mayenda bálkestii Le Feei, guhte bálkestii njuolga olgešjuolggi volley Jordan Pickforda maŋis.

Moyesis lei dálki muođuin ja su láhtten ii buorránan go Pickford dustii Nordi Mukiele gállis-čiekčama ja bálkestii guhkás, Romaine Mundle gáiddus-čiekčama.

Heahkastuvvame, Everton-hoavda ii dahkan áidna vejolaš rievdadusa mii sus lei ja ii ruitto-bálkestii ovtta su viđa gaskaspeallit Barry ovdii nuppi beali álggus, muhto sii eai eallán dassážiigo Mayenda čuovvui bealle-čiekčama meattá go ledje váile bealle diibmu báhcán.

Beto ohcamuš ruitto-čiekčamii Hume bálkesteami dihte ii vuollánuvvon, muhto duopmar John Brooks miehtái go Aznou gahčai ja Garner dásset.

Váidalahtti Evertonii sin maŋit ruittočiekčamat eai lean nu iehpatvuođahis, go Barry ja Beto veahkaválddálaš viggamušat eai lean olláge nannosat, go Roefs eastadii buot golbma.

source_doc:
Arthur Okonkwo's penalty shootout heroics causes FA Cup shock as Wrexham beat Nottingham Forest

Wrexham won an FA Cup third-round thriller in front of Hollywood owner Ryan Reynolds as Nottingham Forest were dumped out of the competition on penalties after a 3-3 draw.

Arthur Okonkwo was the Wrexham hero with stops from Igor Jesus and Omari Hutchinson giving them a 4-3 victory on spot-kicks after Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason and Jay Rodriguez had converted from the spot.

First-half goals from Liberato Cacace and Oliver Rathbone gave Wrexham early control and had Reynolds trading high fives and hugs from his vantage point in the main stand.

Jesus cut the deficit before Dominic Hyam's diving header restored Wrexham's two-goal advantage with 16 minutes remaining.

Forest looked dead and buried but substitute Callum Hudson-Odoi produced two outstanding finishes, the equaliser coming in the 89th minute.

Wrexham have won three successive promotions to go from non-league to the Championship, but this was the first time since being taken over by Reynolds and fellow actor Rob Mac nearly five years ago they had met Premier League opposition.

Forest made eight changes after beating West Ham on Tuesday, with goalkeeper Matz Sels, Jesus and Hutchinson remaining and Wales international Neco Williams on a stacked bench at his local club.

Callum Hudson-Odoi came off the bench and scored twice to force the match to penalties (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore was not risked after injury as Wrexham sought to extend a four-game winning streak that had taken them a point from the Championship play-off places.

Forest started on the front front with Jesus shooting over and Douglas Luiz found the net after 17 minutes.

Referee Paul Tierney initially awarded the goal, but then ruled it out after deciding Luiz had controlled the ball with his arm before volleying home.

Wrexham had been tidy in possession without a cutting edge but that was to change in the final 10 minutes of the first half.

Ollie Rathbone doubled Wrexham's lead after Liberato Cacace's opener (REUTERS)

Sam Smith dragged wide before Cacace took advantage after 37 minutes to drive home his maiden Wrexham goal from 20 yards aided by the faintest of deflections off Morato's heel.

Wrexham smiles were even wider three minutes later as Rathbone broke through Morato's challenge to fire in his third goal in four games.

It should have been three - and possibly contest over - when Smith scampered through the Forest half unchecked but failed to beat Sels" outstretched leg.

Forest boss Sean Dyche made a triple substitution at half-time with Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White and Nicolas Dominguez sent on to salvage the situation.

Okonkwo saved the decisive penalty to deny Omari Hutchinson in the shootout (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

The visitors were instantly more fluid as Okonkwo tipped over Luiz's free-kick and kept out Nicolo Savona's strike.

Sels saved well from Broadhead but Forest were in the ascendancy and struck when Savona set up the leaping Jesus for a header that hit the post and just about crossed the line.

The drama rose as Hyam headed in a superb George Dobson free-kick and Hudson-Odoi swept home 60 seconds later to set up a grandstand finish.

Hudson-Odoi took the tie into extra time in fantastic fashion, taking a touch on his chest and lofting a perfect volley over Okonkwo, but Wrexham were not to be denied their first top-flight FA Cup scalp for 26 years.

Sean Dyche made eight changes to the Forest side and called on his first choice players but couldn't get over the line (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Elsewhere in the FA Cup, Oxford United advanced to the fourth round with a 4-3 penalty shootout win over MK Dons and Port Vale defeated Fleetwood 1-0.

Wigan Athletic also progressed after a superb display at Deepdale saw the League One side beat Championship play-off chasers Preston North End 1-0 as well.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Arthur Okonkwo spárttoččenas-suodjalusat dagahit FA-cup-almmustusheahkašuvvama go Wrexham vuittii Nottingham Foresta

Wrexham vuittii hirbmat gelbbolaš FA-cup goalmmát gierdda spealu Hollywood-eaiggát Ryan Reynoldsa ovddas go Nottingham Forest gárttai eret gilvvus spárttoččemiid maŋŋel 3-3-dássaspealu maŋŋel.

Arthur Okonkwo lei Wrexhama sáŋgar go son bissehii Igor Jesusa ja Omari Hutchinsona spárttuid ja nu nubbástuhtii sidjiide 4-3-vuoittu spárttoččemiin maŋŋel go Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason ja Jay Rodriguez ledje speallan spárttu sisa.

Vuosttaš lađi málat Liberato Cacaceas ja Oliver Rathboneyis adde Wrexhama álgomuttu stivrejumi ja dagadedje ahte Reynolds sosiáliserii ja fálai "high five" ja fáhtiid iežas buori sajis váldostatuvnnas.

Jesus unnidii erohusa ovdal go Dominic Hyama njuikejeaddji oaivedorju málai Wrexhama guovttemálo-ovdamuni go 16 minuhta ledje báhcán.

Forest orrui leat jábman ja hávdáduvvon, muhto sadjásaš spálli Callum Hudson-Odoi dagahii guokte earenoamáš málaloahpaheami, main dássehusmálla bođii 89. minuhtas.

Wrexham lea vuoitán golbma maŋŋálas loktenortnega non-league-gilvvus Championship-dássái, muhto dát lei vuosttaš gearddi dan maŋŋel go Reynolds ja su neavttárustibi Rob Mac válde badjelasaset joavkku lagabui vihtta jagi áigi, go sii deaivvadedje Premier League-vuostálasttiiguin.

Forest dagahii gávcci rievdadusa maŋŋel go sii ledje vuoitán West Hama maŋŋebárgga, gos uksa-vahtto Matz Sels, Jesus ja Hutchinson bázii báhcán ja Walesa riikkajoavkko-spálli Neco Williams lei dievva beavddis iežas báikkálaš searvvis.

Callum Hudson-Odoi bođii sadjásažžan ja skorađii guktii ja bággii dasto spealu spárttoččemiidda (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore ii biddjon vára vuollai go son lei ráfáiduhttojuvvon maŋŋel go lei rasiiduvvan, go Wrexham geahččalii viiddidit njealje-spealu vuoito-ráiddu mii lei doalvun sin ovtta čuoggá lagabui Championshipa play-off-sajiide.

Forest álggahii garrasit go Jesus bálkestii badjel ja Douglas Luiz gávnnai mállo-neahta 17 minuhta maŋŋel.

Álggos duopmar Paul Tierney mieđhii málla-vuoittu, muhto dasto gielddi dan go gávnnahii ahte Luiz lei stivren spáppa gieđainis ovdal go faskkii dan sisa.

Wrexham lei leamaš čorgat spáppa badjelis muhto dasto váillui badjelmearálaš ávki, muhto dat rievddai vuosttaš lađi maŋimuš 10 minuhtas.

Ollie Rathbone duppalastti Wrexhama jođihusa maŋŋel Liberato Cacacea álgomálla (REUTERS)

Sam Smith geasii spáppa viidát ovdal go Cacace geavahii ávkki 37 minuhta maŋŋel go faskkii iežas vuosttaš Wrexham-málla 20 mehtera duohken vehkiin veháža maŋŋel Morato juolggi duohken.

Wrexham-modjit ledje vel eanet viidát golbma minuhta maŋŋel go Rathbone rikki Morato hástalusa ja bálkestii iežas goalmmát mála njealje spealus.

Dat galggai leat golbma - ja soaitá vel gilvu loahpahuvvon - go Smith faskkii jođánit Foresta beallái almmá goasii oktage easttaleami muhto ii nagadan vuoitit Selsa guhkiduvvon juolggi.

Forest-hoavda Sean Dyche dagahii golmma rievdadusa lađđa-gaskkas go Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White ja Nicolas Dominguez sáddejuvvojit gidtet dili.

Okonkwo gájui mearrideaddji spárttu go son bissehii Omari Hutchinsona spárttoččemiin (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Galledeaddjit ledje dakkaviđe eanet njuovžilat go Okonkwo bálkestii badjel Luiza nuvttáspárttu ja doalai eret Nicolo Savona faskkideami.

Sels gájui bures Broadheada spárttu muhto Forest lei badjánis ja časkkii go Savona ordni njuikejeaddji Jesusii oaive-spárttuin mii časkii stággui ja nu dasto badjel mállo-sárgá.

Dramatihka lassánii go Hyam oaivvásti eallálaččat George Dobsona fiidna nuvttáspárttu sisa ja Hudson-Odoi časkkii sisa 60 sekundda maŋŋel ja dagahii fámolaš loahpaheami.

Hudson-Odoi doalvun gaskaspealu lassi-áigái earenoamáš vugiin, válddedettiin spáppa raddái ja faskkii earenoamáš buori spárttu Okonkwo badjel, muhto Wrexham ii bággejuvvon iežaset vuosttaš top-flight FA-cup vuoittus 26 jahkái.

Sean Dyche dagahii gávcci rievdadusa Forest-joavkkus ja gohčui iežas vuosttašvuođu-spálliid muhto ii nagadan beassat badjel mállo-sárgá (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Eará sajis FA-cupas, Oxford United manai viidáseappot njealját gierdui 4-3 spárttoččemiid vuoittuin MK Donsa badjel ja Port Vale vuittii Fleetwooda 1-0.

Wigan Athletic maid manai viidáseappot maŋŋel earenoamáš buori spealu Deepdaleis gos League One -joavku vuittii Championshipa play-off-hástaleaddji Preston North Enda maid 1-0.
hypo_1:
Arthur Okonkwo spáppagastven-gilvvohallama gájun dagaha FA Cup-almmustusheahkašuvvama go Wrexham vuittii Nottingham Foresta

Wrexham vuittii hirbmat gelbbolaš FA Cup goalmmát gierdda spealu Hollywood-eaiggáda Ryan Reynoldsa čalmmiid ovddas go Nottingham Forest gárttai eret gilvvus spáppagastvimiiguin 3-3-dássaspealu maŋŋel.

Jesus unnidii erohusa ovdal go Dominic Hyama njuikejeaddji oaivečaskku buvttii Wrexhama guovttemállo-jođihusa ruovttoluotta go 16 minuhta ledje báhcán speallat.

Sam Smith geasii spáppa viidát ovdal go Cacace geavahii ávkki 37 minuhta maŋŋel ja faskkii iežas vuosttaš Wrexham-mála 20 mehtera duohken vehkiin veháža maŋŋel Morato juolggi duohken.

Wrexham-modjit ledje vel eanet viidát golbma minuhta maŋŋel go Rathbone rikki Morato hástalusa ja bálkestii iežas goalmmát mála njealje spealus.

Dat galggai leat golbma - ja soaitá vel gilvu loahpahuvvon - go Smith faskkii jođánit Foresta beallái almmá goasii oktage easttaleami muhto ii nagadan vuoitit Selsa guhkiduvvon juolggi.

Forest-hoavda Sean Dyche dagahii golmma rievdadusa lađđagaskkas go Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White ja Nicolas Dominguez sáddejuvvojedje gidtet dili.

Okonkwo gájui mearrideaddji spáppa go son bissehii Omari Hutchinsona spáppagastvimiin (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Galledeaddjit ledje dakkaviđe eanet njuovžilat go Okonkwo bálkestii badjel Luiza nuvttáspárttu ja doalai eret Nicolo Savona faskkideami.

Sels gájui bures Broadheada spárttu muhto Forest lei badjánis ja časkkii go Savona ordni njuikejeaddji Jesusii oaivespárttuin mii časkkii stággui ja nu dasto badjel mállo-sárgá.

Dramatihka lassánii go Hyam oaivvásti eallálaččat George Dobsona fiidna nuvttáspárttu sisa ja Hudson-Odoi časkkii sisa 60 sekundda maŋŋel ja dagahii fámolaš loahpaheami.

Hudson-Odoi doalvun gaskaspealu lassiáigái earenoamáš vuohkái, válddedettiinis spáppa raddái ja faskkiidis earenoamáš buori spárttu Okonkwo badjel, muhto Wrexham ii bággejuvvon iežaset vuosttaš top-flight FA Cup vuoittus 26 jahkái.

Sean Dyche dagahii gávcci rievdadusa Forest-joavkkus ja gohčui iežas vuosttašvuođu-spálliid muhto ii nagadan beassat badjel mállo-sárgá (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Eará sajis FA Cupas, Oxford United manai viidáseappot njealját gierdui 4–3 spáppagastvingilvvu vuoittuin MK Donsa badjel ja Port Vale vuittii Fleetwooda 1–0.

Wigan Athletic maid manai viidáseappot maŋŋel earenoamáš buori spealu Deepdaleis gos League One -joavku vuittii Championshipa play-off-hástaleaddji Preston North Enda maid 1–0.
hypo_5:
Arthur Okonkwo spáppagastven-gilvvohallama gájun dagaha FA Cup-almmustusheahkašuvvama go Wrexham vuittii Nottingham Foresta

Wrexham vuittii hirbmat gelbbolaš FA Cup goalmmát gierdda spealu Hollywood-eaiggáda Ryan Reynoldsa čalmmiid ovddas go Nottingham Forest gárttai eret gilvvus spáppagastvimiiguin 3–3-dássaspealu maŋŋel.

Arthur Okonkwo lei Wrexhama sáŋgar. Son bissehii Igor Jesusa ja Omari Hutchinsona spáppaid ja dasto nannii 4–3-vuoittu spáppagastvimiiguin maŋŋel go Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason ja Jay Rodriguez ledje skoren iežaset gastimiid.

Vuosttaš lađi málat, maid Liberato Cacace ja Oliver Rathbone skorejeigga, adde Wrexhamii jođihanposišuvnna álggus, ja Reynolds modjui, fálai "high five" -vuollánemiid ja fáhtestalai váldotribynas.

Jesus unnidii erohusa ovdal go Dominic Hyama njuikejeaddji oaivečaskku buvttii Wrexhama guovttemállo-jođihusa ruovttoluotta go 16 minuhta ledje báhcán speallat.

Forest orrui leat juo gárvves, muhto sadjásaš spálli Callum Hudson-Odoi skorii guokte earenoamáš mála, main dássehusmálla bođii 89. minuhtas.

Wrexham lea vuoitán golbma maŋŋálas loktenortnega non-league-gilvvus gitta Championship-dássái, muhto dát lei vuosttaš gearddi dan maŋŋel go Reynolds ja su neavttárustibi Rob McElhenney válde badjelasaset joavkku lagabui vihtta jagi áigi, go sii deaivvadedje Premier League-joavkkuin.

Forest dagahii gávcci rievdadusa maŋŋel go ledje vuoitán West Hama maŋŋebárgga. Uksavahtto Matz Sels, Jesus ja Hutchinson bázze dán speallái, ja Walesa riikkajoavkkospálli Neco Williams lei sadjásaččaid beavddis báikkálaš klubbastis.

Callum Hudson-Odoi bođii sadjásažžan ja skorii guktii, mii doalvui spealu spáppagastvimiidda (REUTERS)

Kieffer Mooreain ii váldojuvvon riska maŋŋel rasiiduvvama go Wrexham geahččalii viiddidit njealje spealu vuoitoráiddu, mii lei doalvun sin ovtta čuoggá lagabui Championshipa play-off-sajiide.

Forest álggahii garrasit go Jesus bálkestii spáppa badjel, ja Douglas Luiz gávnnai mállo-neatji 17 minuhta maŋŋel.

Duopmar Paul Tierney mieđhii álggos mála, muhto gielddi dan dasto go gávnnahii ahte Luiz lei stivren spáppa gieđainis ovdal go faskkii dan sisa.

Wrexham lei leamaš čorgat spáppa badjelis muhto dasto váillui badjelmearálaš ávki, muhto dat rievddai vuosttaš lađi maŋimuš 10 minuhtas.

Forest-hoavda Sean Dyche dagahii golmma rievdadusa lađđagaskkas go Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White ja Nicolas Dominguez sáddejuvvojedje gidtet dili.

Okonkwo gájui mearrideaddji spáppa go son bissehii Omari Hutchinsona spáppagastvimiin (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Galledeaddjit ledje dakkaviđe eanet njuovžilat go Okonkwo bálkestii badjel Luiza nuvttáspárttu ja doalai eret Nicolo Savona faskkideami.

Dramatihka lassánii go Hyam oaivvásti eallálaččat George Dobsona fiidna nuvttáspárttu sisa ja Hudson-Odoi časkkii sisa 60 sekundda maŋŋel ja dagahii fámolaš loahpaheami.

Hudson-Odoi doalvun gaskaspealu lassiáigái earenoamáš vuohkái, válddedettiinis spáppa raddái ja faskkiidis earenoamáš buori spárttu Okonkwo badjel, muhto Wrexham ii bággejuvvon iežaset vuosttaš top-flight FA Cup vuoittus 26 jahkái.

Hudson-Odoi doalvun gaskaspealu lassiáigái earenoamáš vuohkái, válddedettiinis spáppa raddái ja faskkiidis earenoamáš buori spárttu Okonkwo badjel, muhto Wrexham ii bággejuvvon iežaset vuosttaš top-flight FA Cup vuoittus 26 jahkái.

Sean Dyche dagahii gávcci rievdadusa Forest-joavkkus ja gohčui iežas vuosttašvuođu-spálliid muhto ii nagadan beassat badjel mállo-sárgá (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Eará sajis FA Cupas, Oxford United manai viidáseappot njealját gierdui 4–3 spáppagastvingilvvu vuoittuin MK Donsa badjel ja Port Vale vuittii Fleetwooda 1–0.

Wigan Athletic maid manai viidáseappot maŋŋel earenoamáš buori spealu Deepdaleis gos League One -joavku vuittii Championshipa play-off-hástaleaddji Preston North Enda maid 1–0.

source_doc:
Today's Sunday Best features my Knight from Ragnarok Online! This was my very first online PC game, he was an agi/dex 2HQ knight w/ a set of elemental claymores. I played on iRO Loki, and had two drawings featured as loadscreen art!
My online handle stems from this guy. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Coming in just under the wire on today's Sunday Best, it's my Deep Rock Galactic Engineer! The loadout I ran most of the time was Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. I think the LOK-1 is one of the coolest weapon designs in an FPS, a lock-on mechanic that encouraged finesse & deep mastery.

This week's Sunday Best is my Xenoverse OC, Parma (for parmesan cheese). She had a partner named Brie. Parma dressed up to match the teachers she studied under, but her final fit reflected the one she started with, styled to match this one pair of gloves. She used Giant Storm & Double Sunday a lot.

For my Sunday Best I drew my Paxultek from Remnant II. The goal of my build was to make the damage number from a single shot as large as possible. I used a Widowmaker single-shot elephant rifle we nicknamed The Governor. It was so strong it one-shot teammates through friendly fire damage reduction.

Today's Sunday Best features my funny gay dog lady from Webfishing. Her voice had a deeper, slower pitch so she sounded old & chill. One time I joined a full server, sat somewhere & started posting practical life advice, bits of big-sister wisdom, & the whole server found me & sat with me to listen.

It's Sunday, today's feature is my Darktide Zealot. Her name is Callista, she's chasing sainthood to be pardoned of her many crimes so she won't have to apologize for any of them. She has black dreams full of teeth and is constantly flirting with female Loner Psykers. She's unwell, but Female Loose Cannon Veterans think it's endearing and constantly hit on her for it. Their in-game voices say all of this.

Today's Sunday Best feature is QP from 100% Orange Juice! I played OJ a lot with my fighting game friends; for some reason I'd always have the hand pictured here. We used to post in text chat during games and I'd always say, Do NOT test me. I played so much QP the devs awarded me a special QP badge!

This week's Sunday Best is "Local Psychopath," Fem Boss #1 from Saint's Row 3. This was the first game I wanted to use the create-a-feature to make a character who blended in with the cast and looked like a genuine member of the Third Street Saints. I picked 3 cuz my favorite jacket wasn't in 4. :(

For today's Sunday Best I've got my Animal Crossing Villager to share. My favorite way to play these games is as part of a global cartel of goons who shared their wealth. When one person had big Turnips, everyone got paid. No profiteering; you need a rare item to make your room idea work? We got you.

It's technically Sunday, and this week's fit lands a bit early! I don't Tekken very often, but when I do I like to pick Steve and do all his slippery punches. In Tekken 7 he had a loose-fit, full-body track suit, so I made him into a deer man. When he's in Peekaboo Stance the antlers point forward!

This week's Sunday Best feature is Gaige from Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy is one of the coolest FPS mechanics in the genre, an escalating accumulation of power that came with a diminishing level of control, lowering both TTK & effective range. Ride the wave & figure it out on the fly, it'll be fine.
Gaige's voice actress plays V in Cyberpunk 2077, I learned recently. An old friend.

Today's Sunday Best isn't a person, it's a plane from an old Vlambeer game called Luftrausers! The music changes to match your airplane. My favorite configuration is called "Shipwreck," a sword-hulled amphibious prop plane with shotgun cannons, it can divebomb through boats & burst up from the sea.

Tonight our Sunday Best feature is the Houndmaster from a charming Crawl-like sidescroller called Vagante. Lovingly referred to as the Dogmancer, I loved to spec into skills that increased damage when you threw the dog at monsters. The dog roams on its own, but you can also carry it on your back!

For this week's Sunday Best we're going all the way back to Cyborg Justice on the Genesis. I played this game a lot and I always liked to make this one guy: round torso, big stampy feet and the buzzsaw hand. I always remember the magazine ad for this game vividly; you might too if you're of an age.

I did a bit of archaeological research to uncover references for this week's Sunday Best. This was my guy from Loadout, a third-person arena shooter about fiddly weapon customization. My main gun was an electric pulse cannon called "Kill-a-Watts" and the backup was a flaming LMG named "Roast Beef."
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Otná Sunday Best -gárvu lea mu Knight-karakteras Ragnarok Online -spealus! Dát lei mu ealstta vuosttaš neahttaspeallu PC:s, son lei agi/dex 2HQ-knight geas ledje máŋggat elementála claymore-mielddit. Speallen iRO Loki -bálvvas, ja guokte mu sárguma ledje spealu luđenšpilit!
Mu neahttanamma boahtá dán gánddas. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Hárvve gárttai otná Sunday Best -gárvvuin, muhto dás lea mu Deep Rock Galactic Engineer! Eanas áigge mu gárvu lei Executioner LOK-1 ja RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. Mu mielas LOK-1 lea okta somámus vearjominstariin FPS-spealuin, lock-on-mekanihkka mii gáibida čehpoda ja dárkilis máhtu.

Dán vahku Sunday Best lea mu Xenoverse OC, Parma (parmesanoastta mielde). Sus lei ustit man namma lei Brie. Parma gárvodii seammaláhkai go su oahpaheaddjit, muhto su maŋimus biktasat muittahedje daid vuosttaš biktasiid, mat ledje hápmejuvvon dán fárttat hanskkaid mielde. Son geavahii ollu Giant Storm ja Double Sunday.

Mu Sunday Best -gárvun sárgon mu Paxulteka Remnant II -spealus. Mu builda ulbmilin lei oažžut ovtta bážáldaga vahága nu stuorran go vejolaš. Geavahin Widowmaker-nammasaš elephant-bielkka, man gohčodeimme The Governorin. Dat lei nu fámolaš ahte dat godččii ovttat bážáldagain ustitlaččaid, vaikko friendly fire -vahát lei unniduvvon.

Otná Sunday Best -gárvu lea mu somá homofiila beana-nisu Webfishing-spealus. Su jietna lei jorba ja dásat, nu ahte son gulai boaris ja ráfálaš. Okta háve seahkanin dievva bálvái, čohkkájin gosa nu ja čálligohten praktihkalaš eallinráđiid, boarrásut oappá viisodagaid, ja olles bálvva speallit gávdne mu ja čohkkájedje mu lusa guldalit.

Lea sotnabeaivi, otná gárvu lea mu Darktide Zealot. Su namma lea Callista, son ohcala bassivuođa vai beasá su máŋggaid rihkusain, nu ahte son ii dárbbat addit ándagassii ovttage ovddas. Sus leat čáhppes niegut dievva bániiguin ja son álo flirtte nieida Loner Psykeriiguin. Son ii leat dearvas, muhto Female Loose Cannon Veteránat gávdnet dán somán ja álo geahččalit su vuoitit dán dihte. Spealu jienat muitalit dán buot.

Otná Sunday Best lea QP 100% Orange Juice -spealus! Speallen OJ ollu mu dološ ustitlaččaiguin; moadde sivas mus lei álo dát giehta mii lea dás govas. Mii čáliheimmet álo teakstačás spealuid áigge ja mun dappen álo lohkat: "Do NOT test me." Speallen nu ollu QP ahte spealloráhkadeaddjit bálkašedje mu earenoamáš QP-mearkkain!

Dán vahku Sunday Best lea "Local Psychopath", Fem Boss #1 Saint's Row 3 -spealus. Dát lei vuosttaš speallu mas hálidebje geavahit karakteraráhkadanfápmu ja ráhkadit karaktera mii heive bures nistái ja lei dego albma Third Street Saints -lahttu. Válljejin 3, go mu liiko-jakká ii lean spealus 4. :(

Otná Sunday Best -gárvui mus lea mu Animal Crossing Villager. Mu eanemus liiko-vuohki speallat dáid spealuid lea dakkár dássegi masiis go ovttas speallit juogadit buot riggodagaid. Go ovttas ledje stuorra Turnips, de buohkat ožžo ruđa. Ii goasge nu ahte okta vuoitá; jus dárbbahat hárvenaš dávvira iežat latnjii? Mii gávdnat dan dutnje.

Tehnikalaččat lea sotnabeaivi, ja dán vahku gárvu boahtá veháš árrat! Mun in speala Tekken nu dávjá, muhto go spealan, de liikon válljet Steve ja dahkat su buot somá hárpmaid. Tekken 7 -spealus sus lei liddas ollesruba-track suit, nu ahte ráhkadin sus bohcco-olbmo. Go son lea Peekaboo Stance -posišuvnnas, de čoarvvit čujuhit ovddosguvlui!

Dán vahku Sunday Best -gárvu lea Gaige Borderlands 2 -spealus. Pure Anarchy lea okta somámus FPS-mekanihkaid dán genre-spealuin, fámolaš lasihus mii buvttii maiddái unnit stivrema, nu ahte unnidii sihke TTK ja dárkilisvuođa. Speala ja gávnna vuogi, dat manná bures.
Gaige jietna-neavttár neaktá V-karaktera Cyberpunk 2077 -spealus, gávnnahin gieskat. Boares ustit.

Otná Sunday Best ii leat olmmoš, muhto girdinfas dološ Vlambeer-spealus man namma lea Luftrausers! Musihkka nuppástuvvá girdima mielde. Mu liiko-konfigurašuvdna lea "Shipwreck", okta miehče-girdin mii girdá sihke čázis ja áimmus, ja das leat shotgun-kanonat, dat sáhttá dive-bomba fatnasiid čáda ja girdit fas áirui mearas.

Dán eahkeda Sunday Best lea Houndmaster somá Crawl-lágan sidescroller-spealus man namma lea Vagante. Ráhkisvuođain gohčoduvvon Dogmancerin, mun liikon bidjat máhtuid dakkár fámebujiide mat lasihedje vahága go bálkestit beatnaga monsteriid ala. Beana vázzá ieš, muhto sáhtát maiddái guoddit dan iežat selggis!

Dán vahku Sunday Best -gárvun mii mannat gitta Cyborg Justice -spealu ala Genesis-konsolii. Speallen dán spealu ollu ja liikon álo ráhkadit dán guovtti gándda: jorba rumaš, stuorra juolggit ja buzzsaw-giehta. Muitán dán spealu bláđđi-almmuhusa hui čielgasit; don maid dán muitát jus leat dán agis.

Dahken veháš arkeologalaš dutkama gávdnat referánssaid dán vahku Sunday Best -gárvui. Dát lei mu karakter Loadout-spealus, goalmmát persovnna areena-bážán mas lei hui dárkilis vearjolaš-heiveheapmi. Mu váldovearju lei fártta pulsa-kanona man namma lei "Kill-a-Watts" ja nubbi vearju lei buolli LMG man namma lei "Roast Beef".
hypo_1:
Otná Sunday Best -gárvun lea mu Knight Ragnarok Online -spealus! Dát lei mu ealstta vuosttaš neahttaspeallu PC:s. Son lei agi/dex 2HQ-knight geas ledje elementála claymore-mielddit. Speallen iRO Loki -bálvvas, ja guokte mu sárguma ledje spealu luđenšpiliin!
Mu neahttanamma boahtá dán gánddas: O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Just ja just fasttain otná Sunday Best -gárvvuin, dás lea mu Deep Rock Galactic Engineer! Eanas áigge mu gárvu lei Executioner LOK-1 ja RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. Mu mielas LOK-1 lea okta somámus vearjominstariin FPS-spealuin, lock-on-mekanihkka mii gáibida čehpoda ja čiekŋalis máhtu.

Dán vahku Sunday Best lea mu Xenoverse OC, Parma (parmesanoastta mielde). Sus lei ustit man namma lei Brie. Parma gárvodii seammaláhkai go su oahpaheaddjit, muhto su maŋimus biktasat muittahedje daid vuosttaš biktasiid, mat ledje hápmejuvvon dán fárttat hanskkaid mielde. Son geavahii ollu Giant Storm ja Double Sunday -fámuid.

Mu Sunday Best -gárvun sárgon mu Paxulteka Remnant II -spealus. Mu builda ulbmilin lei oažžut ovtta bážáldaga vahága nu stuorran go vejolaš. Geavahin Widowmaker-nammasaš ovttabážáldat elephant-bielkka, man gohčodeimme The Governorin. Dat lei nu fámolaš ahte dat godččii ovttat bážáldagain ustitlaččaid, vaikko friendly fire -vahát lei unniduvvon.

Son ii leat dearvas, muhto Female Loose Cannon Veteránat gávdnet dán somán ja álo geahččalit su vuoitit dán dihte. Spealu jienat muitalit dán buot.

Just ja just fasttain otná Sunday Bestiin, dás lea mu Deep Rock Galactic Engineer! Eanas áigge mu gárvu lei Executioner LOK-1 ja RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. Mu mielas LOK-1 lea okta somámus vearjoráhkadusain FPS-spealuin, lock-on-mekanihkka mii gáibida čehpoda ja čiekŋalis máhtu.

Dán vahku Sunday Best lea mu Xenoverse OC, Parma (parmesanoastta mielde). Sus lei guoibmi man namma lei Brie. Parma gárvodii seammaláhkai go su oahpaheaddjit, muhto su maŋimus biktasat muittahedje daid vuosttaš biktasiid, mat ledje hápmejuvvon dán ovtta fárttat hanskkaid mielde. Son geavahii ollu Giant Storm ja Double Sunday -fámuid.

Mu Sunday Bestii sárgon mu Paxulteka Remnant II -spealus. Mu buildda ulbmilin lei oažžut ovtta bážáldaga vahága nu stuorran go vejolaš. Geavahin Widowmaker-nammasaš ovttabážáldat elephant-bielkka, man gohčodeimme The Governorin. Dat lei nu fámolaš ahte dat godččii ovttat bážáldagain ustitlaččaid, vaikko ustitlaš bážáldagaid vahát lei unniduvvon.

Otná Sunday Best ovddasta mu somá homofiila beana-nisu Webfishing-spealus. Su jietna lei jorba ja dásat, nu ahte son gulai boaris ja ráfálaš. Okta háve seahkanin dievva bálvái, čohkkájin gosa nu ja čálligohten praktihkalaš eallinráđiid, boarrásut oappá viisodagaid, ja olles bálvva speallit gávdne mu ja čohkkájedje mu lusa guldalit.

Lea sotnabeaivi, otná gárvu lea mu Darktide Zealot. Su namma lea Callista, son ohcala bassivuođa vai beasá su máŋggaid rihkusain, nu ahte son ii dárbbat addit ándagassii ovttage ovddas. Sus leat čáhppes niegut dievva bániiguin ja son álo flirtte nieida Loner Psykeriiguin. Son ii leat dearvas, muhto Female Loose Cannon Veteránat gávdnet dán somán ja álo geahččalit su vuoitit dán dihte. Spealu jienat muitalit dán buot.

Otná Sunday Best gárvu lea QP 100% Orange Juice -spealus! Speallen OJ ollu mu dološ ustitlaččaiguin; moadde sivas mus lei álo dát giehta mii lea dás govas. Mii čáliheimmet álo teakstačás spealuid áigge ja mun dappen álo lohkat: "Do NOT test me." Speallen nu ollu QP ahte spealloráhkadeaddjit bálkašedje mu earenoamáš QP-mearkkain!

Dán vahku Sunday Best lea "Local Psychopath", Fem Boss #1 Saint's Row 3 -spealus. Dát lei vuosttaš speallu mas hálidebje geavahit karakteraráhkadanfámu ja ráhkadit karaktera mii heive bures nistái ja lei dego albma Third Street Saints -lahttu. Válljejin 3, go mu liiko-jakká ii lean spealus 4. :(

Otná Sunday Bestii mus lea mu Animal Crossing Villager juogadit. Mu eanemus liiko-vuohki speallat dáid spealuid lea dakkár dássegi masiis go ovttas speallit juogadit buot riggodagaid. Go ovttas ledje stuorra Turnips, de buohkat ožžo ruđa. Ii goasge nu ahte okta vuoitá; jus dárbbahat hárvenaš dávvira iežat latnjii? Mii gávdnat dan dutnje.

Tehnikalaččat lea sotnabeaivi, ja dán vahku gárvu boahtá veháš árrat! Mun in speala Tekken nu dávjá, muhto go spealan, de liikon válljet Steve ja dahkat su buot somá hárpmaid. Tekken 7 -spealus sus lei liddas ollesruba-track suit, nu ahte ráhkadin sus bohcco-olbmo. Go son lea Peekaboo Stance -posišuvnnas, de čoarvvit čujuhit ovddosguvlui!

Dán vahku Sunday Best gárvu lea Gaige Borderlands 2 -spealus. Pure Anarchy lea okta somámus FPS-mekanihkaid dán genre-spealuin, fámolaš lasihus mii buvttii maiddái unnit stivrema, nu ahte unnidii sihke TTK ja dárkilisvuođa. Speala ja gávnna vuogi, dat manná bures.
Gaige jietna-neavttár neaktá V-karaktera Cyberpunk 2077 -spealus, gávnnahin gieskat. Boares ustit.

Otná Sunday Best ii leat olmmoš, muhto girdinfas dološ Vlambeer-spealus man namma lea Luftrausers! Musihkka nuppástuvvá girdima mielde. Mu liiko-konfigurašuvdna lea "Shipwreck", okta miehče-girdin mii girdá sihke čázis ja áimmus, ja das leat shotgun-kanonat, dat sáhttá dive-bomba fatnasiid čáda ja girdit fas áirui mearas.

Dán eahkeda Sunday Best gárvu lea Houndmaster somá Crawl-lágan sidescroller-spealus man namma lea Vagante. Ráhkisvuođain gohčoduvvon Dogmancerin, mun liikon bidjat máhtuid dakkár fámebujiide mat lasihedje vahága go bálkestit beatnaga monsteriid ala. Beana vázzá ieš, muhto sáhtát maiddái guoddit dan iežat selggis!

Dán vahku Sunday Bestii mii mannat gitta Cyborg Justice -spealu ala Genesis-konsolii. Speallen dán spealu ollu ja liikon álo ráhkadit dán guovtti gándda: jorba rumaš, stuorra juolggit ja buzzsaw-giehta. Muitán dán spealu bláđđi-almmuhusa hui čielgasit; don maid dán muitát jus leat dán agis.

Dahken veháš arkeologalaš dutkama gávdnat referánssaid dán vahku Sunday Best gárvui. Dát lei mu karakter Loadout-spealus, goalmmát persovnna areena-bážán mas lei hui dárkilis vearjolaš-heiveheapmi. Mu váldovearju lei fártta pulsa-kanona man namma lei "Kill-a-Watts" ja nubbi vearju lei buolli LMG man namma lei "Roast Beef".
