Dán eahkeda Sunday Best gárvu lea Houndmaster somá Crawl-lágan sidescroller-spealus man namma lea Vagante. Ráhkisvuođain gohčoduvvon Dogmancerin, mun liikon bidjat máhtuid dakkár fámebujiide mat lasihedje vahága go bálkestit beatnaga monsteriid ala. Beana vázzá ieš, muhto sáhtát maiddái guoddit dan iežat selggis!

Dán vahku Sunday Bestii mii mannat gitta Cyborg Justice -spealu ala Genesis-konsolii. Speallen dán spealu ollu ja liikon álo ráhkadit dán guovtti gándda: jorba rumaš, stuorra juolggit ja sahá-giehta. Muitán dán spealu bláđđi-almmuhusa hui čielgasit; don maid dán muitát jus leat dán agis.

Dahken veháš arkeologalaš dutkama gávdnat referánssaid dán vahku Sunday Best gárvui. Dát lei mu karakter Loadout-spealus, goalmmát persovnna areena-bážán mas lei hui dárkilis vearjolaš-heiveheapmi. Mu váldovearju lei fártta pulsa-kanona man namma lei "Kill-a-Watts" ja nubbi vearju lei buolli LMG man namma lei "Roast Beef".
hypothesis:
Otná Sunday Bestis lea mu Knight Ragnarok Online -spealus! Dát lei mu ealstta vuosttaš neahttaspeallu PC:s, son lei agi/dex 2HQ knight ja sus ledje elementála claymorat. Speallen iRO Loki -bálvvas, ja guokte mu sárguma ledje spealu luđenšpiliin!
Mu neahttanamma boahtá dán gánddas. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Just ja just fasttain otná Sunday Bestiide, dás lea mu Deep Rock Galactic Engineer! Eanas áigge mu gárvu lei Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. Mu mielas LOK-1 lea okta somámus vearjoráhkadusain FPS-spealuin, luktenmekanihkka mii gáibida čehpoda ja čiekŋalis máhtu.

Dán vahku Sunday Best lea mu Xenoverse OC, Parma (parmesanoastta mielde). Sus lei guoibmi man namma lei Brie. Parma gárvodii seammaláhkai go su oahpaheaddjit, muhto su maŋimus biktasat muittahedje daid vuosttaš biktasiid, mat ledje hápmejuvvon dán ovtta fárttat hanskkaid mielde. Son geavahii ollu Giant Storm ja Double Sunday -fámuid.

Mu Sunday Bestii sárgon iežan Paxulteka Remnant II -spealus. Mu buildda ulbmilin lei oažžut ovtta bážáldaga vahága nu stuorran go vejolaš. Geavahin Widowmaker-nammasaš ovttabážáldat elephant-bielkka, man gohčodeimme The Governorin. Dat lei nu fámolaš ahte dat godččii ovttat bážáldagain ustitlaččaid, vaikko ustitlaš bážáldagaid vahát lei unniduvvon.

Otná Sunday Best -gárvvuin čájehan mu somá homofiila beana-nisu Webfishing-spealus. Su jietna lei jorba ja dásat, nu ahte son gulai boaris ja ráfálaš. Okta háve seahkanin dievva bálvái, čohkkájin gosa nu ja čálligohten praktihkalaš eallinráđiid, boarrásut oappá viisodagaid, ja olles bálvva speallit gávdne mu ja čohkkájedje mu lusa guldalit.

Lea sotnabeaivi, otná gárvu lea mu Darktide Zealot. Su namma lea Callista, son ohcala bassivuođa vai beasá su máŋggaid rihkusain, nu ahte son ii dárbbat addit ándagassii ovttage ovddas. Sus leat čáhppes niegut dievva bániiguin ja son álo flirtte nieida Loner Psykeriiguin. Son ii leat dearvas, muhto Female Loose Cannon Veteránat gávdnet dán somán ja álo geahččalit su vuoitit dán dihte. Spealu jienat muitalit dán buot.

Otná Sunday Best gárvu lea QP 100% Orange Juice -spealus! Speallen OJ ollu mu dološ ustitlaččaiguin; moadde sivas mus lei álo dát giehta mii lea dás govas. Mii čáliheimmet álo teakstačás spealuid áigge ja mun dappen álo lohkat: "Do NOT test me." Speallen nu ollu QP ahte spealloráhkadeaddjit bálkašedje mu earenoamáš QP-mearkkain!

Dán vahku Sunday Best lea "Local Psychopath", Fem Boss #1 Saint's Row 3 -spealus. Dát lei vuosttaš speallu mas hálidebje geavahit karakteraráhkadanfámu ja ráhkadit karaktera mii heive bures nistái ja lei dego albma Third Street Saints -lahttu. Válljejin 3, go mu liiko-jakká ii lean spealus 4. :(

Otná Sunday Bestii mus lea mu Animal Crossing Villager juogadit. Mu eanemus liiko-vuohki speallat dáid spealuid lea dakkár dássegi masiis go ovttas speallit juogadit buot riggodagaid. Go ovttas ledje stuorra Turnips, de buohkat ožžo ruđa. Ii goasge nu ahte okta vuoitá; jus dárbbahat hárvenaš dávvira iežat latnjii? Mii gávdnat dan dutnje.

Tehnikalaččat lea sotnabeaivi, ja dán vahku gárvu boahtá veháš árrat! Mun in speala Tekken nu dávjá, muhto go spealan, de liikon válljet Steve ja dahkat su buot somá hárpmaid. Tekken 7 -spealus sus lei liddas ollesruba-track suit, nu ahte ráhkadin sus bohcco-olbmo. Go son lea Peekaboo Stance -posišuvnnas, de čoarvvit čujuhit ovddosguvlui!

Dán vahku Sunday Best gárvu lea Gaige Borderlands 2 -spealus. Pure Anarchy lea okta somámus FPS-mekanihkaid dán genre-spealuin, fámolaš lasihus mii buvttii maiddái unnit stivrema, nu ahte unnidii sihke TTK ja dárkilisvuođa. Speala ja gávnna vuogi, dat manná bures.
Gaige jietna-neavttár neaktá V-karaktera Cyberpunk 2077 -spealus, gávnnahin gieskat. Boares ustit.

source_doc:
High Noon review - Billy Crudup brings classic Hollywood western back with a bang

How do you turn a classic Hollywood western into West End musical fare? Add songs, many of Bruce Springsteen's in this case, along with a few rounds of line dancing and a sizzling star in Billy Crudup. Still, it's an odd experience initially as Thea Sharrock's production switches from one brief filmic scene to the next, and the endeavour seems as wooden as the clapboard saloon-bar slats that comprise the handsome set.

As a piece of theatre, it finds its flow. As a debate play, though, it gathers a locomotive energy as it travels towards the showdown between Frank Miller (James Doherty), who is returning to this "dirty little village in the middle of nowhere," and the marshal Will Kane (Crudup) who put him behind bars. That is mostly because of the uncanny and urgent relevance of this 1952 film about a community working out (or rather, squirming out of) its civic responsibilities around institutional wrongdoing.

Originally an allegory of McCarthyism (its screenwriter, Carl Foreman, was blacklisted), the story sets the cowardice of the many against the courage of the few - in this case, the lone, heroic Kane, who mobilises his defence against Miller and his henchmen after being let down by the townsfolk. The film was blasted by John Wayne as un-American for its critical portrait of the community; the production comes to life in its arguments on collective in/action and seems to speak directly about the dilemmas facing the cowboy country of Trump's America (the shooting in Minneapolis just the latest example). Eric Roth's script uses many lines from Foreman's screenplay but fleshes out the debates on the ethical stance of a community in the face of wrongdoing and misguided American myths around immigration.

Cowardice of the many, courage of the few ... cast of High Noon. Photograph: Johan Persson

There is also the joint talent of Crudup and the ever agile Denise Gough who play the central couple on their wedding day. She is Amy Fowler, a Quaker who abhors the actions of violent men; he is the marshal who has just given up his "tin star" to start over as a shopkeeper. That is, until news reaches town that Miller is arriving on the noon train.

Gary Cooper made the role entirely his own, his integrity comparable only to Gregory Peck's Atticus in To Kill a Mockingbird. So Crudup has his long shadow to evade. He manages to hold up the part on stage as an upstanding, earnest and increasingly desperate man. Gough makes her part grittier and more modern than that of her film counterpart, Grace Kelly. The pair are convincing as a couple although their narrow characterisation hems in the full scale of their abilities.

Several other characters seem too flimsy, from Billy Howle's deputy marshal, Harvey Pell, to Rosa Salazar's Mexican businesswoman, Helen, although the affinity between her and Amy is refreshing, and Roth gives more voice and texture to these women as a whole.

Several of Springsteen's songs bring their own American politics (from the frontier optimism of Land of Hope and Dreams to The Rising, written in response to 9/11). Some are sung a cappella, mostly by Gough, who is a strong singer, her voice emanating desolation, but she reprises I'm on Fire one too many times.

It seems like a reluctant musical at times, the songs short and thin but the percussive music and sound design are always arresting, as is the lighting, designed by Neil Austin, which brings emotional clarity and intrigue. A clock is central to Tim Hatley's set design, counting down to the train's thrilling arrival and the subsequent showdown, which manages to contain tension and drama, despite the difficulty of staging a cross-town shootout.

For all its early stiffness, it builds in momentum and there are moving moments. Ultimately, the political message speaks loudest, harnessing the McCarthyist fear of then and the Trumpian terror of today.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
High Noon -árvvoštallan - Billy Crudup buktá klassihkalaš Hollywood-veastarna fas eallit málbman

Mo rievdadit klassihkalaš Hollywood-veastarna West End -musikálan? Lasit lávlagiid, dán háve eanaš Bruce Springsteena, moadde line dance -dánssa ja asfalttaliegga nástti, Billy Crudupa. Dat lea dastoge álgui dakkár fasttes vásáhus, go Thea Sharrocka produvšuvdna sirdása oanehis filbmagovas nubbái, ja dáhttu orru dego muorran dahkkon, nugo dat hearva lávdehárvvit mat duddjojit fiidna lágideami.

Teáhterbihttán dat gávdná iežas rávnnji. Dehkkon dágastallanneavttálmassan dat fas gávdná lokomotijvaenergiija, go dat lihkada loahpalaš deaivvadeapmái Frank Millera (James Doherty) gaskka, guhte lea máhccame dán "bassi smávva gilli mii lea dušše iednemis", ja nállošeaba Will Kane (Crudup) gaskka guhte binnii su giddagassii. Dat lea eanemustá dán 1952-filmma guoskevaš ja hohpolaš áigeguovdilvuođa geažil, mii muitala servodagas mii gieđahallá (dahje baicce garvá) iežas servodatlaš ovddasvástádusaid ásahuslaš vearredaguid ektui.

Álgoálggus McCarthy-áiggi allegoriijan (su giehtačálli, Carl Foreman, biddjojuvvui čáhppeslistui), muitalus bidjá máŋgasa balvvaid moaddevás čeavláivuođa vuostá – dán háve oktonas, sáŋgárlaš Kane, guhte báljosta iežas bealuštusa Milleri ja su olbmuide maŋŋel go giliálbmot lea su behttán. John Wayne dársttii filmma go dat eai lean amerikálaš dán guoskevaš servodatguovdilvuođa geažil; produvšuvdna eallá iežas dágastallamiin oktasaš doaimmaheami/doaimma ektui ja orru sárdnumis njuolga Trumpa Amerihká cowboy-eatnama dilemmaid birra (báhčin Minneapolisas lea juste maŋimus ovdamearka). Eric Rotha giehtačálus geavaha máŋga sáni Foremana giehtačállosis, muhto dárkilahttá dágastallamiid servodaga etihkalaš dille birra vearredaguid ektui ja boastut dulkojuvvon amerikálaš myhtaid birra sisafálliid ektui.

Máŋgasa balvvaid, moaddevás čeavláivuohta ... High Noon neavttárkoarkka. Govva: Johan Persson

Dasa lassin gávdno maid Crudupa ja álo johtilis Denise Gougha oktasaš dálut guđet neavttášit guovddáš bára sudno heajaváldindábe. Son lea Amy Fowler, kveakár guhte fasttiha gievra dievdduid daguid; son lea nállošeaba guhte lea juste addán eret iežas "veaikenástti" álggahit ođđasit gávpeolmmožin. Dat lea, dassážiigo gilli gullan ođđasiid ahte Miller lea boahtime gaskabeai-togain.

Gary Cooper dagai rolla ollislaččat iežan, su rehálašvuohta lei veardádallamis dušše Gregory Pecka Atticussii girjjis To Kill a Mockingbird. Nu ahte Crudupis lea su guhkis suodji man son ferte garvit. Son nagada doallat rolla lávddis nugo rehalaš, duođalaš ja eanet ja eanet vuollánan dievdu. Gough duddjo iežas rollas garvebbu ja eanet ođđaáigásažžan go su filbmaguibmi, Grace Kelly. Pára lea jáhkkevaš guovttos, vaikko sudno gáržžes karakteriserepma bidjá rájáid sudno buot návccaide.

Máŋga eará karaktearra orrot menddo geahppasat, Billy Howlea sadjásaš nállošeas, Harvey Pellis, Rosa Salazara meksikálaš fitnodatnissonii, Helenii, vaikko lagasvuohta su ja Amy gaskka lea hávski, ja Roth addá eanet jiena ja sániid dáidda nissonolbmuide ollislaččat.

Máŋga Springsteena lávlaga buktet iežaset amerikálaš politihka (rádjaguovllu optimismas "Land of Hope and Dreams" -lávlagis "The Rising" -lávlagii, mii čállojuvvui vástádussan 9/11-dáhpáhussii). Muhtumat lávlojuvvojit a cappella, eanaš Goughis, guhte lea gievra lávlu, su jietna muitala dovdduid, muhto son geardduha "I'm on Fire" oktan lassin menddo máŋgii.

Dat orru dego musikála mii ii háliit leat dakkár muhtumin, lávlagat leat oanehaččat ja asehaččat, muhto ritmmat ja jietnadisain leat álo dakkárat mat geasuhit, nugo maid čuovga, man lea duddjon Neil Austin, mii buktá dovdamearkkaid ja miellagiddevašvuođa. Diibmu lea guovddážis Tim Hatley lávdedisainis, mii rehkenasta áiggi toga gelddolaš boahtimii ja maŋit deaivvadeapmái, mii nagada doallat tensiona ja drama, vaikko lea váttis lágidit báhčima gili čađat.

Buot álggu garvunvuođas fuolakeahttá, dat lassána fámus ja das leat lihkahiid dilit. Loahpa-loahpas politihkalaš sárdnumuš sárdnu eanemustá, mii geavaha McCarthy-áiggi balu dalle ja Trump-áiggi balu odne.

Eric Rotha giehtačálus geavaha máŋga sáni Foremana giehtačállosis, muhto dárkilahttá dágastallamiid servodaga etihkalaš dille birra vearredaguid ektui ja boastut dulkojuvvon amerikálaš myhtaid birra sisafálliid ektui.

Máŋgasa balvvaid, moaddevás čeavláivuohta ... High Noon -neavttárat. Govva: Johan Persson

Dasa lassin gávdno maid Crudupa ja álo johtilis Denise Gougha oktasaš dálut, guđet neavttášit guovddáš bára sudno heajaváldindábe. Son lea Amy Fowler, kveakár guhte fasttiha gievra dievdduid daguid; son lea nállošeaba guhte lea juste addán eret iežas "veaikenástti" álggahit ođđasit gávpeolmmožin. Dat lea, dassážiigo gilli gullan ođđasiid ahte Miller lea boahtime gaskabeai-togain.

Gary Cooper dagai rolla ollislaččat iežan, su rehálašvuohta lei veardádallamis dušše Gregory Pecka Atticussii girjjis To Kill a Mockingbird. Nu ahte Crudupis lea su guhkis suodji man son ferte garvit. Son nagada doallat rolla lávddis nugo rehalaš, duođalaš ja eanet ja eanet vuollánan dievdu. Gough duddjo iežas rollas garvebbu ja eanet ođđaáigásažžan go su filbmaguibmi, Grace Kelly. Pára lea jáhkkevaš guovttos, vaikko sudno gáržžes karakteriserepma bidjá rájáid sudno buot návccaide.

Máŋga eará karaktearra orrot menddo geahppasat, Billy Howlea sadjásaš nállošeas, Harvey Pellis, Rosa Salazara meksikálaš fitnodatnissonii, Helenii, vaikko lagasvuohta su ja Amy gaskka lea hávski, ja Roth addá eanet jiena ja sániid dáidda nissonolbmuide ollislaččat.

Máŋga Springsteena lávlaga buktet iežaset amerikálaš politihka (rádjaguovllu optimismas "Land of Hope and Dreams" -lávlagis "The Rising" -lávlagii, mii čállojuvvui vástádussan 9/11-dáhpáhussii). Muhtumat lávlojuvvojit a cappella, eanaš Goughis, guhte lea gievra lávlu, su jietna muitala dovdduid, muhto son geardduha "I'm on Fire" oktan lassin menddo máŋgii.

Dat orru dego musikála mii ii háliit leat dakkár muhtumin, lávlagat leat oanehaččat ja asehaččat, muhto ritmmat ja jietnadisain leat álo dakkárat mat geasuhit, nugo maid čuovga, man lea duddjon Neil Austin, mii buktá dovdamearkkaid ja miellagiddevašvuođa. Diibmu lea guovddážis Tim Hatley lávdedisainis, mii rehkenasta áiggi toga gelddolaš boahtimii ja maŋit deaivvadeapmái, mii nagada doallat tensiona ja drama, vaikko lea váttis lágidit báhčima gili čađat.

Buot álggu garvunvuođas fuolakeahttá, dat lassána fámus ja das leat lihkahiid dilit. Loahpa-loahpas politihkalaš sárdnumuš sárdnu eanemustá, mii geavaha McCarthy-áiggi balu dalle ja Trump-áiggi balu odne.
hypo_3:
High Noon -árvvoštallan – Billy Crudup buktá klassihkalaš Hollywood-veastarna fas eallit málbman

Mo rievdadit klassihkalaš Hollywood-veastarna West End -musikálan? Lasit lávlagiid – dán háve eanaš Bruce Springsteena –, moadde line dance -vuoru ja hástaleaddji nástti, Billy Crudupa. Dat lea dastoge álggos unna fasttes vásáhus, go Thea Sharrocka buvttadus sirdása oanehis filbmagovas nubbái, ja dáhttu orru dego muorran dahkkon, nugo dat saloon-bára muorralávddit mat duddjojit čáppa lávdehárvvi.

Teáhterbihttán dat gávdná iežas rávnnji. Dágastallanbihttán dat fas gávdná lokomotijvaenergiija, go dat lihkada loahpalaš deaivvadeapmái Frank Miller (James Doherty), guhte lea máhccame dán "bassi smávva gilli mii lea dušše iednemis", ja nállošeaba Will Kane (Crudup) gaskka, guhte binnii su giddagassii. Dat lea eanemustá dán 1952-filmma guoskevaš ja hohpolaš áigeguovdilvuođa geažil, mii muitala servodagas mii gieđahallá (dahje baicce garvá) iežas servodatlaš ovddasvástádusaid ásahuslaš vearredaguid ektui.

Álgoálggus McCarthy-áiggi allegoriijan (su giehtačálli, Carl Foreman, biddjojuvvui čáhppeslistui), muitalus bidjá máŋgasa balvvaid moaddevás čeavláivuođa vuostá – dán háve oktonas, sáŋgárlaš Kane, guhte báljosta iežas bealuštusa Milleri ja su olbmuide maŋŋel go giliálbmot lea su behttán. John Wayne dársttii filmma go dat eai lean amerikálaš dán guoskevaš servodatguovdilvuođa geažil; buvttadus eallá iežas dágastallamiin oktasaš doaimmaheami/doaimma ektui ja orru sárdnumis njuolga Trumpa Amerihká cowboy-eatnama dilemmaid birra (báhčin Minneapolisas lea juste maŋimus ovdamearka). Eric Rotha giehtačálus geavaha máŋga sáni Foremana giehtačállosis, muhto dárkilahttá dágastallamiid servodaga etihkalaš dille birra vearredaguid ektui ja boastut dulkojuvvon amerikálaš myhtaid birra sisafálliid ektui.

Máŋgasa balvvaid, moaddevás čeavláivuohta ... High Noon -neavttárat. Govva: Johan Persson

Dasa lassin gávdno maid Crudupa ja álo johtilis Denise Gougha oktasaš dálut, guđet neavttášit guovddáš bára sudno heajaváldindábe. Son lea Amy Fowler, kveakár guhte fasttiha gievra dievdduid daguid; son lea nállošeaba guhte lea juste addán eret iežas "veaikenástti" álggahit ođđasit gávpeolmmožin. Dat lea, dassážiigo gilli gullan ođđasiid ahte Miller lea boahtime gaskabeai-togain.

Gary Cooper dagai rolla ollislaččat iežan, su rehálašvuohta lei veardádallamis dušše Gregory Pecka Atticussii girjjis To Kill a Mockingbird. Nu ahte Crudupis lea su guhkis suodji man son ferte garvit. Son nagada doallat rolla lávddis nugo rehalaš, duođalaš ja eanet ja eanet vuollánan dievdu. Gough duddjo iežas rollas garvebbu ja eanet ođđaáigásažžan go su filbmaguibmi, Grace Kelly. Pára lea jáhkkevaš guovttos, vaikko sudno gáržžes karakteriserepma bidjá rájáid sudno buot návccaide.

Máŋga eará karaktearra orrot menddo geahppasat, Billy Howlea sadjásaš nállošeas, Harvey Pellis, Rosa Salazara meksikálaš fitnodatnissonii, Helenii, vaikko lagasvuohta su ja Amy gaskka lea hávski, ja Roth addá eanet jiena ja sániid dáidda nissonolbmuide ollislaččat.

Several of Springsteen's songs bring their own American politics (from the frontier optimism of Land of Hope and Dreams to The Rising, written in response to 9/11). Some are sung a cappella, mostly by Gough, who is a strong singer, her voice emanating desolation, but she reprises I'm on Fire one too many times.

It seems like a reluctant musical at times, the songs short and thin but the percussive music and sound design are always arresting, as is the lighting, designed by Neil Austin, which brings emotional clarity and intrigue. A clock is central to Tim Hatley's set design, counting down to the train's thrilling arrival and the subsequent showdown, which manages to contain tension and drama, despite the difficulty of staging a cross-town shootout.

Buot álggu garvunvuođas fuolakeahttá, dat lassána fámus ja das leat lihkahiid dilit. Loahpa-loahpas politihkalaš sárdnumuš sárdnu eanemustá, mii geavaha McCarthy-áiggi balu dalle ja Trump-áiggi balu odne.

It seems like a reluctant musical at times, the songs short and thin but the percussive music and sound design are always arresting, as is the lighting, designed by Neil Austin, which brings emotional clarity and intrigue. A clock is central to Tim Hatley's set design, counting down to the train's thrilling arrival and the subsequent showdown, which manages to contain tension and drama, despite the difficulty of staging a cross-town shootout.

For all its early stiffness, it builds in momentum and there are moving moments. Ultimately, the political message speaks loudest, harnessing the McCarthyist fear of then and the Trumpian terror of today.
hypo_7:
High Noon -árvvoštallan – Billy Crudup buktá klassihkalaš Hollywood-veastarna fas eallit málbman

Mo rievdadit klassihkalaš Hollywood-veastarna West End -musikálan? Lasit lávlagiid, dán háve eanaš Bruce Springsteena, moadde line dance -vuoru ja hástaleaddji nástti, Billy Crudupa. Dat lea dastoge álggos unna fasttes vásáhus, go Thea Sharrocka buvttadus sirdása oanehis filbmagovas nubbái, ja dáhttu orru dego muorran dahkkon, nugo dat saloon-bára muorralávddit mat duddjojit čáppa lávdehárvvi.

Teáhterbihttán dat gávdná iežas rávnnji. Dágastallanbihttán dat fas gávdná lokomotijvaenergiija, go dat lihkada loahpalaš deaivvadeapmái Frank Miller (James Doherty), guhte lea máhccame dán "bassi smávva gilli mii lea dušše iednemis", ja nállošeaba Will Kane (Crudup) gaskka, guhte binnii su giddagassii. Dat lea eanemustá dán 1952-filmma guoskevaš ja hohpolaš áigeguovdilvuođa geažil, mii muitala servodagas mii gieđahallá (dahje baicce garvá) iežas servodatlaš ovddasvástádusaid ásahuslaš vearredaguid ektui.

Álgoálggus McCarthy-áiggi allegoriijan (su giehtačálli, Carl Foreman, biddjojuvvui čáhppeslistui), muitalus bidjá máŋgasa balvvaid moaddevás čeavláivuođa vuostá – dán háve oktonas, sáŋgárlaš Kane, guhte báljosta iežas bealuštusa Milleri ja su olbmuide maŋŋel go giliálbmot lea su behttán. John Wayne dársttii filmma go dat eai lean amerikálaš dán guoskevaš servodatguovdilvuođa geažil; buvttadus eallá iežas dágastallamiin oktasaš doaimmaheami/doaimma ektui ja orru sárdnumis njuolga Trumpa Amerihká cowboy-eatnama dilemmaid birra (báhčin Minneapolisas lea juste maŋimus ovdamearka). Eric Rotha giehtačálus geavaha máŋga sáni Foremana giehtačállosis, muhto dárkilahttá dágastallamiid servodaga etihkalaš dille birra vearredaguid ektui ja boastut dulkojuvvon amerikálaš myhtaid birra sisafálliid ektui.

Máŋgasa balvvaid, moaddevás čeavláivuohta ... High Noon -neavttárat. Govva: Johan Persson

Dasa lassin gávdno maid Crudupa ja álo johtilis Denise Gougha oktasaš dálut, guđet neavttášit guovddáš bára sudno heajaváldindábe. Son lea Amy Fowler, kveakár guhte fasttiha gievra dievdduid daguid; son lea nállošeaba guhte lea juste addán eret iežas "veaikenástti" álggahit ođđasit gávpeolmmožin. Dat lea, dassážiigo gilli gullan ođđasiid ahte Miller lea boahtime gaskabeai-togain.

Gary Cooper dagai rolla ollislaččat iežan, su rehálašvuohta lei veardádallamis dušše Gregory Pecka Atticussii girjjis To Kill a Mockingbird. Nu ahte Crudupis lea su guhkis suodji man son ferte garvit. Son nagada doallat rolla lávddis nugo rehalaš, duođalaš ja eanet ja eanet vuollánan dievdu. Gough duddjo iežas rollas garvebbu ja eanet ođđaáigásažžan go su filbmaguibmi, Grace Kelly. Pára lea jáhkkevaš guovttos, vaikko sudno gáržžes karakteriserepma bidjá rájáid sudno buot návccaide.

Máŋga eará karaktearra orrot menddo geahppasat, Billy Howlea sadjásaš nállošeas, Harvey Pellis, Rosa Salazara meksikálaš fitnodatnissonii, Helenii, vaikko lagasvuohta su ja Amy gaskka lea hávski, ja Roth addá eanet jiena ja sániid dáidda nissonolbmuide ollislaččat.

Eallit máŋga Springsteena lávlaga buktet iežaset amerikálaš politihka (frantiiri optimismmas Land of Hope and Dreams -lávlagis gitta The Rising -lávlagii, mii čállojuvvui vástádussan 9/11-dáhpáhussii). Muhtun lávlagat lávlojuvvojit a cappella, eanaš Gough, guhte lea gievra lávlu, su jietna buktá fasttesvuođa, muhto son geardduha I'm on Fire -lávlaga menddo máŋgii.

Dat orru muhtumin dego eahpedáhtolaš musikála, lávlagat leat oanehaččat ja asehaččat, muhto ritmmat ja jietnadeatnu leat álo dárkilat, nugo maid čuovga, maid Neil Austin lea duddjon, mii buktá dovdomearkkaid ja earenoamášvuođa. Diibmu lea guovddážis Tim Hatley lávdeduddjomis, mii lohká áiggi togga hávski boahtimii ja loahpalaš deaivvadeapmái, mii nagada doallat tensiona ja drama, vaikko lea váttis lágidit báhčima gili čada.

Vaikko álggos lea garas, de dat gávdná iežas fátta ja das leat lihkahiid muddut. Loahpalaččat politihkalaš sárdnumiš čuodjá eanemustá, go dat geavaha McCarthy-áiggi balu ja dálá Trump-áiggi balu.
